name: Voter Action Project
subject: The system wasn't built for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Any 3rd party shenanigans can't be written off, regardless of the candidate. The Electoral College has been formed around a two-party system and isn't equipped to handle the impacts of so many candidates. A billionaire-funded 3rd party vanity campaign for someone like RFK Jr. will absolutely guarantee the popular vote winner won't be president and is likely to throw the election to the U.S. House of Representatives to resolve.
Team: Our democracy is in too perilous a state to handle this kind of test. Fuel our efforts to support a popular vote standard that will end the Electoral College forever with $35 or whatever you can right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=081024_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081024_2&amount=25]
USA Today: RFK Jr. can't win. But he and Cornel West could put Trump back in the White House. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=081024_2&amount=25]
Why do we keep raising the alarm about 3rd party candidates for President? Because the Electoral College could put an anti-voting election denier back in the White House. That's an existential threat to our democracy. Don't believe us? USA Today has the details:
" A recent series of six swing-state presidential polls offered Democrats and President Joe Biden a welcome dose of optimism. The head-to-head matchup with former President Donald Trump had Biden winning Wisconsin by a point and tied in Michigan and Pennsylvania."
"But the same Bloomberg/Morning Consult poll contained a dire warning. When minor party candidates like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Jill Stein and Cornel West were added to the mix , Biden’s narrow lead in Wisconsin became a 2-point loss, a tie in Pennsylvania flipped to Trump by 6 points and Michigan remained dead even. Such an outcome would return Trump to the White House. "
This is the nightmare scenario come to life - and the threat is real. Our only chance is to stop their plan before it goes into action is by pitching in $35 or whatever you can to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=081024_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=081024_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=081024_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=081024_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=081024_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=081024_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=081024_2&amount=35]
Election experts agree on three points: (1) In a head-to-head general election contest, Trump faces the same challenges to winning the popular vote as he has in the past, perhaps worse; (2) independent third-party candidates on the ballot siphoning away votes gives Trump the best possible chance of winning reelection by winning the Electoral College; and (3) Trump says he will continue to seek reelection even if he is convicted of crimes. We can’t just hope that this threat will go away or that the courts will act in time to remove Trump from the ballot.
But we do have one simple way to checkmate these efforts. The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia.
Minnesota was the latest to join, giving NPVIC 16 states plus DC, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. We need to get over the top in the other states considering joining, like Maine and Michigan, to make the popular vote a reality.
We have to end this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $35 or more today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=081024_2&amount=35]
Onward,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081024_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081024_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081024_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081024_2&amount=25]

name: MAGA Flag from Trump
subject: Final Call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC Inc

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I am officially the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
_*Sent in support of Elissa Slotkin for Michigan and Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate*_
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66008?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od)
Peter —
It’s official. I am the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate here in Michigan.
I’m so grateful to Michigan voters for entrusting me not only with this honor, but also the responsibility of keeping Michigan and this U.S. Senate seat blue in November. I will not let you down.
Because there is just too much at stake:
Whether Michigan is a place where anyone can get in and stay in the middle class.
Whether our granddaughters have fewer rights than their grandmothers.
Whether the American experiment of a multi-racial, multi-ethnic democracy continues.
And whether Michigan contributes to keeping the White House, and making history.
**[So you can bet I will be working harder than I ever have before. I know that we can win this, but it will take all of us. My team has set a rather ambitious $100,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal for this week so that we can hit the ground running in the sprint to the general election. Will you split a donation of $10 between Lucas Kunce and my campaign tonight and become a General Election Founding Donor?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66008?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66009?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66008?refcode=em20240810-7293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=7293%2E614464%2Efj_-od)
---
In short: the real race has begun, Peter. We’re up against Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, a man who has shown that he’ll say or do anything to get elected.
He has co-sponsored bills that would not only ban abortion nationwide, but threaten in-vitro fertilization and birth control. He supported privatizing Social Security and Medicare. After 20 years as a politician, Rogers left Michigan for good. He cashed in on his D.C. connections to make millions by helping Chinese tech companies, giving them access to the United States. And in doing so, increased his net worth by as much as 2,000%. Then he bought a mansion in Florida and two yachts. He is only moving back to Michigan to run for the Senate.
**It’s clear: Mike Rogers is only looking out for himself.**
I will be working to make sure every Michigan voter understands just how bad Mike Rogers would be for Michiganders if elected to the Senate, but we need resources to start immediately holding him accountable to his record.

clean_body: Sent in support of Elissa Slotkin for Michigan and Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate Peter — It’s official. I am the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate here in Michigan. I’m so grateful to Michigan voters for entrusting me not only with this honor, but also the responsibility of keeping Michigan and this U.S. Senate seat blue in November. I will not let you down. Because there is just too much at stake: Whether Michigan is a place where anyone can get in and stay in the middle class. Whether our granddaughters have fewer rights than their grandmothers. Whether the American experiment of a multi-racial, multi-ethnic democracy continues. And whether Michigan contributes to keeping the White House, and making history. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: In short: the real race has begun, Peter. We’re up against Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, a man who has shown that he’ll say or do anything to get elected. He has co-sponsored bills that would not only ban abortion nationwide, but threaten in-vitro fertilization and birth control. He supported privatizing Social Security and Medicare. After 20 years as a politician, Rogers left Michigan for good. He cashed in on his D.C. connections to make millions by helping Chinese tech companies, giving them access to the United States. And in doing so, increased his net worth by as much as 2,000%. Then he bought a mansion in Florida and two yachts. He is only moving back to Michigan to run for the Senate. It’s clear: Mike Rogers is only looking out for himself. I will be working to make sure every Michigan voter understands just how bad Mike Rogers would be for Michiganders if elected to the Senate, but we need resources to start immediately holding him accountable to his record. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for your support. Elissa Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

Peter, [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=909ec41ea0654fe9b04204979bdf1d1e&_e=feyAy8-IUeyXhJv1r-bcF0oPSbhgzJ3y4L1k_U9y22acN6lgb3wR_loYb73S71RHdPQDATYLumNDT1FistyZNjRy3R_ETvh8OldS54ND2KeUzTX2lZn2Cl1o9RHK4VP5nza5wbhHhAMeIzRHGYdyfeDEtJIjAvmwWmM73pPAio7yAQ57F0o_SkhsQVuEgHGQBfMXOWN__MQPt8M00Wrx4wBlDsyQ5KRjv7Li54j5ibsV_lJ71g2LzcIWOgGP6-_UgX-Kgxtm6vdCOc74swb7ALUIIVMUqUjAmHofmwrloMlJAfcA8pD6hTswaP80XcLgzxjaRCfM6ANDgd8LOK2OpskYwQZ6LTddevlLrXcRdR0%3D) My story doesn’t start with freedom, but it ends with it. I was born in Vietnam while the communists were fighting to take power. My family and I made it out just days before Saigon fell. My father was put on a kill list for bravely opposing communist tyranny. If it wasn’t for America taking us in, I may not be alive today. But in this strange new country, we had unlimited opportunities. My parents taught me NEVER to take our freedom for granted - and that’s why at 18, I was appointed to the Naval Academy to defend the same freedoms that saved my life. I served in the U.S. Navy for 25 years. I rose to the rank of Captain and was able to build a life for myself and my family that wouldn’t be possible anywhere but America. **[My story is truly proof of the American Dream. But right now, that dream is in danger.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=909ec41ea0654fe9b04204979bdf1d1e&_e=feyAy8-IUeyXhJv1r-bcF0oPSbhgzJ3y4L1k_U9y22acN6lgb3wR_loYb73S71RH6PJLY2OPuYm7rofoOlz7rpi5CCQ_5Z55AVF3KR_F6j9hZjiPpxJNiH9RVCqNu_UqpYyEg2BlPOm63TGaifah7f3nVY9cI3YaerykeD-XBx40H0PfZjcBATyfxaVDTqEifZs_NUzAQ1lZ0DbPGH56So-PhmjZLgYh4cI2FOGirXrEYgTBfFRSjsElA3oqDXBIsl1A5ErZA9_O5Zo0fySgehT0Cq5LlaIlKjUkJzyTmsogk1tOcJuPh2PX2SOe8HQJ3aMklVaUvFr9aUT_hxZ67NZumk8a6mJb2s7GICduS0dkdKDY_4SToVijHBgiouc7VRtviW41BroLxZy-xOaaZQ%3D%3D) **
---
[**SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=909ec41ea0654fe9b04204979bdf1d1e&_e=feyAy8-IUeyXhJv1r-bcF0oPSbhgzJ3y4L1k_U9y22acN6lgb3wR_loYb73S71RH6PJLY2OPuYm7rofoOlz7rpi5CCQ_5Z55AVF3KR_F6j9hZjiPpxJNiH9RVCqNu_UqpYyEg2BlPOm63TGaifah7f3nVY9cI3YaerykeD-XBx40H0PfZjcBATyfxaVDTqEifZs_NUzAQ1lZ0DbPGH56So-PhmjZLgYh4cI2FOGirXqe8K5Cja49Ntxxl1XLXnicJFa8dG48RtQjAFzHhwUCZfpUqtQU2Qd6S0hUphU2Q38QpBza0rtNt3ccFy6U2qa1iC_cn64I2Q63GXKnkx-FZH7Z5-kXUzZMYXTztWFQdzL5XL42wcAL51R-AaJfB-kKZ0HWfWYn1tUfA3RUbdhUag%3D%3D)

Radical, socialist politicians want to take our country in the same direction as communist Vietnam. they want to erode our freedom and even throw you in jail if you refuse to toe the Leftist line. _That isn_ _’_ _t what I fought for, and it_ _’_ _s not what too many of my brothers and sisters in arms gave their lives for._ **I fought to protect our freedom abroad for 25 years. This will save these candidates a mountain of money, so they can use your contributions to win votes rather than to pay administrative costs. ## Rockford River Days Parade
Walkers Wanted!

**Date: Sunday, August 11, 2024

Time: Parade Line up starts at 11 am, Parade starts at noon.

Line Up #: 42

Line-up begins at Hwy 55 and Electric Drive, Rockford
(see map below)

Parking: Participant parking is at Wright-Hennepin School (6800 Electric Dr., Rockford, MN)
Parade ends at Riverside Park (8334 Main St., Rockford, MN)
****
**Dress:** Dress for warm weather and wear your Tad Jude t-shirt and comfortable shoes. We will have more Tad Jude t-shirts for all parade walkers!

**Who can join?:** Bring the whole family! **

Sincerely, Paid for by Tad Jude for Congress PO Box 1881, Maple Grove, MN 55311 | To unsubscribe, click .

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: special delivery for . . .
body:
They thought they could get away with it . . .
Dear Pro-Life Friend,
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gtrhlid-duchtdja-y/)
Not long ago, I told you how pro-lifers sent three pro-abortion Republican “Sister Senators,” - _Katrina Shealy, Sandy Senn, and Penry Gustafson_ \- in South Carolina packing in the Palmetto State’s Republican Primaries.

_**Literally!**_

All three of these Senators killed our _Life at Conception Act,_ which would have ensured all preborn lives across South Carolina are protected.

So, just this week, we made a special delivery to these defeated pro-abortion Senators to help them get out of the State Capital in Columbia.

_We delivered moving boxes to their offices to help them on their way!_

Pro-Life Friend, when politicians – of either party – betray Life and cave to the Abortion Lobby, you can rest assured that **_Students for Life Action_ will be there to fight back. ** Then, to help them pack. 😉

Sadly, that’s not something many pro-life organizations are willing to do.

Far too many are ok with getting stabbed in the back – so long as it’s by those on the same “side-of-the-isle.”

That’s why these Republican women thought they could sell pro-lifers out for a nice headline in _The New York Times,_ and get away with it.

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gtrhlid-duchtdja-j/) But that’s not how we operate.

I got involved in the Pro-Life Movement to save babies, not to make friends.

So, when these Senator Sisters voted against SFLAction's _Life at Conception Act_ and the _Heartbeat Abortion Protection Act,_ we hit back with 37,407 mailers, 110,641 text messages sent, 47,011 phone calls made, and 2,572 doors knocked.

**The result was that all three of these candidates were ultimately defeated by pro-life candidates!**

Because the Pro-Life Generation is committed to doing what it takes to protect preborn Life, it makes some people mad.

According to _The State,_ Sen. Katrina Shealy whined that our tactic of exposing pro-abortion Republicans is “as low as it gets.”

No, Sen. Shealy — _voting to kill babies is as low as it gets!_

I don’t care what party a politician belongs to.

If they ever cast a pro-abortion vote, I (and the rest of the Pro-Life Generation) want them out.

**[So, would you agree to your most generous contribution to help us continue our vital work](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gtrhlid-duchtdja-t/)?**

The truth is, we’ve had a busy primary season here at _Students for Life Action_ – and weak-kneed Republicans are taking notice . . . which is key to ensuring Republicans across America take the pro-life movement’s goals seriously.

In Oklahoma, pro-life voters just finished sending another traitor on Life packing.

This time, it was the incoming Senate Pro Tem Greg McCortney (R) who paid the price for betraying innocent preborn lives.

As Majority Leader in Oklahoma’s Senate, he made an unholy alliance with Senate Democrats to block the SFLAction's _OK Stop Pill Trafficking Act_ (HB3013) from proceeding into the Senate after being passed in the House.

_Students for Life Action_ mobilized quickly and educated voters about this betrayal — and voters expressed their displeasure by sending him packing.

All in all, pro-lifers have defeated dozens of weak-kneed Republican incumbents in races we targeted across 20 states this spring at an average cost of only $1,300 per district!

In politics, that’s not much money.

But it’s sending a LOUD-AND-CLEAR message.

Any politician – of either party – who betrays the pro-life movement risks paying the price with the end of their political careers.

_Because the Pro-Life Generation will send them packing as well!_

**[Please consider agreeing to your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gtrhlid-duchtdja-i/).**

Without generous folks like you, we couldn’t achieve these victories.

Thank you for all you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – **[With Election Day 2024 rapidly approaching, I hope you’ll consider chipping in just $10 or even $25 to help support our efforts](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gtrhlid-duchtdja-d/)!**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you are no longer interested you can [unsubscribe instantly](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-gtrhlid-duchtdja-l/).

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

name: Jacky
subject: Wow!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Kamala, Tim, and I couldn't believe what we saw at today's rally in NV:
| | |
---
Team,

I just stepped off the stage of today’s incredible rally with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz in Las Vegas, and I have to tell you: I’m blown away.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90598031/491073363/-251846620?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4534-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc2NzNlZS04MTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVs1BRwwLfZY9RFY0TLDoZxxX9FSCACDflhCX2J6vYk=)
It was _thrilling _to see so many Democrats fired up about defending this battleground – which is key to keeping both the Senate and White House blue. **But friend, we need to remember: Winning in Nevada this November is not going to be easy.**
This state is a toss-up, we’re being called the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and dark money donors are flooding Nevada with _millions_ of dollars to buy my seat and flip it red. The ONLY way we can fight back and win is with the grassroots support of folks like you.
**That’s why a group of our generous donors has agreed to MATCH every gift for the next 24 hours to build on the momentum from today’s rally – but we still have a long way to go to reach our $100,000 goal.**
**[So please, if you’re ready to power this movement to victory, now is the best time to step up. Please chip in $5 or more and have it DOUBLED to help us keep Nevada blue and defend the Senate and the White House for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90598032/491073364/-251846620?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4534-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc2NzNlZS04MTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVs1BRwwLfZY9RFY0TLDoZxxX9FSCACDflhCX2J6vYk=)**

clean_body: Kamala, Tim, and I couldn't believe what we saw at today's rally in NV: | | | Team, I just stepped off the stage of today’s incredible rally with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz in Las Vegas, and I have to tell you: I’m blown away. = It was thrilling to see so many Democrats fired up about defending this battleground – which is key to keeping both the Senate and White House blue. But friend, we need to remember: Winning in Nevada this November is not going to be easy. This state is a toss-up, we’re being called the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and dark money donors are flooding Nevada with millions of dollars to buy my seat and flip it red. The ONLY way we can fight back and win is with the grassroots support of folks like you. That’s why a group of our generous donors has agreed to MATCH every gift for the next 24 hours to build on the momentum from today’s rally – but we still have a long way to go to reach our $100,000 goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. – Jacky Rosen 💜 | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. name: SIGN THE LETTER (VPP)
subject: Thank Justice Sotomayor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
She just SLAMMED Trump’s justices
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74476?t=6&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm) Justice Sotomayor issued a SCATHING dissent condemning the MAGA Supreme Court majority’s immunity decision. _She’s a HERO!_

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74476?t=7&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74476?t=8&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_Thank you for standing up for our democracy against the far-right MAGA Supreme Court majority._**

This immunity decision is DISASTROUS news for the future of our country, paving the way for Donald Trump to be let off the hook for his crimes!

**And I know their extremist attacks are far from over.**

This is the same MAGA majority that DEMOLISHED _Roe v. Wade,_ OBLITERATED affirmative action, and sided with January 6 INSURRECTIONISTS!

I’m sick and tired of their antics — so I’m doing everything in my power to SAVE the White House and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74476?t=9&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74476?t=10&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks for signing,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=16051%2E878179%2E8MJaxm)

name: Lucas
subject: Josh Hawley thinks he and his anti-abortion crusade are just as important as the heroes who fought to end slavery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
That’s why he won’t stop till he’s outlawed all abortions nationwide
#
Peter — Josh Hawley isn’t like you and me.
He wants to control everything that happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and what you do with your own body. He even thinks he’s as important as the people who fought against slavery in our country.
**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and we can’t afford another six years of it in the Senate.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66228?refcode=em20240810-7300&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7300%2E614464%2E7rr4bg)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66228?refcode=em20240810-7300&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7300%2E614464%2E7rr4bg)**
**I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley because I believe a Senator’s job is to represent people — not to rule over them or tell them how to live.**
I’m on a mission to fundamentally change who has power in our country so that everyday Missourians can finally make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives without some corrupt politician getting in the way. That’s why I want to defeat Hawley and restore reproductive freedom in our country FOREVER.
[**Will you help me get it done by rushing a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign today? The national insiders backing Hawley are doing everything they can to tear me down, but I know this grassroots team is ready to fight back, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip this U.S. Senate seat on November 5.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66228?refcode=em20240810-7300&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7300%2E614464%2E7rr4bg) **

name: Sen. Rosen
subject: Time-sensitive news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Kamala, Tim, and I couldn't believe what we saw at today's rally in NV:
Hey, team – I really don’t want you to miss this time-sensitive news, so I'm bumping it to the top of your inbox.

A group of generous donors was so fired up about today’s rally in Nevada with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz that they agreed to DOUBLE all gifts to my must-win Senate race to keep this battleground blue – but we’re still short of our $100,000 goal.

A match like this doesn't come around often. And with me locked neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent, we can’t afford to waste this opportunity.

My team made you a personalized link you can use to rush your support: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosenfornevada_email_augmatch_2024?refcode=jtk4532-fr-text&amounts=250,100,20,25,5

Thank you, team,
Jacky

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jacky
Date: Sat, Aug 10, 2024
Subject: Wow!!!

Team,

I just stepped off the stage of today’s incredible rally with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz in Las Vegas, and I have to tell you: I’m blown away.

It was thrilling to see so many Democrats fired up about defending this battleground – which is key to keeping both the Senate and White House blue. But friend, we need to remember: Winning in Nevada this November is not going to be easy.

This state is a toss-up, we’re being called the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and dark money donors are flooding Nevada with millions of dollars to buy my seat and flip it red. The ONLY way we can fight back and win is with the grassroots support of folks like you.

That’s why a group of our generous donors has agreed to MATCH every gift for the next 24 hours to build on the momentum from today’s rally – but we still have a long way to go to reach our $100,000 goal.

So please, if you’re ready to power this movement to victory, now is the best time to step up. Please chip in $5 or more and have it DOUBLED to help us keep Nevada blue and defend the Senate and the White House for Democrats.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_email_augmatch_2024?refcode=jtk4532-fr-text&amounts=250,100,50,25,5

Thank you.

– Jacky Rosen 💜

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=zlhpRBpfG1IJ3RTr9mHAIxmyGQRmbbCoDAeu%2BgOjG8un%2BNYTDrbNCg%2FekhQaZYB84I2YnRYVsa05r28ExVrltTFBfz01kSgkaNkc8D0m1TbnVyD5khGZbiE%2F7hk46ka5dMNcXMKDpKzbBKZeBOvZxI6Vfjpm%2FtjDtOytj7QzXJdApKEWTCMsDkBp2AFccjXiw0Tf45wHirybA1Vwck%2BO78ZIjrLSodbhURkQfwvOS5916P4cOBb10NK8GwJEBhmRKbWtkd7EjQ8DSAhWRdFFD%2F2yMbwh4zma8aGIKt5C4V2XQTc3%2FbDGkAGprjRU6rPHt9MgD44pTRRDl0CxuF6lswv8IUKlhIm%2BWBeOu%2FsFiEgrQi5b37OZiNghmhATwP7eVp8lIl6JeHBdCQt4pK1GdFT3CJfs%2BDz0D2MDJ8toi3M%3D

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.

Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Jack Smith throws a curveball at Trump in court that is sending 2024 into question
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 11, 2024

Jack Smith throws a
curveball at Trump in court that is sending 2024 into question

Trump is
still gummed up with legal witch hunts. It's the only card the
Left has to play.

And now Jack Smith threw a
curveball at Trump in court that is sending 2024 into question.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Shocking discovery from
wife of Harris' VP pick makes many Americans think twice

Ever since it was
revealed that Tim Walz would be the VP pick for Harris, Americans
have been looking into the family's past. And people are very
concerned by what they have seen.
➞ Continue Reading

Nancy Pelosi confesses to
an incredibly evil act that is dropping jaws

Pelosi is starting to
air out everyone's dirty laundry. She has lost the gavel, and
she's taking people with her.
➞ Continue Reading

Biden comes out of hiding
to prove he's completely insane

The president has
gone out of the public eye. The Democrats want nothing more than
to put him away for good.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We’re running out of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
I have a big announcement to share with you.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhb78gv6u5u0th42vfugl45dptbhaer5lagfg7ko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
Friend,

I have a big announcement to share with you.

First, remember what we’re up against in the 2024 election:
* We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last.
* Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country.
* Uniparty politicians in D.C. don’t care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests.

Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it’s in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU.

Since I ended my presidential campaign, I’ve considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement:

**Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation._I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024_!**

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 before midnight and help Turning Point PAC fund ballot chasers?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqib2efluocvtpljqpqb164nu14v3ct6ccu2og28_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmjom92jhrbfna33s0o1qu4sbo4t925gapmf6r5g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
The media continues to lie to us.

The justice system is politicized.

And America-last politicians in D.C. don’t care about it.

Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It’s not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024.

[Please join me in supporting Turning Point PAC with a donation of ANYTHING you can generously contribute today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0s24hrchnh98g5civtv1mc9eqkt4epfcijb38ko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zroudl426lf39cur0r81m9sd7ja4l0a2n3bu96lg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $20.24](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsnvgvl98ekko0n52rtnpgis7khf5kt0edrhmit8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgqd1886as3dsd3a6shaj3p5rjj7341o5ss6umq8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztjhd98voo445fk7a0flk35m7hp0f76vuumf1fm8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg9cmv9s1es2g2bt0i6764j64ms2p7bpnlit77ho_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpb9t17lsk99rkgf3pn74rd7dnbjknls2ltq8t88_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn7q0g65110am73i85gi2cut0qj0vi7ut8v7dito_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
[Donate ANY Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztkbrg4e172hch5bi41481bva13jpcp2c20q4l58_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
The reality is it will require all of us to step up to win in November. It can be by volunteering your time for Get Out the Vote efforts. It can be by making sure your family votes. [Or, you can chip in $10 or more today and help us win in November.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsotpncbv2l5rdcor4st0ckfiv651uv2spj6d63g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2v4d47d3hte3hmnb58ep0dk3qumdbjcv83k3n1g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1i9b0lqcir6l4gdf758egr1sb0ao1h9aqnjh1ag_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zda6ltue6ndgpdj16r9gh4633p2q2710pfjku8p8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4oqlhmt8lis9a897tta72rahhlmnu1btpbbvvg0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0oufuuokr2e8fbrd8gu07dcfjmmmcmht9hjdeig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhp3128slueg40bbp29srjehj1l56fdlen4bm6k8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zklgn36om6u7ub7tjieq3uc0pejq4ubtbm4ril68_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm1or1c9h2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: American Defense News
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2p71uostklkmqllrjefo4vit2akmph03st0kgm0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb6c3h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zustoja41p9dhfls9ldti78l81iipg7k5niits5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb6c3h2bs) [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh6itqtnilh6j2ppmne5kc2i8mvq2aeqv5u9rg8g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb6c3h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqen23deih2jfrnfs9bg40t0cj2tivgspg3d9qq8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb6c3h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqpssta2t420r2g041793sup1at64jdv1dl56pug_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb6c3h2bs)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmcl7mbucvlt7fg8a263tu765ah0fr8uvhnneet0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb5cth2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zllg199oevb5sr62l1mtn18r7clsda61mb1oerm8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb5cth2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhcmsqfggad82oqltiuu0rvpo5em868vm5kbm5ro_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb5cth2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqr9iaghmrgf9h38mn5p8su2lats8mb4ipn55d0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb5cth2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq6f50t7cd2hh0mdv434iuu15ovuit2utmeuu80_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cphm9pb5cth2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

When the Left-wing Elite rushed to crown a new candidate... _The entire race to Election Day TOTALLY RESET._ [**Friend, at Turning Point Action -- which is leading the biggest, boldest BALLOT-CHASING operation on the Right -- it's GAME ON.** **Are you with me?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs6n6mjqivtpge81mr0p7l80klfg566r7ae7bu38_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm0ob4sph2bs) Because this effort is so important, a special Turning Point Action supporter will DOUBLE every gift you gift through MIDNIGHT on August 31.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlaiovfp76tv824634abq89o2um5vom0o9s6mj3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm0ob4sph2bs)

| | Dear Friend,[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MjI0LTQ2YTU0ZjI5MGRkYzRmN2U5MmMzYjE0MTVkZWZiNzIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTMwMDQmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/PGceaPlGlcpkaqJJTDX0TQ)
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MjI0LTQ2YTU0ZjI5MGRkYzRmN2U5MmMzYjE0MTVkZWZiNzIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTMwMDQmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/PLknyjwfb49Bgn_QE5bT2Q)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MjI0LTQ2YTU0ZjI5MGRkYzRmN2U5MmMzYjE0MTVkZWZiNzIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTMwMDQmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/h3S6CD-Jbu1oUcXT-zB5Rw)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in
World War II remain with us.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osNQNMGWNL

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Only a fraction of the
16 million Americans who fought bravely in World
War II remain with us.

This fact means that
we're losing more and more living memory of the
greatest armed conflict in human history,
which makes the study of World
War II even more important.

To this end, Hillsdale College has produced
an online course called "The Second World Wars."

Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this
course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters,
belligerents, and ways of fighting came to define the war. And it
examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led
the Allied powers to victory over the Axis.

Don't get left behind. Secure your DVD set
today with any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: my restaurant almost landed me in jail…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
...But it made me a Congresswoman instead.

| |

---
| | | My restaurant almost landed me in jail - but it made me a Congresswoman instead.

My name is Lauren Boebert. Before serving in Congress, I was serving hungry Coloradans as the owner of Shooters Grill in Rifle, Colorado. As a die-hard defender of our Right to Bear Arms, I encouraged my staff to open carry at work. Liberals hated me for it.

A few years later, I made even more headlines when I defied power hungry politicians during COVID and opened up my restaurant anyway. **They sued me. They tried to close my doors forever. And they made me an enemy of the state.**

_But I 'm a mama bear of 4 boys - it takes a LOT more than a few empty suits to scare me!_

I'm tough. And now that I'm in Congress, I'm not afraid to ruffle some feathers and speak my mind. I'll never stop fighting for President Trump, my faith, my country, or our God-given rights.

Unfortunately, defeating Kamala Harris, defending our freedoms, and saving our country will be EXPENSIVE. Biden handed over his 91 million dollar warchest on day one AND the Democrat Machine raised another 200 million bucks when Kamala was coronated. _**[That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars from this email alone to help.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuc9e1jk00slofl24aomjvn8d4vos4kd1dp9u0n0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars from this email alone to help. ")**_

That's a steep mountain to climb BUT it's 100% doable as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks a piece. **Think you can do that for me?**

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvuqln24lhitsnbboqlrmdjd4il6a9g49jbir2n0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "Headshot")
---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdht68ukijjlser5km89viqor3csmthm6gdl9i18_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4m8kliq1bqir6ttegek8on5g83f6eh89fkv17dg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi13ker748l9cfvr8p9lmjlm5ior76231cqnb4l8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs)**
---
Look,

The fight for freedom isn't mine alone. It's going to take every last one of us stepping up to stop the Democrat Machine from destroying our country. **That means you, me, Steve Scalise, President Trump, and every single freedom-loving American Patriot needs to do their part.**

I'm doing mine.

_**[Now I'm humbly asking you - from the bottom of my heart - to do yours too by pitching in a few bucks right now. If you can spare more, that would be even better!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbkdp1c14e3si362s7cv3qqtn2vef8pv5as30hgg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "Now I’m humbly asking you – from the bottom of my heart – to do yours too by pitching in a few bucks right now. If you can spare more, that would be even better! ")**_

I never want you to give more than you and your family can afford. But if you can pitch in even five bucks, every single dollar makes a difference when the stakes are so high.

Either way, I wish you the best. Thanks for all you do for our country.

Keep the faith,
Lauren Boebert

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfhnhkhf7o7hefb1s7382maragv6fs6j564qcpro_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

I'm launching my brand new _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zraud3sta98h9us9evm60jlo5k04qlghdugdnpng_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.
---
| | | [START YOUR CHECK-IN >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqqoaovar7vqhodet2hgoeisnfpcsaviniulf4b8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmao71c1h2bs "START YOUR CHECK-IN")

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We’re running out of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
I have a big announcement to share with you.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjje57hvsnjcl192ph8j87e9a1927ul56fp3hg70_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
Friend,

I have a big announcement to share with you.

First, remember what we’re up against in the 2024 election:
* We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last.
* Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country.
* Uniparty politicians in D.C. don’t care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests.

Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it’s in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU.

Since I ended my presidential campaign, I’ve considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement:

**Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation._I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024_!**

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 before midnight and help Turning Point PAC fund ballot chasers?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zh6uea3a6fj0qgg90kvba8uo3nrabcjpl2k1fb18_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb7p6db5ib8922is5t8sldh0a6ht6vbop4ahc9q8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
The media continues to lie to us.

The justice system is politicized.

And America-last politicians in D.C. don’t care about it.

Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It’s not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024.

[Please join me in supporting Turning Point PAC with a donation of ANYTHING you can generously contribute today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zaacgrl0kk1mul3mc95dcvi6hk3i747eh5rflmd8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrn0bb8i8b3acglg2qt4n7qt588r25934kcbq718_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $20.24](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj74r98oav82l003i7b1jbamdg0u7sccm797t9oo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3ebvepockovccskakrire23nj01m431ppoj2mso_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd2j1ko88nuho3um04q7m93ueglfdu7dbh79ejsg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9n2l719km5e6sepo7etkb64igfhfa1p6dr7o0s8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zen9lgkkkka956pe4ug0i6fpcdq94gacr9t7iktg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfagtf6q6oqd1045ipmkri2hgs9fsr20kuv5nl8g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
[Donate ANY Amount](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7rbehtkb2nbd2g2l68i4lppo40nb6ptker40evg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)
The reality is it will require all of us to step up to win in November. It can be by volunteering your time for Get Out the Vote efforts. It can be by making sure your family votes. [Or, you can chip in $10 or more today and help us win in November.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrjcis4dhbhhmgvpgqg07765o8288b5iga5qmbn0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjm6pr2c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc.
