body:
What a journey

**[THE STORY OF DONALD J. TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zae15q41q10mho93lrnc5h1g1k0khho2jprats48_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**

Friend, this email is longer than most, but we have a story to tell. **This story is about the greatest President in our lifetime who has endured more than any president in the history of the United States of America but never stopped fighting for the American people.**

* * *

We can't tell you how much it means that you opened this email. Did you know that only about _22% of Americans_ open these messages? Thank you for joining us.

This story is important, so we have a quick favor to ask - we're simply asking that you read this all the way through. _**[If you finish reading this and still think a $5 donation doesn't matter, we want to thank you for reading.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z65qdffvt8cq9ipf2spbi3j3rl3va1ge1afg1jdo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**_ _We appreciate you and can 't wait to win in November._

While only about 22% of our friends are opening messages, only 1% go the extra mile by donating! That means you can join the **[top 1% of all Trump supporters.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpiuluuljeljgpe7p9pjmud6gbcplo584m6er0d0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**

**[If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit - even just $5 - we could reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' big-money donors.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7dng1acpd7ik2757aa3lllfrr4l0ubhb6j006q8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z54l6r8fipa0nhncjd5t16hlrpq20og9cv1fu7jg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za3i9tn57t4fb1v5ddfusvis5r70qlhm5ts1t2u0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Before the story begins, we have one question for you: _How did we end up here on July 13th, 2024?_

* * *

Well, here's the story:

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z171on0am3ns6namssimal8is6n68souuftsqc10_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Once upon a time, Donald J. Trump decided to leave his perfect life to help save our country. With one escalator ride, this nation was changed forever, and the **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN MOVEMENT was born.**
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4oq6li61jkurm4o7k0fineclskdapgm1ralgrf0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztpcg4qtcpn3b247ltqvvlfib8dkhc055o924e7o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Donald J. Trump competed in one of the most competitive Republican primaries in the history of politics. One by one, he defeated all seventeen candidates to become the **[2016 Republican Nominee for President of the United States.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkchqqrp2vr0ph8m2bi4hghlb0r0asc1laj7cfr8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidfaj1c74n5mgj0brrq986jd0iusklemimrn628_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z70etb3972jlspcc69cocdh9m871gfv8bjmt02i0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Democrats and the mainstream media were in disbelief. They lied about Donald Trump, called his supporters a **" basket of deplorables,"** and even rigged polls to ensure that Hillary Clinton would be the 45th President of the United States. Despite all that, the silent majority was silent no longer, and **on November 8th, 2016, Donald J. Trump WON the election.** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5efv4ktlp086gj86hrure2gg75st7n1lcjgifl8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2nkkiobc56ai102ap3ufpulbp8g2r9bshbpfo6o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Donald J. Trump officially became President Donald J. Trump and gave his historic inaugural address straight to the American people. The media claimed this was a dark speech, but the American people knew we were about to enter an era of winning, and winning we did, like never before.

Our country began to FLOURISH, and the beginning of the greatest economy of all time had just started. However, Democrats began a nasty plan to try and take him down once again with multiple **HOAXES!** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5l4i0g64aqr56lihivuebcmfepp1r8d94vdvlc8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8otq669077nampcbg4jtelmp0nv7eps3p7c1flg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

**[2017-2019](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zalpfnjkc4u73s9c973u3gk4sej0s0oevkamj6j8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**

President Trump's success was legendary.

\- He built the wall and secured our southern border
\- He created the strongest economy in American history
\- He ensured our military was the strongest in the world
\- He brought manufacturing jobs back
\- And so much more! **But this email is already too long, so let 's move on.**
**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbdo0ktqmcffnibf5c8tv3ot8v0cq6gfmt1gebt8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf592vdo1t6vtg4gt2jdvs3jlsh4el8vvf7e8d8g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)
Then, on December 18th, 2019, the radical Democrats **IMPEACHED** President Trump for doing absolutely NOTHING. The Democrats thought this would be the end of him, _but the story was just beginning. . ._ **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgl2t0cvc02ge9l9iu30t1u8nei6kr137lrgqje0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z680q3lr428ak5oeqnk9bhuep3vdt763lmdqk9io_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

After the entire impeachment hoax was discredited and President Trump was VINDICATED, the 45th President wasted no time making our country great again. **2020 was off to a hot start until the COVID-19 pandemic hit.** President Trump never wavered and was the leader we needed during such a challenging time. **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0983fibaieesf3026l0vui89kj4gicgds779l6o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn4n4ml6428h38kqv88vior6mmp6p1aslft9aaf0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

The 2020 election went back and forth and it was clear that President Trump was the more popular candidate. The Democrats and the Deep State teamed up to continue to slander him. COVID changed all the voting rules (some would say in favor of the left), and despite a huge lead early on election night, **Joe Biden was named the presumptive nominee.** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqgbkfstg0s26hoaijqutir9b27i9cokt9kvhcig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7vd1adqv68vjgd0kt0s24dcq26cv80vajts2odo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

The entire country was angry with the election and the lack of transparency. **On January 6th,** President Trump gave a speech and said, _**" I know that everyone here will soon be marching over to the Capitol building to peacefully and patriotically make your voices heard."**_

Several Americans entered the Capitol with very little resistance even after President Trump asked for more security, **but Nancy Pelosi declined.**

Biden was officially inaugurated in January 2021, and the _country was terrified._ **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoft8qi20m932fp50uqgolg4r6lpeok79gijhme8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf94043ffq36dv52vj4o46po6s2n4v1jp8c90h68_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

"Joe Biden" was now in charge, and the destruction of our country began.

**The economy was destroyed, dangerous WARS sprung up throughout the world, crime rose in the cities, inflation soared, and America turned to one of the worst versions of itself.** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlkjh33bhv1apfjk8fmhns6ist5sc87s6a6hnnj8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8pv5hqutp0rgjatgom8u1hu5m1lb56uvkrhn2o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Fast forward to August 2022, **Donald J. Trump 's home in Mar-a-Lago was unconstitutionally RAIDED by the FBI** in search of classified documents. This was nothing more than a continuation of the neverending witch hunts brought on by the corrupt left.

This case was dismissed in July 2024. **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zva4c85rra2p76t4j7fnlqkgddjk1nknpmqp4510_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zii861ghev2fipf4feclndk87p1np5ti647f4m58_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

Donald J. Trump. Betrayed. Slandered. Lied to. Cheated. He had a decision to make: _Do I enjoy retirement with my family? Or do I save our country?_

Once again, **Donald J. Trump stood up to Save America by announcing his 2024 bid for President of the United States.** **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt591vkolpb4l892hv5i1p8eoj2h6jvbhjrb43b8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zap6a25mkbpqerh37tkj3m4fcpavko3undrljdn0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

The Democrats couldn't stand to see the outpouring of support for Donald J. Trump's presidential race, so they cooked up countless witch hunts. **He was indicted four times in 2023. **

New York. Georgia. Washington, DC. Florida.

Liberals thought this would keep him from saving America, but they were wrong. _Support for Donald J. Trump skyrocketed to levels NEVER seen before._ **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkglqs04irm3a706vhj5a32ha0prireav06pt4u0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuuv24f4e74uho0e8jum4p4om2idcr7vdnvkamn8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

The 2024 Republican Presidential Primaries rolled around and, as a surprise to absolutely no one, **Donald J. Trump overwhelmingly won state after state.**

It was only a matter of time before his opponents _and the Democrats_ realized that America wanted **four more years of Donald J. Trump.** Other candidates dropped out one by one. **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbsndvgfi8hp6a1jk6etjarlduaobkpvfkajpro8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1no8e7u80uhhu9ejnl0ivkba967uub9ghosj180_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)
It seemed like the witch hunts had reached a fever pitch, then the unthinkable happened.

A conviction. Making history, Donald J. Trump became the first former U.S. President convicted of felony crimes. To be clear, this was a **RIGGED** conviction and nothing more than a pathetic attempt to keep him off the ballot.

Democrats lied about him and called him a **" threat to democracy,"** **compared him to Hitler, and even said we need to put a "bullseye" on him.** The consequences were catastrophic. . . **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zskubt6328k9odtv8doc1lu9cdj64m15ufmkjcro_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z357aq114kqh91le0nm1rlbapctd5jc4dj05r130_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

We're not done yet. Just when you think there is no one and nothing else that could possibly come for Donald J. Trump, time froze around the world.

**_At approximately 6:11 PM ET, July 13, 2024, Donald J. Trump was shot during his rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, in a cowardly and FAILED assassination attempt._**

By a miraculous act of God, Donald J. Trump turned his head at the last second, and the bullet pierced his ear. He survived an assassination attempt. As Trump has always done, his first thought after a bullet nearly killed him was to jump up, let everyone know he was okay, and fire up the crowd with the words, **" Fight, Fight, Fight."** At this moment, Trump knew the fight to return America to glory was still only just beginning. **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsnnvje8l83o0je8sotf72jqrtjach07l0j7m4m0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z45p9co9n35r7bs9kd71r07q9oj8ughm000ednog_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)

**Against all odds, Donald J. Trump was confirmed as our 2024 Republican Presidential Nominee just days after the assassination attempt.**

Republicans from all over the country gathered in Milwaukee at the 2024 GOP Convention to unite behind Donald J. Trump and his effort to defeat Joe Biden and Make America Great Again. **[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7hi334v3b9o75n3g8b0f9pup6b9ngu2b3ce0k5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpjmeor6c9h2bs)**
---

* * *

Did you finish the story? Thank you. The story still has another chapter to be written on November 5th, 2024, and that story needs to end in VICTORY. But we can't do it without you, Friend.

name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eLnMdMxH33K5e9BoUQ5frA~~/AARclAA~/RgRomxdsP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QM01PMTk2VDA4MDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDgxMVcDc3BjQgpmq_19uGbgOyZ1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eLnMdMxH33K5e9BoUQ5frA~~/AARclAA~/RgRomxdsP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QM01PMTk2VDA4MDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDgxMVcDc3BjQgpmq_19uGbgOyZ1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eLnMdMxH33K5e9BoUQ5frA~~/AARclAA~/RgRomxdsP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QM01PMTk2VDA4MDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDgxMVcDc3BjQgpmq_19uGbgOyZ1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eLnMdMxH33K5e9BoUQ5frA~~/AARclAA~/RgRomxdsP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QM01PMTk2VDA4MDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDgxMVcDc3BjQgpmq_19uGbgOyZ1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eLnMdMxH33K5e9BoUQ5frA~~/AARclAA~/RgRomxdsP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QM01PMTk2VDA4MDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDgxMVcDc3BjQgpmq_19uGbgOyZ1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

body:
I have a big announcement to share with you.

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn83iae2roa6juhq2iv4u7j6hl0b4k4r74ifo1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
Friend,

I have a big announcement to share with you.

First, remember what we’re up against in the 2024 election:
* We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last.
* Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country.
* Uniparty politicians in D.C. don’t care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests.

Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it’s in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU.

Since I ended my presidential campaign, I’ve considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement:

**Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation._I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024_!**

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 before midnight and help Turning Point PAC fund ballot chasers?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv463iuigess16dcvqko9qtjjgqm7odsdqk2ts7g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)

The media continues to lie to us.

The justice system is politicized.

And America-last politicians in D.C. don’t care about it.

Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It’s not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024.

[Please join me in supporting Turning Point PAC with a donation of ANYTHING you can generously contribute today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztj4v4dppig2git6abknhc594oeth1ntm4t6mueg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zagth4f958gl2jkte6otn3gaoijttghdo9qlghjo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpbs85eqpdqd4bgg1j75j7uq951mjm4o81r7fd8g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo1hqic6755mb9nu8l35rkd64olsgcn8sf6au2r8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvanda8ndi7grlp3duinrg02pmr8441g8bsins7g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zno5ddvte5lag5hbdpmfjp8m2kivalpj27j56ong_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
[Donate ANY Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9m4hsvb7fs47d1237t1cjn0a2frjd0cil7d3mag_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)
The reality is it will require all of us to step up to win in November. It can be by volunteering your time for Get Out the Vote efforts. It can be by making sure your family votes. [Or, you can chip in $10 or more today and help us win in November.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcjl9lvrcf5vcks2ovpq8teles89k68rons1rdcg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cpge8pb6cph2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection

| | | [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0D-O3CAUgPHT4A4L3sP8KShGilxEmhRpUloY8AxZGyzAO9rbr-YGe4Hvk37_7svdpT3lxx93RFuPpbbFxaWfV3O0vipdS_lYgIGgTFPOFxyClQaU5kO0XAGiQqP48LRgmHaGY_Ay-G2SGlfhIXA5eQOAYUj23WGac2aEBDHybWNs81LEySDjhghW43mte_IuH-5_qal_jTn2YbfP3s9G8EZgJjC36K8aR5djKH305SAw96vmlB_0LCl3ejVHYMagXNxQU-FQURHlRJ3wmgqlhDC48qAmgnMrV_Vx8SVEgr_-3m-_J2RaD9WG85X2PTWpiGCPw6X9fRv6z6g-LXwHAAD__2nhbI0)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0D-O3CAUgPHT4A4L3sP8KShGilxEmhRpUloY8AxZGyzAO9rbr-YGe4Hvk37_7svdpT3lxx93RFuPpbbFxaWfV3O0vipdS_lYgIGgTFPOFxyClQaU5kO0XAGiQqP48LRgmHaGY_Ay-G2SGlfhIXA5eQOAYUj23WGac2aEBDHybWNs81LEySDjhghW43mte_IuH-5_qal_jTn2YbfP3s9G8EZgJjC36K8aR5djKH305SAw96vmlB_0LCl3ejVHYMagXNxQU-FQURHlRJ3wmgqlhDC48qAmgnMrV_Vx8SVEgr_-3m-_J2RaD9WG85X2PTWpiGCPw6X9fRv6z6g-LXwHAAD__2nhbI0)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0D-O3CAUgPHT4A4L3sP8KShGilxEmhRpUloY8AxZGyzAO9rbr-YGe4Hvk37_7svdpT3lxx93RFuPpbbFxaWfV3O0vipdS_lYgIGgTFPOFxyClQaU5kO0XAGiQqP48LRgmHaGY_Ay-G2SGlfhIXA5eQOAYUj23WGac2aEBDHybWNs81LEySDjhghW43mte_IuH-5_qal_jTn2YbfP3s9G8EZgJjC36K8aR5djKH305SAw96vmlB_0LCl3ejVHYMagXNxQU-FQURHlRJ3wmgqlhDC48qAmgnMrV_Vx8SVEgr_-3m-_J2RaD9WG85X2PTWpiGCPw6X9fRv6z6g-LXwHAAD__2nhbI0)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0D-O3CAUgPHT4A4L3sP8KShGilxEmhRpUloY8AxZGyzAO9rbr-YGe4Hvk37_7svdpT3lxx93RFuPpbbFxaWfV3O0vipdS_lYgIGgTFPOFxyClQaU5kO0XAGiQqP48LRgmHaGY_Ay-G2SGlfhIXA5eQOAYUj23WGac2aEBDHybWNs81LEySDjhghW43mte_IuH-5_qal_jTn2YbfP3s9G8EZgJjC36K8aR5djKH305SAw96vmlB_0LCl3ejVHYMagXNxQU-FQURHlRJ3wmgqlhDC48qAmgnMrV_Vx8SVEgr_-3m-_J2RaD9WG85X2PTWpiGCPw6X9fRv6z6g-LXwHAAD__2nhbI0)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0D-O3CAUgPHT4A4L3sP8KShGilxEmhRpUloY8AxZGyzAO9rbr-YGe4Hvk37_7svdpT3lxx93RFuPpbbFxaWfV3O0vipdS_lYgIGgTFPOFxyClQaU5kO0XAGiQqP48LRgmHaGY_Ay-G2SGlfhIXA5eQOAYUj23WGac2aEBDHybWNs81LEySDjhghW43mte_IuH-5_qal_jTn2YbfP3s9G8EZgJjC36K8aR5djKH305SAw96vmlB_0LCl3ejVHYMagXNxQU-FQURHlRJ3wmgqlhDC48qAmgnMrV_Vx8SVEgr_-3m-_J2RaD9WG85X2PTWpiGCPw6X9fRv6z6g-LXwHAAD__2nhbI0)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The Patriotic Roadmap I Wrote for You
body:
I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible--which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd06874c3fef497bbf3576297028710f&_e=E2mGgcgPNgBwWlr10DWo6DPRl_ZqGmOZ7P68yAsz5Qkq3C6vrMZttFr2xHjhGK5fAYpQEbUZxsptSPpBXLkWuBjhvm7U5ZerfJvzgDlVjXG-zSZl6wBm3_ADw1-A5f4oApnwFMJJ_zQ0hdK0X7Ne_NyNOGzjINmEm3xSTDLp9ZAVRZlc85Q1ZEMoNJ0mgolxy5kZBIeRNNnMOxCLXAveVtXQkr1JEWQqSRkFwXbDAecyhYKklVVYrYI0LOHZpQI5rdTmtFlg0Js_0DnhX2QPdCTJUtpACo-deOVuv7bgmLx6N9fQkMPk68Dr8BKVSdGl)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd06874c3fef497bbf3576297028710f&_e=E2mGgcgPNgBwWlr10DWo6DPRl_ZqGmOZ7P68yAsz5Qkq3C6vrMZttFr2xHjhGK5fAYpQEbUZxsptSPpBXLkWuBjhvm7U5ZerfJvzgDlVjXG-zSZl6wBm3_ADw1-A5f4oApnwFMJJ_zQ0hdK0X7Ne_DnlbBLEES4D12df2njE0lpp78Jln2lxBkQOfZ4al2caMY_NRizuXXteQ6pImIPesXM_ZFiuxxehJRyWqm1eflf0lWiXZwJr-p8rLCrhpQDbmXFkvIrLtwLIKDqfOCaD7sfn3eJTgfoeFfHhCVc1L7qRXL04fFIFfii5YPbtz_GE)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd06874c3fef497bbf3576297028710f&_e=E2mGgcgPNgBwWlr10DWo6DPRl_ZqGmOZ7P68yAsz5Qkq3C6vrMZttFr2xHjhGK5fAYpQEbUZxsptSPpBXLkWuBjhvm7U5ZerfJvzgDlVjXG-zSZl6wBm3_ADw1-A5f4oApnwFMJJ_zQ0hdK0X7Ne_NQpEZqaKIIJBihKj3EmlcvL7kliOvA4j9V5eTAah5dr2jYTB8JuXRt4u9bkI2TJ06fXv_v2bIiz3jAwglMqMQKXq6hZsb3ebSYVOEhDB9i5MdDXN-Em4wdFuMYghBGE3Eo0XOuZjtgE6QfHYq1UuFoy1g9u_9VDj03ubbh0MhgC)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd06874c3fef497bbf3576297028710f&_e=E2mGgcgPNgBwWlr10DWo6DPRl_ZqGmOZ7P68yAsz5Qkq3C6vrMZttFr2xHjhGK5fAYpQEbUZxsptSPpBXLkWuBjhvm7U5ZerfJvzgDlVjXG-zSZl6wBm3_ADw1-A5f4oApnwFMJJ_zQ0hdK0X7Ne_I45w9lmYJZQUHNXQJ75yyvow9SjG6gNIywqdfxevUV7T4k29HOAqXX-7WB-5ZicrbCexJBVK-UuSYi-GURw9lw-tnfPXv1BbHFtu4h2OwayUF9VB5Ig8JForHhcUwAf--7B6rctcvu5ksUYPjTJSfxFbkqyxZ70zwIZxHUSv7La)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd06874c3fef497bbf3576297028710f&_e=E2mGgcgPNgBwWlr10DWo6DPRl_ZqGmOZ7P68yAsz5Qkq3C6vrMZttFr2xHjhGK5fAYpQEbUZxsptSPpBXLkWuBjhvm7U5ZerfJvzgDlVjXG-zSZl6wBm3_ADw1-A5f4oApnwFMJJ_zQ0hdK0X7Ne_C0UV42O80XH3mHv9OrlIBcrIv9miY7ZV5wqSiwZrGDSFxGll3KCQPFR-sos14c2qkcUhUFW4vVcSgjH4o0FIyDxH2w7s3c2knG1WQ6f8dmAPj1wxQzJDTl4xu-OcLflHzVFcjxl5D8Zil5smPWX_nZOMUYTLrCIfYFJPWI4D8Eb)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

body:

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bea346bfe6e4cac8fbc0490509df658&_e=4P0TqPoEyP2u5infZvSOKX4YjLxWx9ynAQFQld-qfX5LCi-MtPZat3iMIjXg-96vaoPBF6bA_Tm1umKZTdPrcuk8yoExZwBUsY7C1_0lDt51ueaFL2wpcHhpu22Fv5bGxJ8SzRLy-V4FNMpzbeMZ8foCED7DUbFYxafZwKMiO5xHph2wwjm02R0DKAUcuI9v-qNa4HgKH-S4HNOjfnV7CaNW4VNSsvJ7AXm7HvtcyFE03ZpECrv9MJDntc69q9iyEkSivuKJ5DxVZ3jmNebnOirSS_ePPuz94HYSvpmAnholHj1wqoA6a7CvTDwca1df) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bea346bfe6e4cac8fbc0490509df658&_e=4P0TqPoEyP2u5infZvSOKX4YjLxWx9ynAQFQld-qfX5LCi-MtPZat3iMIjXg-96vaoPBF6bA_Tm1umKZTdPrcuk8yoExZwBUsY7C1_0lDt51ueaFL2wpcHhpu22Fv5bGxJ8SzRLy-V4FNMpzbeMZ8QFi9bcTg301NLfI6_YCJJQsCzGXyMVKfZuanMx3DpROvw4zs8arVLZC9j-9lU14s-_rcpY-uIu-SC_gExCjEFsNb89XypdHt_8v3F5jonvNj3nuDTrl9nqOZdkkxvWpbuoGTTIw0XOB_tpP34YevPh1lOw74z1BQiwtaaDzvQeg)

clean_body: With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! -- 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: The Flyover
subject: The Gold Medal Rush, Famous Landmark Collapses, and the Olympics' Most Dangerous Job
body:
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1948 the [first Olympic Games](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuhSAUQL8GNg1cLoIDQxe317Wj4elFb4NilNi8v2_apUvXc5KTnI_H-IiceV_e40ahpjLGqfJNo2-0bgBHlHNIREBGUtAOjPHQg5VrAEpotcMJeqPRu2f3dNGSiWh7F10nOYACVF5rrZQ1fau0VzZNhNahT6YTqGjmWs72s_BeV0r5VW4626lsMoe11uMS5k3AIGAo-bUdPF0_UsBA-x9rlrjRJWDIZZ_L3ugevTzDfHxxznx1TqBatsj5N1z_37wDfAcAAP__ypVTEw) after the 1938 Berlin Olympics opened in London, ending the hiatus resulting from World War II.

# SUNDAY, AUGUST 11, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1948, the [first Olympic Games](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuhSAUQL8GNg1cLoIDQxe317Wj4elFb4NilNi8v2_apUvXc5KTnI_H-IiceV_e40ahpjLGqfJNo2-0bgBHlHNIREBGUtAOjPHQg5VrAEpotcMJeqPRu2f3dNGSiWh7F10nOYACVF5rrZQ1fau0VzZNhNahT6YTqGjmWs72s_BeV0r5VW4626lsMoe11uMS5k3AIGAo-bUdPF0_UsBA-x9rlrjRJWDIZZ_L3ugevTzDfHxxznx1TqBatsj5N1z_37wDfAcAAP__ypVTEw) since the 1938 Berlin Olympics opened in London, ending the hiatus resulting from World War II. Today, the 2024 Paris Olympics come to a close, having offered a slightly higher number of events than the 1948 Games--just shy of 200 more! We hope you enjoy reading today's _Flyover._ Let us know how we're doing by replying to this email. Today's edition is brought to you by [One Skin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOxSAUANCvge01lwsUGBgc7OTTxEHj1FB6eUVpeWlJjX9v4uwHnOG8X8dryCVvt-ewkm-pjiG2fNJoL0JcUI2Kzz4RIUlOXhiU0qJDzRc_TTE4xOQgzQ4ghN6ZqBGNQDGRNjx7BFRghRAAWroOhAWdIiltlE2yZwpozq3u3WfNW1solZ960t7FuvLil9buB5MPDAeGQ93o-MpbFyvDYXj6eHl7fOW7n-_fuZR89IYpuK0hlz_d_r-cHn8DAAD__6PfSf4). Check out their products that can help protect skin from UV rays this summer!
|
---
## Israel Strikes Gaza City Target
An Israeli airstrike in Gaza has reportedly [killed at least 100 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAUheGnwR0WXDAmBcU27rLtlhaGS3w3xESAYmWefpSppzvS1xz9_67r1VOm4_bXP9D1VFYfOr1wtVxKDnrVQ3QJEVAN6OQMSlm4wDTszkSvN4Q5IW4mKJBazzZYr2O0yW5pIAcCtLBSSiEmdRmFtGJKAfU0a5uUYVpgpF7q-L_Q0XdM-V1eWMdQHkN2e-_PxtQfBguD5TzP8djCgWf7OIPlMz9Qao4MlhZKxcbvlDNGTq16JN56pTvy7jfEg7ewl5L5zX95Hqi_eQ2Hl8YIcxmqi8-TcqZmZqbF7eEp_xzpv2d5OfgOAAD__wLlZnE), according to Palestinian authorities. Israel says it killed 19 militants and that Hamas is exaggerating the civilian death toll. The target was a school repurposed as a shelter for displaced Palestinians, but according to Israeli officials, it also held a command room for senior Hamas leaders. The Biden administration said it was "[deeply concerned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuSpCAUgOGn0exY3LwFBJuY9aYbWjQc9OwiWEBr9T79VE88-R_89f15rA9DgeL22xyoq0-rsZUuXCfgHIRaVeu0RxQoW9R8FFJOYhZ9u2ul2DB674TEmQ2My1ngzKwaHe_N5GxLWjCh2MQ5Z6yXc8f4xHpvUfWjmrwcGsXQUU25-5so1h19eKcLc2fT0Qa913qWRv5qxNKI5b7vrtKBJXkq2WD4VI1YAl34DGlbMdb8_oQ7VYQ9vQqCQzzDG2yKFnNEB-aZXhUsXRTIRLCmvEyohAUoAjkPpWb6h5AiVMw5ZUgnZvMhKWAqbOa_gWL3lEIjljZrd94UApVhbBTbDkPfX2392fLS4isAAP__pq17LQ)" about civilian casualties. A [fresh round of ceasefire talks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L3unDAQBPCngW7Rem2-Chdp6P5pUyILr2FzBp9s51Dy9BGpU85M89P8-Fq_nES59u_uZFtDWt1W5cPrBEoBmdW03gZmYt2yVSNpPdFMfXtY5RCDDzygGsiNRg0q0KS3XjOSnudWLCEZnJRSiL2eO1QT9mFj049mCnpoDLKXmnL3M8lVDw7xd_pw7rZ0ttEetb5Lo781tDS03PfdZf5VOZdnf5qUo29oOcX7yMCu1CelzFAPd4FChLeLXKpc4q4CL4mRPUjJjqNAqVleDNXlnSt7KNuRUoTd_XHwyAEnUNjQ0mbr37fEKGUYG4P76ST-Q9b_X_ax9DcAAP__Jw5trw) is set to begin Thursday.
## Former YouTube CEO Dies at 56
Prominent businesswoman [Susan Wojcicki died Friday at 56](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8Gd0S7C7ZxQfEaurz2SovgJSGHTWRwovz9KVdfPdJoNF_n-exTTtv1v1_ZtlhmH1p68mwkoiQ9626xkZlYdWxxJKUMTdR3NzugvxjFo5kuMSwQvFceejMgqoknnLpkCUiDQUSAXk0nQAN9DKz7UZuoBqGBl9TKfrqXtLUbx_wuT95PoaxdtrfWHlWof4KcILe9H6W2DxLkPmJBDowghyDIHVVu_KqCXCz7yrt8l6MdF5aBi6xH9Zt8lXtI4TvJhf0ifZP9IMh1u10er5RzqsMoNFxXn_JvQPt7x9PSTwAAAP__wQVfzQ) after two years of battling lung cancer. Wojcicki was the [former CEO of YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsWXCDBA0MXb-na0SJwsUmxiQDH8ttXqTp2Pmf49H_dppuNKW7zp13RtJAn61p84aQp5xTkJDtvAiKg6NDwKwihYQDVLUYNTN8tyuAvgXOEAYVmHlxQXnEuVBcNMJBMc84ZU2LoGddMBYdSXaUO4kIkQx9bLv0jx60tGNKZX1h6l9cumaW1ZyXig8BIYDyOoy-4Nyz1vRMY73uNG9ZKYAy5rFjomfe235E6zLTu1W70yA8X3Xeki63UR_R0znlOfxd7Vvo2UqYpZwTGrhj_PGJKsV6uRLJ5tTH9ctr_cV4GfgIAAP__qctm1w) as well as an executive at Google, having joined the company in 1999 as one of its first few employees. She was named one of Time's 100 Most Influential People in 2014. Wojcicki's son, Marco Troper, [died in February](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOwyAQBNCvwd1GsMaxU1Bc4y7XXmkRWGISzEYGJ_Lfn3z11TN6Gs3PdbramGK-f9uFTA08WVfjm6YBlALUk268CURIbUNG9di2A16wa2ZjyXt96dHqPjjSUnd66CQp1L5XNmATDUrUclBKSdm1l5NUg-yObtfrIbRnoSX5WHk9PTjmOlNIO79pPTlemmTmWl9FtF8CR4Fj3l9c6hEJHA9Y4ChR4Kh6geNWINOnCBx33up2I3DEULZiM3z44aJ7xgKFMwTesgdP1kPMsDm40fqkRDt4XhcobmZOwCFEF206xGY1_vWJKcVy7oWW98XG9Lex_v_Y2-BvAAAA__9nJG2p) after a drug overdose in his UC Berkeley dorm room. Husband Dennis Troper called Wojcicki "a brilliant mind, a loving mother, and a dear friend to many."
## Utah's Double Arch Collapses
The iconic Double Arch rock formation at Glen Canyon in Utah [collapsed this week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAUheGn0Q4HLqhQUKSx27QpnbtwXUlYcJDo7ttnsk2alGfmK878H5f5giGGdHvHO9m65BldDQfNmgnBQM2q9XYhApItWTGClBoM9O1qeyOHnhuP5LXzgxIIcoQrGMWlMEa3wQIHxbUQgvNemo4LzfvFkepHpRc5NIqTDzWX7jOHVFda4jMfVDqX7220a63b3si3BqYGpvM8uyU_BN_WTCk8flEDU6Jzb2Dy-fsaiWFxK7tFSsxheubEEtaQE0ZWyBV6DYaFkK24M5djxG0n_8c2LF9sp3IER22xfjtDjGEfxkbx2x1DfH2r_5c6LPwEAAD__-2SbW4), according to the National Park Service. A frequently-visited site, the Navajo sandstone feature was also known as the "Toilet Bowl," "Crescent Pool," and "Hole in the Roof." Park rangers are pointing to [changing water levels and erosion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOhCAQxvGnwU4zDKBsQXGN3V57pWHHUbmwsgFcc29_8eprv_yTX_J93ae7DzHs66d_sqtLmjzV8ObJtlK2qCfdzG5hRlYNOzmgUhZvaJrNsTQ99YqsAUAzEzysBkPKDD1JwkcTHAJqsFJKAKNuHUgLZiHWZtB2Ub3QwHOoKXffKex14yX-pDfnjtKziW6r9VWE-hA4ChzP8-zqxuvh8xz8fjUCx6O0O59F4OhzDRRZ4Hip13CsAkcJV1X91s7peERufaatpRSjfxUuTXbz6wwxhtIPQsP69CH--fX_N94OfwMAAP__jGZgSQ) from waves in Lake Powell as contributors to the collapse. [No injuries](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPtCAUAH8Ndhh4oGJB8TV2-7VXGnw-lAvCRljN_vvLXn3dJNNM5usxP1yIIW3_3UG2-jw7rOGi2XApOehZN6v1RECqISsHUMrACF2z2xUNDnJckMCN0vfY9aiHRateG6OXpQkWBGhhpJRCdGpshTSi80i6G7Txqmda0BpqPtvvHFLdycd3vuhsMR9NtHutz8LUPwYTg-m-7xaXkuguH89g-iCD6VXdztf8WiJxd-LON8oxbwFd5D6fh6shJ445RvcsVPgWKXF06Z0Tg6k57fq8Q4yh9APTYjtciL8B9e8dl4WfAAAA__-JNWPv) were reported.

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: The people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-viArgz6DbjBjFCxA)
---
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger._GK9yk2gsMSo5_17mqOFHA)Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](http://trk.libertyledger.) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of mid century liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to reveal the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](http://trk.libertyledger.-LBL5WM8YDfcsA)

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_e=nxknkWePPAGdIaUicfgy2SXCjWoFJMv_EntrZLglFXvE5ioa_Eocjfb3TCcfWgQ9VmGOU1q38qAcW9jFk1ZGCGQvJsCkfcPL3naGyKUCxwE-bxGUvN1T83VGmfKiLTJLTwJVYByotQ_ArrCHtpQwMlbYATxy9emXM2JdO1iVMhtgvTglJRwk-wqp4DSSBqQRv43A_LARSPXfW67-yv_tzs8lfAnVFmX2n_US93yHl0lGdq3vq93ZuHcdJu410Y1yNfmkpTmLmlfrHsRCM3JFAaURV3Bm6-3pHK3DrTqEaukRn9DL8rRhl6DVKUSbJ35C), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_e=nxknkWePPAGdIaUicfgy2SXCjWoFJMv_EntrZLglFXvE5ioa_Eocjfb3TCcfWgQ9VmGOU1q38qAcW9jFk1ZGCGQvJsCkfcPL3naGyKUCxwE-bxGUvN1T83VGmfKiLTJLTwJVYByotQ_ArrCHtpQwMiY2-UxSpv9M2IydpPUXzx9Hkq0_XXf5WlGfQWvl81LLZCu75RewtdM4Q8Q91gx4BpD5d9M7IGOg4ogAzGA5h88yEiuk7uCpx6KO36yqKMWfs-Gyab3FQSrZD981pVMg4fz2W7wil1loEAZFXjsXIJwsHfaZxmgpoP-ChuZIgM9q) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_e=nxknkWePPAGdIaUicfgy2SXCjWoFJMv_EntrZLglFXvE5ioa_Eocjfb3TCcfWgQ9VmGOU1q38qAcW9jFk1ZGCGQvJsCkfcPL3naGyKUCxwE-bxGUvN1T83VGmfKiLTJLTwJVYByotQ_ArrCHtpQwMlCUpT8ynYGGV7euuTeuMsUBFECpx4hqZ9b0qETxiDuOxLX5QOChUu2ry6U7lQiS9laYDEZiKcGww1oRb2Ou949fHMXs06J7jwzhC1dSzFN4J1ei8vEmqLnTIRnhBn7gopnPPkdpGqNxCP--g-9LH6tn2fFLHOvzYFx1qoOI9w-G) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_e=nxknkWePPAGdIaUicfgy2SXCjWoFJMv_EntrZLglFXvE5ioa_Eocjfb3TCcfWgQ9VmGOU1q38qAcW9jFk1ZGCGQvJsCkfcPL3naGyKUCxwE-bxGUvN1T83VGmfKiLTJLTwJVYByotQ_ArrCHtpQwMoFmSDsoInaMS8DDtZGSHObkqxHRUFyyRC3ncVGu82z3iue7pML-BZbgLZGs6Ro9NySjWO0i73cQBM8ysE05Q9jyxMVUHenFQoVzj91MFzOf3vW5iTslGgTWbNUwhQj9gduC9hKu4SaavsOWquKQHVBCHKr1jxjSObinCCxozyeo) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_e=nxknkWePPAGdIaUicfgy2SXCjWoFJMv_EntrZLglFXvE5ioa_Eocjfb3TCcfWgQ9VmGOU1q38qAcW9jFk1ZGCGQvJsCkfcPL3naGyKUCxwE-bxGUvN1T83VGmfKiLTJLTwJVYByotQ_ArrCHtpQwMnJr5Vtws0_QDsd6zl3l3KyhBB7yZ_1FrHzpP5AUB0u0gz93woBtAb7hZ9wZUfCIvU7MUmHCSwV1mhFaKT_fEGCnCKcJU1TfkrUwnIdjVpfoMYWlsNzVU2qPougQ6Fn3JvJX2-Z96Y091EFmSDeXW_wtN82IdWkTCOA0lOfQFjND)
---

Defend the Constitution
---

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=750b9c2cf92b48c58a175946837c3aae&_t=-E24cqxMiFjnCcQe81V0MZmcqopgVpz_yABUP6V5u0D1qTCC4dfZGGlZlx_qLZslDDWxKKJkxQbTsXY6LNsDS1PQRosF4TLbKe6hnBK1_55SmBhcbkAm_mjk2jnrEsjxkrraUtjNhkBeAX7RkHjF0FsiEe1zyEnlNyBnWJs_MAU%3D)

body:

**[THE STORY OF DONALD J. TRUMP](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l3vLL4JjSmp2Vqo0S2ISgg~~/AARclAA~/RgRomzE0P0T3aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaXBhYy9zdG9yeS1vZi1kb25hbGQtai10cnVtcC1wYS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbF9wcnNwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cnNfcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzIzX3N0b3J5LW9mLWRvbmFsZC1qLXRydW1wX25hX2NsaWVudGluaXRpYWxzaGVyZSZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OMi0yMDI0MDgxMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb25hdGVfY3B5cnNfbmEmYW10cG9zaXRpb249MVcDc3BjQgpmq-OWuGa6rhZ5UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

We can't tell you how much it means that you opened this email. Did you know that only about _22% of Americans_ open these messages? Thank you for joining us.

Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75d93709350b47198f1109471827629c&_e=cRLImWo3XbR-KfZHXXg0zX6y4oJEAOKVuqCYea0dC-9kFO18ZoMg5Iy_fsu3taNo3TxhqUP_ysMYuC9ISY7UCA9fppoFWPPfMnJNgWWtYyjtiZh5YGbZv29zob7eF4fzt4p8ri9s-v4pfAmQwr4SSMYXQ-Z2EF847DnD0eVDpchcfxOvLsXo-hOtputEZEXhMisrGLTGLOvaWeIAlSCSHZ-ptay1TskMWITaYqsuc4IvlVNX0hRW9OUcwL9unH-XXNpk_WAXsYi_XTQZ9jAMxwEBtHoawJgrM8LRpvWDWNqn5n20CDxcX0mIh41VGahd)_

All week, I’ve been hearing about how Republicans have been hitting Montana with wave after wave of attacks against Jon Tester. And now, I see that polls are tightening?! WHAT IS GOING ON?! Ryan, if Jon loses, we won’t have a Democratic Senate. Hell, we might not even have a democracy if we let Mitch McConnell’s cronies take charge. We gotta win this race, no ifs, ands, or buts about it. Jon’s team tells me they need to raise another $27,196 before midnight. They won’t get there without your help. [I can’t push the donate button for ya, but I’m begging: Make a split donation to Jon’s campaign, whatever you can afford, TODAY >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T818186e9-23c0-47e9-af75-c618095255ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
Kamala Harris is allowing noncitizens to be registered to vote

|
---
| | Hey Friend,

The SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections, but Senate Democrats BLOCKED it from passing.

The only reason they opposed it is because they want non-citizens to vote, and influence the outcome of our elections, which is extremely likely now that the 'Border Czar' Kamala Harris is in the running for President.

This is a major threat to our republic, and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections.**[It's not dead YET.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaf7a3839e64a31af432913cfc61d5a&_e=p50P5p8btjQj2Ph2EPQnSiGXHHB_XOY8_HgFPReHE6E6lBf1IXTMRMkm4tXokvqYLq11-JKQc3H7ESxicZec9JO9SbV1NwU5vw0P4lHaqZ_upg-zKGLZxw3tfaIQr24S3w4u54O4fSe2GTjk12gfKvtiicybrn1p3WINYiAVqnaLlLMR8EZoGgWUgeJv0sLap2sz9T8c75OhxwMZCz_nxo26ozg0pEBNqmRKgfs_X-Ld_ANRo7RZQUQ04mh6udgF2BlxUgWsN86eAbm2lLL8RA%3D%3D)**

If Republicans in Congress force passage of the SAVE Act, ensuring that noncitizens won't be able to vote in federal elections, by attaching it to the next continuing resolution, which must be passed by September 30th to avoid a shutdown - it can still become law.

[So, if everyone reading this email today chips in EVEN JUST $1 right now, our teams will have the resources we need to get the SAVE Act PASSED.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaf7a3839e64a31af432913cfc61d5a&_e=p50P5p8btjQj2Ph2EPQnSiGXHHB_XOY8_HgFPReHE6E6lBf1IXTMRMkm4tXokvqYLq11-JKQc3H7ESxicZec9JO9SbV1NwU5vw0P4lHaqZ_upg-zKGLZxw3tfaIQr24SVGL7U4r2GmzxF8W2otxybAiKFsqIhVH8Ht0c6VyxE80BxvxcYG15efgCd-NRX_SGtpeEFuF-WRYpqTCOmk7ZoK-Xw7oQhllyMt94sAInfCJs2lbyPTBCEHVIl_V-sNEQ4IYO2wtPs0Do3nsyBFeQkQ%3D%3D)

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> August 11, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-jG_B1jebXbw)
---
| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[BEYOND TROUBLING: Ted Cruz Calls Out FDA for Putting'Radical Gender Ideology' Over The 'Safety Of Children':](http://trk.tedcruz.-9nSzj3WQoDuYywXijh-Tw)** "Sen. Ted Cruz condemned the U.S. Food and Drug Administration following news that an FDA team leader urged the approval of so-called puberty blockers for "transgender" minors, even while she acknowledged that these drugs are associated with an increased risk of suicide, depression, and seizures. "These emails are beyond troubling," Cruz, a Republican from Texas, told The Daily Signal in a written statement Monday. "The Biden-Harris administration has consistently put its radical gender ideology over the safety of..." **[CRUZ: Socialist Group Celebrates Walz Because He's 'Proud' To Support 'Radical' Antisemites:](http://trk.tedcruz.-wVd2Nffr-aRnXXcWHmA)** "Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz said the Democratic Socialists of America celebrated Gov. Tim Walz as Vice President Kamala Harris' running mate because the Minnesota Democrat is "proud" to stand with "radical" antisemites and leftists. "There's a reason the Democratic Socialists are celebrating him," Cruz said on his podcast "Verdict" Wednesday. "There's a reason, within minutes of his being announced as VP, you know who tweeted out a tweet praising it? Ilhan Omar, with a picture of her next to him, saying what a fantastic choice this..." **[Cruz Warns Biden's Plan To 'Reform' The Supreme Court Is About Destroying It:](http://trk.tedcruz.-dUWjJlpyXvFOQ)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) warned this week that President Joe Biden's plan to "reform" the U.S. Supreme Court was code for his intent to "destroy" the court because it is the one major government institution that the political Left does not currently control. Cruz made the remarks during his most recent episode of "Verdict" with co-host Ben Ferguson while talking about Biden's Oval Office address on Wednesday evening. In his speech, Biden, 81, said that for the remainder of his time in office, he would "call for Supreme Court reform because this is critical to our democracy..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Ted Cruz Makes Push To Stop Big Tech From Canceling Conservatives:](http://trk.tedcruz.-xI57RJ1wqWHBg)** "Months after exposing how online service providers had become a "secret tool" to censor conservatives, Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) unveiled legislation that would combat politically motivated censorship carried out by tech companies through "discriminatory terms of service policies." name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Concerning new reports uncover Harris VP’s major China connections
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 11, 2024

Concerning new
reports uncover Harris VP's major China connections
The
Radical Left is always putting other countries before America.
But these recent discoveries highlight how bad things are.

And concerning new reports have
uncovered Harris VP's major China connections.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

White House backdoor
censorship scheme exposed in this bombshell report

Kamala and Joe are
cooking up something terrifying. But their plans may unravel
before they've reached their full potential.
➞ Continue Reading

Jack Smith throws a
curveball at Trump in court that is sending 2024 into question

Trump is still gummed
up with legal witch hunts. It's the only card the Left has to
play.
➞ Continue Reading

Shocking discovery from
wife of Harris' VP pick makes many Americans think twice

Ever since it was
revealed that Tim Walz would be the VP pick for Harris, Americans
have been looking into the family's past. And people are very
concerned by what they have seen.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

|

I can't believe what I'm hearing.
**Democrats are willing to let illegals vote in elections!**

_This should be a crime!_

Republicans are doing all they can to BAN illegals from voting, but Democrats have some dirty tricks up their sleeves.

**[Will you PLEASE sign our House GOP petition to stop non-citizens from voting?](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkb1u5SAQhZ8Gd1jMYGNv4SJSZGmLrCJtsSUigH0nMmABvjf79itWSpUm9XznZ3T-vOgXQwfF_ZcJfqFSdC663nXM1vLwzh-3v_yRrsNpFDhwMXMADZ1bRoR5mzu_wIRSzjgI6G6LlYNz0m_zqPzk_IYwWIdW2OHtBwixdbQ0HzEDAApA7KfNSLMpUIN6s6PZ2CCu05nqe4qFnC82pfNMB1WypU95747lVutZmHxiuDJci7dX9v2DYvautykwXFt9hut7usWSIvfEg2m0XE2oZypUKUUmnyVDlZs-U9yZfK758gzVVYO2JpyG9kZ9VtavT_zn71fsAaSSUlcYccZZ8XFqRv5DV3Lf5_-npFh9rC36zqkU_qllqD6ueP966PLizgcdBxU1sUHswdDR3u7q9_e7L_gvAAD__4-zm6w "Will you PLEASE sign our House GOP petition to stop non-citizens from voting?")**

**However, there's something even Trump doesn't want you to know:**
With your help, we CAN fully fund our program to bolster President Biden's efforts. This is more than just a political battle; it’s a fight for our values, our rights, and the very soul of our nation.
Imagine this: [_**Your $3 donation today could be the push we need to CRUSH Trump in the upcoming election.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90606816/491081122/-126978672?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240811_2_1_Trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZTc2MjgzLWQ5NTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Mqfdu3Nvm7K4FMPdaFYcOfuCnXHoO5Qyi8kZwdquod4=) We must deliver the pro-choice Joe Biden requires to enact his transformative agenda.

clean_body: it’s Jon Tester Hey there, it’s Jon Tester. = = 1\. Political experts rank this race a toss-up , which means your gift will have a huge impact on our ability to raise the resources we need to win. 2\. Tim Sheehy is wrong for Montana. He wants to privatize health care, sell off our public lands, and would support a national abortion ban. 3\. Mitch McConnell is desperate to beat me. He named me one of his top targets, and outside groups are spending millions to pummel me with attacks. 4\. Their attacks are working. The polls have tightened into a statistical tie, and this race couldn’t be any closer—your $7 will help us pull ahead. 5\. I won my first Senate race by just 3,562 votes... and this election could be even closer. 6\. We’re less than 100 days out from Election Day, and we’re falling behind in our fundraising. If we can’t afford to keep our ads up, our opponent’s attacks will drown us out. 7\. We can’t win without you. If every person reading this chipped in $7, we’d have the resources we need to overcome the attacks, break our tie in the polls, and win this race. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. made a promise to you and me.
RFK Jr. is willing to do whatever it takes to build a bridge to both sides. Can Trump and Harris make the same promise to the American people?
Dear Peter,
We can unite this country.
Our mission to achieve unity is not some poll-tested, survey-driven message. **It is at the heart of RFK Jr.’s campaign.**
Why? Because division has paralyzed Congress, so that it is unable to enact commonsense solutions to basic problems. Instead, wealthy corporate interests set the agenda while everyone is distracted by divisive culture war issues.
The hatred between the Democrats and Republicans is tearing the country apart. Yet, most Americans are not hateful at all.
That is why we need an Independent President, willing to build a Unity Government as did President George Washington, to bring the two sides together and pass common sense legislation.
[Yet, this dream of unity will not be possible without your help today. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=promise_8_10_rs_nd1&n=3)

body:
This is the honest truth about Sam Brown.| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=241aa1268447428192aaa1b07394ae42&_e=-68NN9wndufh5Q3mJTLAOPsbVyRAYthn9suMYt0iZbrRHOAsb8paONU0zqnY_YZatsjYJwmsCr4xxYNiZUimw44TU79qGAZezgxU5MRuMstp3fPDFCnFrbc7iuqUh5vZmdOQlfJ2_k3Me2lw0pfOzV1PpAZctjjMukcAJh0hlfjdM4flY7VtBWkkYR22KNnIzpSAbYMpnbGMqc5aC3Yn0lxoFr6W3dFmOipRPYb5OjvJFgWiPgJ6YMp3M71QcKp72r4_WGznF5QuuWC0l2HB6klA5sduLjXLQ-E_HLk3pIIW1Q382ZgtKTS9HCc8EEdrF1zp5czDUrt6-dx729AxFGU379nraZTZRlayBJIVbmScK4JUMrzSW60UMwNeyVQujeWUAS8GETB1C0GEUaR4Uuek0x7MqjuyEM3HsO3bCifjyuCDxbb4FYMhdJ045zujixBRqlDDG2EmVfA6_hsQ1g%3D%3D)

America gave him a Purple Heart and I gave him my whole heart.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=241aa1268447428192aaa1b07394ae42&_e=-68NN9wndufh5Q3mJTLAOPsbVyRAYthn9suMYt0iZbrRHOAsb8paONU0zqnY_YZatsjYJwmsCr4xxYNiZUimw44TU79qGAZezgxU5MRuMstp3fPDFCnFrbc7iuqUh5vZmdOQlfJ2_k3Me2lw0pfOzV1PpAZctjjMukcAJh0hlfjdM4flY7VtBWkkYR22KNnIzpSAbYMpnbGMqc5aC3Yn0lxoFr6W3dFmOipRPYb5OjvJFgWiPgJ6YMp3M71QcKp72r4_WGznF5QuuWC0l2HB6klA5sduLjXLQ-E_HLk3pIIW1Q382ZgtKTS9HCc8EEdr21T5EFM5E846iPIRZNDFeGUw8KSSevSrEJXtEONWE6IGx_GfcwhQDl8dbAVi2GS4GoVRQCA0SraPTERi8Qk-CWZj42Y78g6kX_Oiqf_aGkokwX7BGXVAbR6MdTAiKButidlGA2adiVMQyF3Dhs_Wdw%3D%3D)
---
I first met Sam Brown in the burn unit. He'd just returned from Afghanistan where he and his soldiers were ambushed by the Taliban. He was injured by a roadside bomb and had a long road to recovery. I was assigned as his dietitian in rehab and was very impressed by him. Here was a young man terribly injured while serving his country, but his heart was full of faith. He fought with every fiber of his being to recover so he could return to serve with his men in Afghanistan. And even when it became clear that he would never be permitted to return to the line of duty on account of his injuries, he didn't skip a beat. Sam had to relearn everything. He had prepared for his entire life to spend his career fighting for his country in the military. After his life plans were dashed in just 60 seconds, he re-focused his vision on serving others in a new way. Before we were married, and before we were even dating, Sam and I became friends. I shared with him some of the struggles I had faced, and he was honest with me. He was concerned for my Salvation – and for that matter so was I. He challenged me to reconnect with God and start going to church again. As he and I grew closer, he helped me rediscover my faith. Now here we are 15 years later. We have 3 kids, I'm a Bible-believing momma, and Sam is running for Senate to keep serving our nation and restore hope, leadership, and accountability. I'm endlessly grateful that God put him in my life. Sam is a warrior, a hero, a leader. _**[I'm backing this Purple Heart veteran all the way and I hope you will too.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=241aa1268447428192aaa1b07394ae42&_e=-68NN9wndufh5Q3mJTLAOPsbVyRAYthn9suMYt0iZbrRHOAsb8paONU0zqnY_YZatsjYJwmsCr4xxYNiZUimw44TU79qGAZezgxU5MRuMstp3fPDFCnFrbc7iuqUh5vZmdOQlfJ2_k3Me2lw0pfOzV1PpAZctjjMukcAJh0hlfjdM4flY7VtBWkkYR22KNnIzpSAbYMpnbGMqc5aC3Yn0lxoFr6W3dFmOipRPYb5OjvJFgWiPgJ6YMp3M71QcKp72r4_WGznF5QuuWC0l2HB6klA5sduLjXLQ-E_HLk3pIIW1Q382ZgtKTS9HCc8EEdrdju1af_cHBfnkKrRbuClpa1y4LqyfBoOnFraR9kXBbgiA1A7xB1PegA_ASdV8J9ZrT0ke5N9pWJouA_tQmC7B4_GP6-MUgAIb1RcjOJFcqBLaLefnbiiPubQAzsUSmT0M_MVXoVQPMvgbQFG3774pw%3D%3D)**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=241aa1268447428192aaa1b07394ae42&_e=-68NN9wndufh5Q3mJTLAOPsbVyRAYthn9suMYt0iZbrRHOAsb8paONU0zqnY_YZatsjYJwmsCr4xxYNiZUimw44TU79qGAZezgxU5MRuMstp3fPDFCnFrbc7iuqUh5vZmdOQlfJ2_k3Me2lw0pfOzV1PpAZctjjMukcAJh0hlfjdM4flY7VtBWkkYR22KNnIzpSAbYMpnbGMqc5aC3Yn0lxoFr6W3dFmOipRPYb5OjvJFgWiPgJ6YMp3M71QcKp72r4_WGznF5QuuWC0l2HB6klA5sduLjXLQ-E_HLk3pIIW1Q382ZgtKTS9HCc8EEdr63sZLeL8p0nLM77bKdKjgNC-EMXngZ18kP4-LYHtrtzaBWNFsPciSgUre_h1THLad8TCjFtpFlvO5SB3-G5cKHUvTLgGLUtd7yRU1AlUVO3z2Zq1-dDPjf3hLP1KMK6Yeo81Ebibl1UZytAXd6KHig%3D%3D)
