clean_body: This is the honest truth about Sam Brown.| | | America gave him a Purple Heart and I gave him my whole heart. I first met Sam Brown in the burn unit. He'd just returned from Afghanistan where he and his soldiers were ambushed by the Taliban. He was injured by a roadside bomb and had a long road to recovery. I was assigned as his dietitian in rehab and was very impressed by him. Here was a young man terribly injured while serving his country, but his heart was full of faith. He fought with every fiber of his being to recover so he could return to serve with his men in Afghanistan. And even when it became clear that he would never be permitted to return to the line of duty on account of his injuries, he didn't skip a beat. Sam had to relearn everything. He had prepared for his entire life to spend his career fighting for his country in the military. After his life plans were dashed in just 60 seconds, he re-focused his vision on serving others in a new way. Before we were married, and before we were even dating, Sam and I became friends. I shared with him some of the struggles I had faced, and he was honest with me. He was concerned for my Salvation – and for that matter so was I. He challenged me to reconnect with God and start going to church again. As he and I grew closer, he helped me rediscover my faith. Now here we are 15 years later. We have 3 kids, I'm a Bible-believing momma, and Sam is running for Senate to keep serving our nation and restore hope, leadership, and accountability. I'm endlessly grateful that God put him in my life. Sam is a warrior, a hero, a leader. Thank you for your consideration, Captain Amy BrownU.S. Army, ret. P.S. – If you feel so led, Sam could use your financial support. He's closer than ever to winning his Toss-Up race and flipping the Senate majority. Like many of you, we live on a fixed income. But campaign expenses are piling up and we have to dig deeper to go all the way. | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada.

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ef89ebc5c81447edaf7e3d3ba9709abf&_e=-0f6D2E0TT0g8S0-UdA4Zj_fRVWzb1YqmPZ8U39v4h2ohEY0WV1Tp2SORaYwDXBWfaYHaG0x_uSR9B-dLv9t7gjFdbwS-tP_Q2VhatlC_OGyevB5hahVSt6UgWCjlojTXkWeqX8V_XryeYmWWrpGkFpH8vrSdJZAYxUi28iva1ywhbr6Bfh9BEPeuyMPBlLIYrnjhWflO6pNdV6wGWXgr6rvSBdIg1kxu3sQ65TsZZe_O55To900R41nSw6n4Yd6NsQxU8NXzfbzBTaAiD2jSIxGK18GtXL4OfdvaEcgr65zEubCXYlmy04_ABsOZq8qFv4SJmo6qGrwTx9KVucHIfZv_7KuxanNGlE7u4fgp_fjRye7sJYIiKbmwvj2ClTq)

Peter, [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ef89ebc5c81447edaf7e3d3ba9709abf&_e=-0f6D2E0TT0g8S0-UdA4Zj_fRVWzb1YqmPZ8U39v4h2ohEY0WV1Tp2SORaYwDXBWzhzymG52vApDBpAtlwrd1D78qudPfG6aAIZJLtvCEIokGBTppxM2lfU7KGSA0teH4Y40dSIfUgOXj5a8ucTPCLOwDB0b-nu0DxfgFhtYH2-TtUbPQsk5QDBG9y9u1m7AXXLVQZsDFMpOZq66ajlXLFgkyulpspkIEsTddxnC8HFJ_jHuijI1mefCY7P3nUP4_FjFNltd1RPubS-NpKdZfmFjXAiTTvUJ3C1X9KFqy8-qsPcCZICiuNxiVoTv9E_YJ7F0VtUWfa5cexQte2b-afPZ3i5G4eOwTN9qFPS29ic%3D) I have a few minutes of free time today, and I’ve been reflecting on this campaign and why it means so much not just to me, but to my whole family. I don’t get a lot of time to just sit and think like this these days, so I wanted to take a moment and share why this race is so important. Up until I was four years old, my family lived in fear of the incoming Communist invasion. My father was even put on a kill list because he represented freedom. _But then, we came to America and everything changed._ For the first time, we could live freely without fear that a tyrannical government would come and take us away in the Middle of the night. In America, I felt safe. I knew I owed my life to this country, so that’s why I dedicated 25 years in Navy Special Operations to fighting on the front lines for it. When I finally retired after a long career in combat, I was looking forward to finally taking a moment to relax. _But then, I saw the state Joe Biden and Kamala Harris had left our country in._ Between indoctrination of children in schools, bending the knee to jihadist terrorists, and a failing economy, this wasn’t the land of opportunity that my family and I had come to decades ago. I could see the country I loved going down the path of the one I left, and I knew I had to do something about it. **That****’****s why I decided to run for U.S. Senate.** Now, we’re climbing in the polls, and we have a real chance at making things RIGHT again in America, but I can’t do it without you. ****If you believe in the American Dream, I want you on my team. Please, can you pitch in now with the link below and help us TAKE BACK the Senate and TAKE BACK our country?**** ****[****https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/dpwillis67@gmail.com****](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ef89ebc5c81447edaf7e3d3ba9709abf&_e=-0f6D2E0TT0g8S0-UdA4Zj_fRVWzb1YqmPZ8U39v4h2ohEY0WV1Tp2SORaYwDXBWfaYHaG0x_uSR9B-dLv9t7gjFdbwS-tP_Q2VhatlC_OGyevB5hahVSt6UgWCjlojTXkWeqX8V_XryeYmWWrpGkFpH8vrSdJZAYxUi28iva1ywhbr6Bfh9BEPeuyMPBlLIYrnjhWflO6pNdV6wGWXgr6rvSBdIg1kxu3sQ65TsZZdQ1IS-c4KLHztrZkyDZxSqepGiVuB7AxJFVgrH27zqKi5Jna7pWvOX3Eev-_6ilwhhlF3OMBZY2-UFa0WAslTDqN-ZzoF-IncjyKUS5Bss8YWdaVvj9KWSwQCwYxRPoNEUfYi1UxQc5aTCYsQ7eLdN)****
---
In Liberty,
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I would rather die on my feet than live on my knees.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Read my message of defiance:
| [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=626878.89.1.b0bfcb1aac49fdb62adfeaa3c1af30b1)
---
Friend,
---
Many friends and kind souls have asked me how the Left's vicious pursuit to utterly destroy me has affected me.
---
My answer is quite simple: **_I’m still the same Rudy Giuliani that took down the Mafia in New York._**
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=626878.90.1.40b1c8c34c7d2a9de964607a859997f4)
---
I’m a fighter through and through. And I will **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** this battle for __true__ justice even as these left-wing crooks try to shamelessly **JAIL** me for life with the very same charges I used to defeat the Mafia.
---
Biden and Kamala’s Deep State goons hoped they could break me, bring me to a point of professional and financial ruin where I would simply throw up my hands and give in.
---
They had me indicted and arrested _twice_ , pushed me to the point of bankruptcy, took away my law license, and are even stripping me of my home!
---
They had hoped this forced **MUGSHOT** would bring me to my knees.
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=626878.91.1.87352b6fa94e2cb719489e878e5f967d)
---
**_But I would rather die on my feet than live on my knees!_**
---
_And it’s because of generous patriots like YOU helping to cover my legal bills that I’ve been able to carry on in this fight and stand PROUDLY on my feet._
---
But now, as the Left’s vicious pursuit ramps up and as they FORCE me from home, I have no choice but to reach out one more time, Friend.
---
They unjustly filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757**.
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **_$231,375.70_** for my legal defense trust to continue the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as Biden and Kamala’s Deep State tries to utterly RUIN me and JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=626878.92.1.dfa4e188c72cb306f23c69c63e4b98e7)

name: Power Outages
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Limited Stock: Your Ultimate Backup Plan...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790?message_id=ImE2MGQ5YmMwLTNhMmMtMDEzZC02ZDRjLTZhZjFlYmY0YzY0MkBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790)
---
---
|
---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...**

An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._

In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying.
**OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED**
They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks...

And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness.

Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled.

**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**

Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**.

Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790).

**THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.**

And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**...
**FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

**_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_

Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures...

Those who acted fast and got their **4Patriots solar generator** had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers.

Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon.
[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790)
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790)
---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X**
The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model.

It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE.

**Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems.

You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices.

Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
* Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
* Plug in the solar panel.
* Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
---
**Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!"
**Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!"
**Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!"
**Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!"
**Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!"
[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18440/6374453/d4ea9977c7254f2f97e4a95400a535f2229f1191/699c3022b2c83180921d0cdc9a45abe4321c7790) **_

~National Gun Owner_**
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90608439/491083227/1005896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTIwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE4NzdjNmItZGQ1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWbqF2LLy1mnMyzkAR8Dg_yrMLjMdku225rxRCHf-ZI=)
Peter -

Having Governor Walz on the ballot has been a game changer for us.

Our opponent’s own polling had this race in a dead heat earlier this year, but with Tim on top of the ticket, Democrats have all of the momentum.

I’m counting on you to help put me over the top – especially as we approach one of the biggest deadlines of the campaign at Tuesday’s primary election.

[**I need your support before Tuesday at midnight to keep our momentum going and go on offense in this race! Chip in now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90608440/491083228/1005896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTIwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE4NzdjNmItZGQ1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWbqF2LLy1mnMyzkAR8Dg_yrMLjMdku225rxRCHf-ZI=)

I can’t stress how big of a deal it is to have our friend and former Congressman, Governor Tim Walz, leading the Democratic ticket this fall.

People in Southern Minnesota still miss his leadership, especially with a divisive partisan like Brad Finstad now representing us. I can't wait to work day in and day out at the Capitol to serve Southern Minnesota in the mold of Tim Walz.

[**Please, help my campaign seize on this momentum and win in November. Make a contribution before our next big deadline on Tuesday at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90608441/491083229/1005896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTIwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE4NzdjNmItZGQ1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWbqF2LLy1mnMyzkAR8Dg_yrMLjMdku225rxRCHf-ZI=)

Thank you,

Rachel
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90608442/491083230/1005896203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTIwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE4NzdjNmItZGQ1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWbqF2LLy1mnMyzkAR8Dg_yrMLjMdku225rxRCHf-ZI=)

name: Chip Roy and Mike Lee
subject: Kamala Harris is allowing noncitizens to be registered to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHIP ROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kamala Harris is allowing noncitizens to be registered to vote

|
---
| | Hey Friend,

The SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections, but Senate Democrats BLOCKED it from passing.

The only reason they opposed it is because they want non-citizens to vote, and influence the outcome of our elections, which is extremely likely now that the 'Border Czar' Kamala Harris is in the running for President.

This is a major threat to our republic, and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections.**[It's not dead YET.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45a2cfbb7ff44b68ba999330dfae535d&_e=tdnjvqRsFzoa6c62g0pAZgFrOgaBCpS_w3nOwWBuQtDRnoWz2QraOyzM7sTAUEgxjoijJoubhyB5IiAibR_bT-J1BnHe3IPySVdRrSmqOtT0rcuhK4lLPeyAGF8UtDjYgKylnQ6evLA_-fZZ5QaLAx900wFJNeHavu8PmewkpM7proTEmRLYfxXWzNzcfesUvq9rFBlKkzav1xI4TWYrqCXzVbf5wko5LwGPQjH-VRqFVenFWHX1SVAHmwVidL0-EbaXsg0a6j8CWWC_Z_1TEg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: It's the epitome of what the “elites” in DC have been doing to families like mine for decades. | | | | | When I saw this picture on Twitter, it instantly pissed me off. Please forgive my language, but look at the price on the bottom right: $62,000. The Vice President earns a salary of $284,000 a year. Kamala has never created a business. She's never worked her butt off to become personally wealthy. No, like many in politics, she's enriched herself from the DC Swamp so she can afford to wear necklaces that cost more than two months' wages. This is the epitome of what the “elites” in DC have been doing to families like yours and mine for decades. Right now, she's raised over $310 million to go to the White House! President Trump is the only president in my lifetime who has stood up for working families, and it's because of this, they want to destroy him. So I'm going to ask you for $5 now to help him get elected, but I can assure you of this, your donation won't go towards a $62,000 necklace. Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BDU6fgsGWShxlQx3lteq0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRom0jgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLU9HVC0yMDI0MDgxMSZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZrOOsrhma_43_FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BDU6fgsGWShxlQx3lteq0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRom0jgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLU9HVC0yMDI0MDgxMSZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZrOOsrhma_43_FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
For instance, $20 million in mystery money flowing into Kamala Harris's campaign the first day she announced it.

| [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)
Dear Friend,

A year ago, I began investigating the Democrat fundraising powerhouse, ActBlue.

It was one of OMG's first investigations, and **[I could use your support to keep it going](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI).**

Millionaires, Billionaires, and even hostile foreign countries have influenced our elections for decades. **Remember "Chinagate" that helped Bill and Hillary get into the White House?**

[](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)
It's very real and now high-tech through online donations. **The scam is called "Smurfing**." A massive amount of money flows in from one source, then is broken up into hundreds of thousands of micro-donations to make the funds appear like average contributions to candidates that comply with federal election law.

The donations are made in the names of people who have no clue that their identities have been stolen to benefit a Democratic campaign.

**The result is, for instance, $20 million in mystery money flowing into Kamala Harris's campaign** the first day she announced it.

Over the past year, reports of fraudulent or "mystery" donations have trickled in. Now, **as we approach Election Day, we are flooded with reports of fraud**.

Yesterday, we reported on Barbara Staples in Spring, Texas. ActBlue had her make 53 donations to Democrats in a single day. But get this: over a nearly three-year period, they had Mrs. Staples make 1,678 donations totaling $13,113.

Was Mrs. Staples that generous?

Of course not. Barbara Staples has not donated to ActBlue ONCE!

Across the small town of Spring, Texas, Gerda Henderson was shown to have made 5,923 donations totaling $33,154 to Democratic candidates!

**[Watch Barbara and Gerda's story here, and please support our work.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)**

While the Biden-run federal government has done nothing about this money laundering scheme that benefits Democrats, our reporting has triggered others to step in.

Yesterday, after we released our story, **Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton issued a statement about their "ongoing investigation" into ActBlue** and announced that the company now requires CVV codes for all donations.

The word is that Paxton is now aggressively diving deeper.

But this goes far beyond Texas. With each victim that appears in another state, that state's attorney general is obligated to act!

**[Help OMG find and release stories nationwide by backing our work today.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)**

**Hundreds of millions of dollars are illegally flowing into campaigns, and it is a threat to our nation and an aggressive attempt to interfere with fair elections.**

What can you do about it?

**[Help OMG move at lightning speed to find the victims of this donation fraud and share their stories with America.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)**

We're working day and night to expose the truth, and we desperately need your help to cover our growing travel costs, not to mention the research and time it takes to verify this web of corruption.

Every dollar you donate will make a difference**[, so please help OMG and I keep going by contributing today.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI)**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. OMG's work made an immediate impact. When we released the stories of Barbara and Gerda in Spring, Texas, yesterday, THAT SAME DAY, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton acted! That's the impact of our work, and **[it's only possible with your help](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbGO5CAMhp-GdInAZCBXUJwUpZtrr4wgOBl0ECJibjVvv8qsptpqS__-_Euf_Pc-322IYd_-2ISGCs3lnJObc9pau5CLFdv0PAnLcwYOfcuHVohZNt70GrxUDRqhQcqh15o3DzN4vUpwEi1fHSwI3nOQQtxAOwRQTTBXDx-EENArwTsuV4W_uIJBO9t7xXpuIxY6O3pgwaO6GBa7E9rULTk10TyIjpPJ3wwmBtOJSy3Y2R19potgMOV_iCsm9MFuJdfjitL2NmlT3vHZJtce-bBMTpXSfOZaFmRy_AYyUBdwtdXE5Pg6-soWmw4btp3J8W313uSdcCcmRyrEQNmU62uEW1OMPz5CjOFUmvV8SzbElxr95AP_DXwGAAD__xlGkyI).**

subject: The secret to victory in 2024

body:

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Every dollar we’ve raised has been allocated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
If we miss our goals, what races do we cut?
---
Please read this: When we talk about our fundraising goals, these are not arbitrary numbers. They are what we need to win in November. And the truth is: every dollar we have raised so far has already been allocated to accomplish that goal. So has the money we have yet to raise. That means every time we come up short of a goal, we have to make some tough choices: do we have to cut spending, and if so what states and races can we not help that we wanted to? Will that mean control of the House or Senate? A state legislative race in Pennsylvania? We have monthly goals, daily goals, and goals we need to reach before the convention next week. And so much of what we raise comes from grassroots donations in response to emails like this. So we're asking: [**Can you please contribute $7 to the Democratic National Committee to help us reach the fundraising goals we've set to elect Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=7&refcode=em_20240811_810_fr&refcode2=810_22930333_HLxYXJ&akid=810%2E22930333%2EHLxYXJ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20240811_810_fr&refcode2=810_22930333_HLxYXJ&akid=810%2E22930333%2EHLxYXJ)**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Unexpected Twist in Dem's VP Pick
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=63b6d9d558&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Greetings From Minnesota](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=68c8a6084d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Andy Bloom_
Kamala Harris, the Democratic Party’s anointed nominee, selected Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as her running mate. There are concrete reasons why she selected Walz and declined to choose Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro. First is the power struggle within the Democratic Party. More importantly, as Harris says in her stump speech, is the future – or her vision for it.
I was confident Harris would pick Shapiro. It was the politically expedient choice, and Democrats have demonstrated defeating the “orange menace” is more important than principles.
However, the far-left wing of the Democratic Party vehemently protested Shapiro. Their biggest objection was Shapiro’s unabashed support of Israel. Members of the party established a website, “No Genocide Josh.”
**Why It Matters. ** If you want a glimpse into the future with a Harris-Walz administration and a Democratic Congress, look what Walz signed into law when he won a second term. The Democratic Party (the DFL – Democratic Farm Labor Party – in Minnesota) also controlled the Minnesota State House and Senate.
In 2023, Walz signed over 50 bills into law, vetoing only one (providing a higher wage to Uber and Lyft drivers). Minnesota became an example of leftist dreams come true. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e637f6963d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Will Shapiro step up after being turned down?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af2cb79978&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Speculations abound as to the reason Shapiro was not selected to run with Kamala Harris as Vice President. We will likely never learn the real reasons, though the reality is probably some combination of the issues, ranging from his religion and stance on Israel to the perception that he is overly ambitious and might upstage Harris to his failure to address the sexual harassment allegations in his own office to breaking his commitment to enact school choice options for students in failing schools.

While the rest of the country has moved on and off Shapiro, we in Pennsylvania are left wondering whether he learned anything as a result of this process. Will we see a different governing style in the aftermath of his experience in the limelight?

Assuming his political aspirations have not changed and he still plans a presidential run in 2028 or later, Shapiro now has an opportunity to address the issues that may have resulted in being passed over for the VP spot.

**Why It Matters**. Shapiro still has the opportunity to fulfill his campaign promise and work with both sides to get the Lifeline Scholarships passed. He can stop pandering to the teachers’ unions who financially supported his election. He can stop talking out of both sides of his mouth with the [statement](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8e83efb2ca&e=b7b3eddce2), “every child of God deserves a quality education,” despite vetoing the scholarship program last year.

Now is the time for Shapiro to stand up to the special interest groups and do what is right for Pennsylvania’s most vulnerable children.

He should — but will he?

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0856e222fe&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Shapiro claims he didn’t know of sexual misconduct allegations against his staffer until months later](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ba27dcd9d7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Parent takes on Department of Education over confidentiality clash](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7d79fbebba&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: A trip to the top of the world](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4336bc9116&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thomas C. Mandracchia: The exception to the Supreme Court’s originalism — Trump](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b4b5df5c7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Yes, it really is fake news](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0aecabc6b9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Hanna Bechtel: High gas prices threaten Pennsylvania’s economy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=26d786cec7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Reel: Whom can we trust now?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=010b23bfa5&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
The Democrats have anointed Kamala Harris as their nominee, but is anyone allowed to talk to her? [David Harsanyi of _The Federalist_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37ba8d1708&e=b7b3eddce2) asks the important question, and one that should keep getting louder: where’s Kamala? “The Democrats’ new presidential candidate, who’s never won a single primary vote, might have been crowned but hasn’t given a real interview or even an extemporaneous political statement since Democrat bigwigs pushed Biden aside.” As they did with Biden, the mainstream media will ignore this problem for as long as they can.
---
|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,I just wanted to say **_**_thank you_**_** _-_ thank you for opening this email. . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably crowded with so many political emails, emails about the state of our country and the numerous important elections that are happening right now.And more importantly, I know that you are busy with a life of your own, a family of your own, and daily trials and joys of your own. So, I hope you know that taking a minute out of your day to read about my critical battle to defeat Democrat Adam Schiff and fight for the future of California means the world to me.**[**Can I count on you to stick with me through November?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=346662257cb9434e8fb6ca9502d5fc32&_e=ZtAJOpZKlOaop9uG6lE_4VKZSnfx5L7mZs6IVTYv84cvIx4Poti79o6LM8MaMmMfHc7QS2CnzNrag4FNl8Hh4fooXo5DpPLOVC2icjb9QY4Yrev7-lb4qpgVm6QoyTloKV6GlbZe8OmoiwxWEzffL0GdAmSb6tB3P8BSVRdC9JDNPYHkHbq-uy10AMWOiX8klUy-V-e16Bo_yFPHeUTiePMvWpH3gq6tPZTqxeIY6WligqhtFmai7pldR-0QERzNJ0LRkzUOf-33KZrCWdcjCA0UtKqBJT9W1JdNIiT1geQGOiuu6W2W8K4jdTut5YJ6RqKi8q4Ogt2i3DlUmoiDuX3ZOY95MVta6PgfBCyFRvoRSJeQEogQSN37ApwOHx2P)** Fellow Patriot, I hope you’ll **[**support my campaign team today**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=346662257cb9434e8fb6ca9502d5fc32&_e=ZtAJOpZKlOaop9uG6lE_4VKZSnfx5L7mZs6IVTYv84cvIx4Poti79o6LM8MaMmMfHc7QS2CnzNrag4FNl8Hh4fooXo5DpPLOVC2icjb9QY4Yrev7-lb4qpgVm6QoyTloKV6GlbZe8OmoiwxWEzffL0GdAmSb6tB3P8BSVRdC9JDNPYHkHbq-uy10AMWOiX8klUy-V-e16Bo_yFPHeUTiePMvWpH3gq6tPZTqxeIY6WlcTTbI7KN3RrpQL3-Z9vlKyTlD4Q_v2VWmKvNvv5skMg-l7gP48OmWK1wUyE88YoU9ZdAPQ7Im2ELQm67cwc4h2z2yb276i8hNJrgEpS8ksZpkHgeSWH2L1x6v7jb286GyIfHmigSN0o0PmwZ50w-3)** and stay up to date through election day. We have less than 3 months to go, and so much is at stake. If you care about the future of California and the fight to bring common sense leadership to our country's most left-wing state like I do, the greatest thing you can do is _**_pray for me and my election._**_ And friend, in addition to your prayers, if you're able, **[**a small contribution to my campaign**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=346662257cb9434e8fb6ca9502d5fc32&_e=ZtAJOpZKlOaop9uG6lE_4VKZSnfx5L7mZs6IVTYv84cvIx4Poti79o6LM8MaMmMfHc7QS2CnzNrag4FNl8Hh4fooXo5DpPLOVC2icjb9QY4Yrev7-lb4qpgVm6QoyTloKV6GlbZe8OmoiwxWEzffL0GdAmSb6tB3P8BSVRdC9JDNPYHkHbq-uy10AMWOiX8klUy-V-e16Bo_yFPHeUTiePMvWpH3gq6tPZTqxeIY6WltyBDM3Khn97KsydVwb8iUfnn_sv5hWIjiwR6JEc9HVuXOJ-beuVaVLsDBNozgmyXLho2gsU9vRJzdOZKPs_y2LqzW-i7hbtTUiqu_CAsAYaA-XHy5CIBDtWNutaiKBn39q8X_ryFwtwkmaQCBxrtY)** goes a long way towards helping me fight against Adam Schiff and the Democrat machine backing his campaign. Because the last thing the Democrats want to see is support from hundreds of individual American patriots donating to my campaign and dreaming of a new Conservative California.So, I'm glad this email reached you, and I hope I can count on your support to defeat Adam Schiff in November.

clean_body: | | | Dear ${firstname}, I just wanted to say thank you | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot,I just wanted to say thank you - thank you for opening this email. . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably crowded with so many political emails, emails about the state of our country and the numerous important elections that are happening right now.And more importantly, I know that you are busy with a life of your own, a family of your own, and daily trials and joys of your own. So, I hope you know that taking a minute out of your day to read about my critical battle to defeat Democrat Adam Schiff and fight for the future of California means the world to me. Fellow Patriot, I hope you’ll and stay up to date through election day. We have less than 3 months to go, and so much is at stake. If you care about the future of California and the fight to bring common sense leadership to our country's most left-wing state like I do, the greatest thing you can do is pray for me and my election. And friend, in addition to your prayers, if you're able, goes a long way towards helping me fight against Adam Schiff and the Democrat machine backing his campaign. Because the last thing the Democrats want to see is support from hundreds of individual American patriots donating to my campaign and dreaming of a new Conservative California.So, I'm glad this email reached you, and I hope I can count on your support to defeat Adam Schiff in November. | | | | | | | Thank you for your support.Let’s win this together! | | | | | ../../../../Downloads/go.txting.io/7up80c PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389

subject: Democrats work to build power while Republicans restrict voting access … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 11th, 2024 | | |

|

| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAy-CgZ_mzsOZ-q1WWKpyRNuUEpxM2QYBXoOzE3X7qsBuxjzmnsso_aDo67KpkIseiqZ59sKexi52B-mceigd4R-OG6nLx6QAU3yoC-mXXCdV2oYKhOSSj5jn1Wa5I1mA9OA34HDvF9gITlW1PoOPkmx0NtT2KPq06uvDHTXZsKuCTga2b-qqYsN_WE-CgHF9y_Gnvelbfvuqd4jL70DEhwaUGc0itYu3_KtMRXfpZH2HO-s7PzVAF08dDmvK9Mub6Y821Ch1yYMxCJXycYrQwvfpkcUIGRxm4THyHX-NQS9ffgJOjQROkOxQ-kHE96BeR4OsGIOXS5i2zpL0Rpaq24CnSB5zmXvprPQky-uHEhFTN9jZ6-xFwzgjTKuRQhhU0/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h0/h001.eLahi5kREA4dGZSNnK3A2OX-I0-680C_PxjFDL9Mw3k)

1️⃣ **_Equal Access Voting:_ Republicans want to restrict ballot access **
Republicans have been trying to stop some states – including battleground state Nevada – from counting postmarked mail ballots that don't make it to election officials until after Election Day. [Learn more about why and how the GOP is looking to make voting more difficult for voters across the country → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMQhaeVQyNDM4ns6b0vyf-5O48UxoLM2SxYE0cEcG0rDoIt8-JwWKKCxRt_9199vKqD6_6sX41z2EsF9NLbus7j3kDGe42qPt6LWhvQcR-pHcJBM1LaVQi1XGU7PO0vT0QY6b_5tBXceIbO6ZOoNl46gYORMQock-aj_64qAVK4N_EYtT-mvDVN5-NcHG8_zO78NBjYoWPDEHzDa5CVBEhJy8751fGq1f3eV4AZG6m0kQqL4kgS7J9Tlq91yZvePrEaNgKKuWFumme7PfnA-oKj9lxVyP-TSMKwzdHET3evXrQ84V279cK0XpWOvX2Iw3yMn9G5bj2aiddLR7zR6timsVnNfWC-4Z22PjFDAz7EME3R5-rAOxbKtxWJajbOFlxz85vZNoyu4q6qgtGXEztt00zuclHBg9drrKeM_kRKLY4JJ1q63bh3GgpdHAHrls6MxdELIMAcQTZ2dPzlsS-ZuxxUc_Rw3AuoUOfCgoedkjpkX7-W3niVpZC_HzWJeTlflrhRMafGI7GU7_YeD3_OGhY-7ytg00t3ocr2kGi4Tie7P-LSs7sOrhpBca0ZX_7Q/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h1/h001.LAtDus6xq_EbDS5SbrXAJvHwk32lrzxzfywBb7xnsP0)
2️⃣ **_Arizona:_ Democrats see AZ as a blueprint for power-building in the states **
Republicans currently control both the Arizona state House and Senate by two seats in each chamber. Democrats have a chance this November to flip both chambers and win a trifecta. [**Read more about our party’s plans here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVJW6vH3rUoMo_AA_JErmGQ8PsLuJGut4SpUuDBIaTds_0037u_m3sfu-_ayOEyCl32wmhb6OwpFXnC5-ecOgNYxTMFuJ8kum3be82e5KE-EjVqTZAXjpJr43TDnT85qy0QCz-vGldVtj0c64zxcpyrzINrUI5UofpPVVs8V3kLMLIUb2TADe_EmLJ9PWNSinOWsAfDRxiH2NvODl6fFa1iLN-zVpa1gDAAH73ta6VmzGx9GtVE7RrnpX3iYdmuaeM9r3s1YZzqtOeOwKv7n8YjfYsDJ2XU7PshAeN4IhJmu9yf1hesmtF2aamQeqlDrqafP2uKe8MBuBD-A1KqJEFjUtdFRP_l6Tcb5LzOlUitP2AzycAmPkxI7pGwrFOMhoCLInqXjsdXJzyovbb3oa8WPJvdByahH-QOJVivAoShUB6cw2viKZaD09Xq2gYogl5bUz6ew_2nuiGkiQmwp5f1zWn2nL7PLLpakSQ92jiHQHDnr03I0z__rzw0B0OrAtOMVIFXrvRZooMfZHeaYVJFazWuQEN3VUnbmXRGx76vSWw/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h2/h001.xwnmbM1SXYMInMNkxCNZf6JbW3UsnOBdL4eDkqNDIvA)
3️⃣ **_Press Release:_ Republicans Are Being Weird In The States **
Republicans up and down the ballot are acting bizarre – and for every weird moment at the top of the ticket, there are a dozen more featuring GOP state legislators. [**Check out some of the Republican’s strangest and most dangerous moments in the states →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pD8jfAiS1KFBqPBD-bNc6ACp59Bxccn3NP_esQifm8dU8D_n1z7Bn8QbWicM0dJE5SFsJBPUBmW3zKR0wp3F6B_haMpy7ZAl37p4CdOWLewXRYOoF8ZfcOBXXwwuRuP2uxOb0OoRi87T0G9vTdO1OfPCAIW1kCOQ-5CtEpK_T9uyNDEJzPVXaZXyMyqtEExlTi-xQMXA8_GmT2YbsnTbcsDcoX8FXe_IzU6au7zQ_F0tI3W9jGqFUJ3Av4o_dm56n2yJKRLjdbpqsmnhvMs0qqgAWDOz82m6Z2jIn-rdeDiSpreUc3aX4l5OacjPVpCvt2lOGXFkZ6wDUdd5u7_T1BPE9V7EeDqeU5-hUr8IaC9SCySmFy5D_hFIvkH-AJh-iBJN7bWHVBBjcyGcmnc4nLDNwsY_5P6zXJd56SdWgJx-1X9WzWLZ-iKf2xptX9BTyz4EbmGkDrLRGqEvQiodmJgTIW3Mpl4hva2Be5OX904iYYActDxk7v-IafONNt1jtK-mzcWPOjw6ulTKUWq3e_JeAmSKfHqnJYcgoAzMFl6JQ/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h3/h001.H6BkGwlpBB1YW-rAfCxGZoDpUigGA75FNXKnrGUabtY)
📢 **_Get involved:_ Check out in-person and virtual volunteer opportunities**
With the election less than 100 days away, every day counts and Democrats in states nationwide are counting on your support. [Find an opportunity to get involved here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWxZOGvyrvb3uYDI_eCkdGdPoLBLjHByv2ZimWwwDoIlnX74P6u-vLPC8C1oz4iwPvQBiuF82QY6eYrbdfDkNKRFW_RCZCFTupu0u521DeCz36BbY54KuiTcMStiGtVlchwFsX1qvRqnfDhLaE1skQZkO3FxXAkleQnQEhS0tBUTakzYVCnwZx2KlT-nnkW_pieUkQ6HBpEkYIsbamvxB6Rfni0lwQo41nUdy_D9EAzTDPSVXqR4w4RQFtWddOa7gAZ9Oy-bnGupAXxk9QlcL8DBFsdbdCQbVzvDatjMGOBUzH9BStAyihjdKcZCL6rlXOW_d-SkEVfq4_V8IifHJ860yI6sxgrqjd3_C7AqXTUTiT7ueWeflQ0YCR6Wjc6v-a2VbxQx9fcNWWeUmq17VKupMNaslaOxuYnAil4s1mX3ZOUqxic1XvCf1ZdOKvmDvhZpj62D2QDgkhlCvzGnl_-TxPaUUSl-HsvLSVN3QvCH8TzwxFpfqgULTFiQT7QfhiA/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h4/h001.Zz7X7sW4VUmgPx3o8MCbiUsO9dT-LFbfsho809Euhnw)
**🗳️ _Looking to Election Day:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races**
This fall, Democrats are facing ultra-competitive elections in states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to invest early and help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_jXkxRDUHIscTbPy4W11wKMrng4Wu2q80neCuIKPIlr8IxIGx2niKpWzRXpV8eNCrDo75BfvbS2I47i73xORF8OFTZYlqUnn6v1a8xu0i250yHZBhLd9WdeC9JUW_Re-KBz3M0y_hCz0bfMuNUrKCW02Z4FzLZTtpfHpTZtpi-t2NGgfZn6JXqKC6tF-ZFtKKKWkTw9kly7qvIA3GI2TYPzVCLyBH2gZfyFyc_tDmmpD_oHX1OJfPTye5Ya59_e0sfFxVJWcTa4L3uYqoc-IbvPQk1720AgnT-NpwxOu-IzwWwp4eJeP720CyzY_mGEUA31aNJHPAssIVjOgVoI5q73dY-OR7pRJ8Q-isTTKFexK4lPMtfs_uyLt3K0-Gu1_Ydi1gt4jl0Z9TA8l9-LksyTs6DMUOTsX5Rq7HpQpvXMJ8wDjuxjodOgWlR9BJE4GsjA3cg1EpZIIR0FIbaggpiNI6aEaGICnN8MUunuwj83V1BDqGRZ7_CeIA4NX34qPf/48t/tP3PBPPGTWmxoZMjwyYgCg/h5/h001.tfFUCiJdHMkmpjuKHytKBaPYFIGv6NP6DGRfo2_rBlE)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 11th, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Equal Access Voting: Republicans want to restrict ballot access Republicans have been trying to stop some states – including battleground state Nevada – from counting postmarked mail ballots that don't make it to election officials until after Election Day. 2️⃣ Arizona: Democrats see AZ as a blueprint for power-building in the states Republicans currently control both the Arizona state House and Senate by two seats in each chamber. Democrats have a chance this November to flip both chambers and win a trifecta. 3️⃣ Press Release: Republicans Are Being Weird In The States Republicans up and down the ballot are acting bizarre – and for every weird moment at the top of the ticket, there are a dozen more featuring GOP state legislators. 📢 Get involved: Check out in-person and virtual volunteer opportunities With the election less than 100 days away, every day counts and Democrats in states nationwide are counting on your support. 🗳️ Looking to Election Day: Democrats prepare for upcoming races This fall, Democrats are facing ultra-competitive elections in states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, so ****** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Our ads are the _number one way_ we can counter the swarm of MAGA attacks and get my record in front of undecided voters – so we couldn’t afford to wait any longer.

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Keeping our foot on the gas
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90611853/491089366/-1824625245?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZlYjQ3MS1lMzU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dy8D_O3Ch0CDHIn9QI7nXA511eePCrrhugOnyOcXfBk=)
It’s hard to get sleep right now, Peter, because I am fired up. For one, Kamala Harris and Tim Walz were in Eau Claire, and the energy was electric. When I say the road to the White House runs through this district, it was literally running in front of my parents farm this past week. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90611856/491089368/645503820?refcode=em-8.11.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZlYjQ3MS1lMzU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dy8D_O3Ch0CDHIn9QI7nXA511eePCrrhugOnyOcXfBk=) I am ready to help win the White House, and for wins up and down the ballot. Because it takes all of us coming together to win the White House, reelect Tammy Baldwin and hold the Senate, and win back the House majority, so we can make life better for working families. And two, we’re *two nights* from Election Day here in Wisconsin, where we can finally have our matchup with Derrick Van Orden. I’m so proud of the movement we’ve built across every county in WI-03. When I say you and the masses in Western Wisconsin are making this possible, I truly mean it. The coalition of support we’ve grown and inspired across this past year has made clear we’re ready for change, and bringing real representation back to this district. [**But until the final votes are counted, we can’t leave anything to chance. We must keep our foot on the gas. A $3 contribution from you today will help keep our voter turnout efforts going in full force. Will you chip in to support our final push in this crucial time for our race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90611874/491089371/645503820?refcode=em-8.11.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZlYjQ3MS1lMzU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dy8D_O3Ch0CDHIn9QI7nXA511eePCrrhugOnyOcXfBk=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90611876/491089391/645503820?refcode=em-8.11.24-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZlYjQ3MS1lMzU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dy8D_O3Ch0CDHIn9QI7nXA511eePCrrhugOnyOcXfBk=)****

body:
The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth.
The New York Sun told you the truth.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54113235b8ea4fd5a6618e5fb4b82b10&_e=dK5MsVmkHex5DPTka7vBf9bx3QmUM9kZzOns8Y__E4jHqeaUTi9m9Ldb3j3_CdFr-Iuk7F7WaXG-HNtXqNlqVXKknnB6bYSWphn5bvGr2NX5CYOXaPiCZ4onoMuOmGfGa4gLH89k1vQyVimc_j5NcrtPMVzC9Q7n8pcl-fLujGtSAyq6aIbYQsN1c_IBDDoAYd_Y2IgMXIpCNrYiu1eqcN4exJ82mVW8t_q6az8LROCI5hfZTVZiOnhYJ5jfd9CXXRodcLYZP2RJyxXv7-fdhYL-pYujir9xUc99XrLypspi5Z_CSh4BCTjI3d4wGwvmC7_ooWZEMcIdA0pcoqcESPsL2N8OhznFrJsFx73gZd90ogpmPpbzpn2Q95XL6hnN8zs2-dUYojF9_9uGKvx91htAqSRZBjjnzBCtCjMtt6l5mV7rESOKzKGlBLUB4ye9r_7Jq_xfrnA2wMuy4UcVWg%3D%3D)

| | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER

| | Dear Reader,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from April this year, shows how the Times covered Donald Trump's use of language. The Times would have you believe that harsh political rhetoric is confined to only one side of the aisle. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54113235b8ea4fd5a6618e5fb4b82b10&_e=dK5MsVmkHex5DPTka7vBf9bx3QmUM9kZzOns8Y__E4jHqeaUTi9m9Ldb3j3_CdFr-Iuk7F7WaXG-HNtXqNlqVXKknnB6bYSWphn5bvGr2NX5CYOXaPiCZ4onoMuOmGfGa4gLH89k1vQyVimc_j5NcrtPMVzC9Q7n8pcl-fLujGtSAyq6aIbYQsN1c_IBDDoAYd_Y2IgMXIpCNrYiu1eqcN4exJ82mVW8t_q6az8LROCI5hfZTVZiOnhYJ5jfd9CXXRodcLYZP2RJyxXv7-fdhYL-pYujir9xUc99XrLypspi5Z_CSh4BCTjI3d4wGwvmcc4GPioPHJ9PnODakhCNMG0aLrndx28Pr6EQPWB_Sgb0pySZ581CoosFSFdFYXxEaq0wWZ87NbJqT22eK76WYuqwn50d_1OdIIN8U1gARBx_4v56K8aW-o_LY5w6e5LakQBGV-0rg_-0UqIZm5ZgLg%3D%3D)
---
| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54113235b8ea4fd5a6618e5fb4b82b10&_e=dK5MsVmkHex5DPTka7vBf9bx3QmUM9kZzOns8Y__E4jHqeaUTi9m9Ldb3j3_CdFr-Iuk7F7WaXG-HNtXqNlqVXKknnB6bYSWphn5bvGr2NX5CYOXaPiCZ4onoMuOmGfGa4gLH89k1vQyVimc_j5NcrtPMVzC9Q7n8pcl-fLujGtSAyq6aIbYQsN1c_IBDDoAYd_Y2IgMXIpCNrYiu1eqcN4exJ82mVW8t_q6az8LROCI5hfZTVZiOnhYJ5jfd9CXXRodcLYZP2RJyxXv7-fdhYL-pYujir9xUc99XrLypspi5Z_CSh4BCTjI3d4wGwvmmaC70q2oYzApO7LtLPVGCJOyqcghmyNV51d8VQKth013aNbcVtpnlCgm_C-sRSkM8uFTjQClM2mw8VVOjExj9Iygbi5B3189eK4Ns3T6z9yAJAzlzxCZ3aXQSL9UwLbBhYDFo10ogFAaXNp8vdKskg%3D%3D). Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record! Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now.

clean_body: The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. The New York Sun told you the truth. | | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER | | Dear Reader,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun? The screenshot on the left, from April this year, shows how the Times covered Donald Trump's use of language. The Times would have you believe that harsh political rhetoric is confined to only one side of the aisle. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less. | | | | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what you can do about it. The answer is simple: . Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record! Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now. | | | | | | | Dovid Efune Publisher, The New York Sun | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States Too many emails? .

**We’ve taken the lead** in what the _National Journal_ is calling “one of the most competitive [races] in the country,” something we’ve always known was the case.

Here’s the details:

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eec15e8ef96f4dc082caeb9b8678e444&_e=fD4BD8gpAc1yq5_7VD5uJMBSkhOLeFpWnzt6GnSZQpcrWSNMKCCu8uKCAAnPoTd88J0O-I_BgS1LcWdLuR7UzCDNRCWn2p-1zBp9qcSnMCxPyzC6bY4RaKZbfSx3t0pqbhhcpJl8NI2xultZ99ikb2jUUP6ufXiW8XmfRzPMT-jr1AQs0YvmMoMGMp60jrdhW8vD5ObdWvDrK2NC-s-l9O0zqoS2v4xhwsXvmsxzKqFWUzKKLCu9SCHRJ8eCeY21451wSbS0d5Sc8CvyzwpoaA1_QRZ1K2scgalIC60bCiz6-hJqcRDb8qGbmZ8O_H9wCwpa_QrCy7LUzusXQm8EQbLfGXMkUKqxvrIUcSImx5kgRuiZpn8eyLqArNVZ9OMfQYozWyPckQ99C7zjSblqkg%3D%3D)
Voters are coming to terms with the utter catastrophe that has been the Biden-Harris regime, and they’re ready to part ways with anyone who has been an accomplice to their long list of failures – _including Gabe Vasquez._

This is also the result of our non-stop efforts to hold Gabe Vasquez accountable for his radical agenda, his lies, and his own disregard for our nation’s laws.

Momentum is on our side, **but this is FAR from mission accomplished.**

In fact, _this is one of the most vulnerable and critical moments in our campaign._

Right now, Gabe Vasquez and the Democrat strategists saddled with running his campaign are freaking out in their HQ and plotting how they can start slinging vicious attacks about me to diminish our lead.

_**Right now is when I need your support the most!**_

Maintaining this lead through the remainder of the election is going to be the biggest challenge we’ve faced yet, [**and I need every bit of support you can continue to provide to our campaign.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eec15e8ef96f4dc082caeb9b8678e444&_e=fD4BD8gpAc1yq5_7VD5uJMBSkhOLeFpWnzt6GnSZQpcrWSNMKCCu8uKCAAnPoTd88J0O-I_BgS1LcWdLuR7UzCDNRCWn2p-1zBp9qcSnMCxPyzC6bY4RaKZbfSx3t0pqbhhcpJl8NI2xultZ99ikb2jUUP6ufXiW8XmfRzPMT-jr1AQs0YvmMoMGMp60jrdhW8vD5ObdWvDrK2NC-s-l9O0zqoS2v4xhwsXvmsxzKqFWUzKKLCu9SCHRJ8eCeY21olgF260UFi0BhbGIaQpURL5C5BkTm81b_5_L6T7NdllIPWjHZ2PLQAQAyDPNzPfbLOWKb3q-RielFIyM-MuxPwXkIccRDIpKAzSeoptHXHM9zaj7vwpPLoRj-16CvgjDroY_tSeZXORbspiMHAFhRw%3D%3D)

Hi Peter, Wiley’s new bill, _the Fair Maps Act_ , keeps gaining steam in Washington. Nearly a dozen top voting rights organizations — including the NAACP, Common Cause, End Citizens United, and the League of Women Voters — have endorsed Wiley’s common-sense plan to end gerrymandering. ****[Can you add your name alongside America’s top voting rights advocates to endorse _the Fair Maps Act_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90613863/491093835/437278546?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240811_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjU2YTQxZC1lNTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFbPNFg9kymDSxSraJhoGQGDDgV88eR8I1-2-VlKiw0=&emci=3a28f6a0-0656-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=1656a41d-e557-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=28008880)**** | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90613865/491093837/437278546?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240811_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjU2YTQxZC1lNTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFbPNFg9kymDSxSraJhoGQGDDgV88eR8I1-2-VlKiw0=&emci=3a28f6a0-0656-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=1656a41d-e557-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=28008880)**

The honest truth is that moving legislation in Washington, even commonsense policy like this, is really hard. We’ll need a groundswell of grassroots support to move this bill forward.
So far, we’ve collected hundreds of signatures from citizen co-sponsors willing to speak out for change, but we don’t see your name on the list yet! Today, we’re asking you to stand with the NAACP, Common Cause, ECU, and hundreds of your fellow North Carolinians by signing on in support of this bill.

No longer will the liberal billionaire class or the FAKE NEWS media have a say in how your country gets run. I’ll only be taking advice from REAL AMERICAN PATRIOTS LIKE YOU. Thank you, Donald J. subject: The fight for reproductive freedom.

body:
We must stop the Trump-Vance agenda.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90614918/491095833/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_240811polls_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4ZDRkMC1lNTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnc6Rdy5QjBboIfGB_CR9D7wU3Al1K4HAhK_OOBlSXE=) I had the opportunity to speak on reproductive freedom at the Paint The Polls Black event recently, and I wanted to share a bit about what I said with you today, Peter:

When we talk about reproductive justice, when we talk about people being able to have the right to make their own healthcare decisions, when we talk about the crisis that is infant and maternal mortality, **we have to also talk about voting.**

I hail from the state where the evangelist of Trump's 2025 project is now the Vice Presidential pick, JD Vance. This is a person who believes abortion should be banned and opposes exceptions for rap and incest survivors. Trump and Vance have made it clear that they will strip away our rights and make it more difficult for people to get the care they need.

**On the other hand, we have an opportunity to elect an administration that supports the right to choose. But that will only happen if voters turn out in November and vote blue.**

[**I am proud to be at the forefront of the fight for policies that support reproductive rights, but I cannot do it alone. For nearly five decades, I’ve been working to understand the story of America and tell it through film. I've studied how crises have challenged us to preserve a democratic system of government that respects and listens to all of its citizens. But right now, our democracy is under attack.

What's worse is that experts say Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators running for reelection, and right now, the polls show him neck and neck with his Trump-backed, self-funding opponent, Bernie Moreno.
We cannot afford to lose a voice like Sherrod’s in the Senate. He’s been fighting day in and day out for Ohioans, the Dignity of Work, reproductive rights, and our democracy. But to continue these vital fights, he needs the immediate support of people like you.

name: Bob Casey
subject: David McCormick's advantage

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3820%2E552475%2EoRryjI)
Hi Peter, it’s Bob with an important update for you.
It’s no secret that my opponent David McCormick is worth hundreds of millions of dollars -- and it should come as no surprise that he put more of his own personal wealth into his campaign to defeat us.
**However, the fact that my opponent doubled his contribution last quarter -- writing his campaign a check for another $2 million -- means that we have a lot of work to do.**
Look, Peter, everything we’ve accomplished so far is thanks to this team. We have the resources to continue working hard for every Pennsylvania family because of folks like you chipping in $50 here or $10 there. To overcome this latest fundraising gap, I have to ask for your help again.
[**Will you chip in any amount to power our campaign, help us reach every corner of the Commonwealth, and stand up to my hedge fund executive opponent’s fundraising advantage?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240811-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240811-1&refcode2=3820_552475_oRryjI&akid=3820%2E552475%2EoRryjI)

Fellow Conservative,

Things are about to go from bad to worse in our fight to flip Wisconsin RED in November.

The money flowing in from Chuck Schumer, Kamala Harris and Tammy Baldwin’s army of D.C. megadonors and Super PACs is unprecedented. _**Frankly, I’ve never seen anything like this!**_

If we fail to keep up, Eric Hovde’s narrow lead over Tammy Baldwin will be erased overnight, and we’ll lose our best shot at retaking the Senate Majority.

[**It’s not too late. Can you step up with a donation of $5 or $10 to help us stay on track to flip Wisconsin RED in November?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b2d9437f1f1f4ef589bd2fbdd72c3632&_e=uHS2mNTcgBCD5leOkxHHmqZN8gyQM3Qt2GgdYQcAjypLa7xMHRiiAw_ozgPDWZAGIaqh5EOwk6DC1IbLP4hhXh6_Szf4UQfYrhl1LUipE9r6j6BEwYIo1FannuKqn7sT9sCZydFmyPcPWiocYpwoBFQeUzOuQp1d9YVYFl_Mknc32eDeBE5i4OFhIEr8MXv2gwy5iprflLu0ElYGnsKlVBuFrChTBPzOzDnzrcBlj8-UJhREH5trV6PBWUKAb9qGCZ8pQcD59O02LDTGqqEbveYaMXAbInQp1DfP2VbxpH-Uz9EG_3cl-CM8PREV0jLfw5Pz4F7RnPw15Xho0uKDfZdfghJnrNJL_U39qRVANTuZ0Y7QLmwKVC-HRl4G9vkJIQgMHxd0IqFXO-LwNjX9Ww%3D%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via CI
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOZr_GWNO

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOZr_GWNO

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63457668:sOZr_GWNO:m:3:2627245898:E794548F19290E1F14A0403D783F3171:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isOZr_GWNO

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOZr_GWNO

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-75994060792-echo3-33330656BF48BD986A43DEF31FEBE390@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I am officially the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f79b880-8b0f-40b6-8840-1e15fdfff8ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | | | | Peter -- It’s official. I am the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate here in Michigan. I’m so grateful to Michigan voters for entrusting me not only with this honor, but also the responsibility of keeping Michigan and this U.S. Senate seat blue in November. I will not let you down. Because there is just too much at stake: Whether Michigan is a place where anyone can get in and stay in the middle class. Whether our granddaughters have fewer rights than their grandmothers. Whether the American experiment of a multi-racial, multi-ethnic democracy continues. And whether Michigan contributes to keeping the White House, and making history. [So you can bet I will be working harder than I ever have before. I know that we can win this, but it will take all of us. My team has set a rather ambitious $100,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal for the next week so that we can hit the ground running in the sprint to the general election. Will you split a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign tonight and become a General Election Founding Donor? ** **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcf9030a-ad1c-4f2e-99cb-49ce0f5f48ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc981277-f416-4375-86c9-2806c063a623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In short: the real race begins now, Peter. We’re up against Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, a man who has shown that he’ll say or do anything to get elected. He has co-sponsored bills that would not only ban abortion nationwide, but threaten in-vitro fertilization and birth control. He supported privatizing Social Security and Medicare. After 20 years as a politician, Rogers left Michigan for good. He cashed in on his D.C. connections to make millions by helping Chinese tech companies, giving them access to the United States. And in doing so, increased his net worth by as much as 2,000%. Then he bought a mansion in Florida and two yachts. He is only moving back to Michigan to run for the Senate. It’s clear: Mike Rogers is only looking out for himself. I will be working to make sure every Michigan voter understands just how bad Mike Rogers would be for Michiganders if elected to the Senate, but we need resources to start immediately holding him accountable to his record. [Will you become a General Election Founding Donor today and chip in $10 to Blue Amp Action and my campaign? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1abfa28-0c9c-4354-9be5-7f7ccaf9000c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fa7bfd8-d973-4b53-b97a-c73b85b055d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
## Thank you,
Elissa

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cbc3ed3-a338-4ae2-8d18-722390ed8d37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

I will be working to make sure every Michigan voter understands just how bad Mike Rogers would be for Michiganders if elected to the Senate, but we need resources to start immediately holding him accountable to his record. | | | | | | | | Thank you, Elissa | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A desperate, scared man.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It is up to us to do everything we can to move the needle in the right direction and make sure that people like Trump, like JD Vance, like Kari Lake here in Arizona are defeated — once and for all. We need to organize, we need to volunteer, we need to talk to our friends and family. We can’t waste a single day, a single moment, between now and election day. The stakes are too high, especially in a must-win state like Arizona.
#

You read that right.
Donald Trump is a desperate, scared man.
But he is a desperate, scared man with about a 50/50 chance of becoming the next President of the United States.
It’s up to us to do everything we can to move the needle in the right direction and make sure that people like Trump, like JD Vance, like Kari Lake here in Arizona are defeated — once and for all. We need to organize, we need to volunteer, we need to talk to our friends and family. We can’t waste a single day, a single moment, between now and election day. The stakes are too high, especially in a must-win state like Arizona.
I am not done, and I’ll be hard at work making sure that we solidify the gains we have made here in Arizona over the next few months. I’m personally invested in building the infrastructure we need to win, and I’m supporting pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot to do it.
But all of that is for nothing if I don’t have you behind me. Arizona isn’t just one of the most competitive states in the country — it’s one of the most expensive, too.
So, respectfully, I’m asking you to chip in.
