clean_body: It is up to us to do everything we can to move the needle in the right direction and make sure that people like Trump, like JD Vance, like Kari Lake here in Arizona are defeated — once and for all. We need to organize, we need to volunteer, we need to talk to our friends and family. We can’t waste a single day, a single moment, between now and election day. The stakes are too high, especially in a must-win state like Arizona. You read that right. Donald Trump is a desperate, scared man. But he is a desperate, scared man with about a 50/50 chance of becoming the next President of the United States. It’s up to us to do everything we can to move the needle in the right direction and make sure that people like Trump, like JD Vance, like Kari Lake here in Arizona are defeated — once and for all. We need to organize, we need to volunteer, we need to talk to our friends and family. We can’t waste a single day, a single moment, between now and election day. The stakes are too high, especially in a must-win state like Arizona. I am not done, and I’ll be hard at work making sure that we solidify the gains we have made here in Arizona over the next few months. I’m personally invested in building the infrastructure we need to win, and I’m supporting pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot to do it. But all of that is for nothing if I don’t have you behind me. Arizona isn’t just one of the most competitive states in the country — it’s one of the most expensive, too. So, respectfully, I’m asking you to chip in. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. Grateful you still have my back. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:
They know we need this seat to deliver a Republican Senate majority that will work with them to clean up Biden’s and Kamala’s mess. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa4c6ce4505548c68018d0948cf28d2a&_e=O0G4kZyjLCrDt1ByB-NZZHcArb9Cz6l8mUtcc0jeEaHR9Gzw8MXOjZpGrV3STnY3e2QXGdRKGeCo_ore27AJtYfwFeU9fH03iwsu1ZgI6T0sy4ypyhm0LqRo4KhSxT4AGZ-Ul4pDmpu4ljBvCT1FlGj7kuOOlf3bPHR2fRlFxXXkWpOYbfa4dONVu9Xlis1FxzxL01pL_VQVVmYLhRYztg8wwtV66JnBHMKmz8RLAqY94zHoObtDkFPktaW6Eo4JbM9tRJxlsfqE3L1mMJ9LaLy0WMxPAYEQ6ARGzvrMjOWIthGIHh98gEuLWrYeS9fwh0Dpp4vsrh2BzSt11tXQkX2IJvDRLbtcTpOWTyFPV_pmm1U_lRnYSHiZXTXB3jIwzE4PswNT4M7VLxvnlxR08Q%3D%3D)

Peter,

With Pres. Trump naming my good friend and Republican Senator from Ohio – JD Vance – as his VP running mate, **Democrats know that they’re in _even more_ danger now in Ohio.**

_So, naturally, they’re ramping up their attacks on me._

Despite this, we’re closing in on D.C. insider Sherrod Brown in our race to flip battleground Ohio’s Senate seat.

The only thing that has kept us from catching and leapfrogging Brown is his MASSIVE fundraising advantage – **he’s STILL outraising nearly everyone on the ballot.**

**Pres. Trump and JD Vance are counting on us making a full sweep in Ohio.** They know we need this seat to deliver a Republican Senate majority that will work with them to clean up Biden’s and Kamala’s mess.

If we can just close the fundraising gap with Sherrod Brown, then we can lock down this seat.

[**Will you make your most generous contribution now to help us secure victory in Ohio?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa4c6ce4505548c68018d0948cf28d2a&_e=O0G4kZyjLCrDt1ByB-NZZHcArb9Cz6l8mUtcc0jeEaHR9Gzw8MXOjZpGrV3STnY3e2QXGdRKGeCo_ore27AJtYfwFeU9fH03iwsu1ZgI6T0sy4ypyhm0LqRo4KhSxT4AGZ-Ul4pDmpu4ljBvCT1FlGj7kuOOlf3bPHR2fRlFxXXkWpOYbfa4dONVu9Xlis1FxzxL01pL_VQVVmYLhRYztg8wwtV66JnBHMKmz8RLAqY94zHoObtDkFPktaW6Eo4Jlz1T-G5yLeC-YBXPZqX0x2C9eBfCfFys7s4F8FGFO0O7Zikj_oBHPswgrXVzwLHfIFnCcHoc0sIxxvn93eWa5b17oECXMeSydSPr2UYTdQowJnU7-PmJK3rES3Cs549BjxvTW0A55njj_kBMJbNWOQ%3D%3D)

Thank you, Peter.

_**Bernie Moreno**_
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa4c6ce4505548c68018d0948cf28d2a&_e=O0G4kZyjLCrDt1ByB-NZZHcArb9Cz6l8mUtcc0jeEaHR9Gzw8MXOjZpGrV3STnY3e2QXGdRKGeCo_ore27AJtYfwFeU9fH03iwsu1ZgI6T0sy4ypyhm0LqRo4KhSxT4AGZ-Ul4pDmpu4ljBvCT1FlGj7kuOOlf3bPHR2fRlFxXXkWpOYbfa4dONVu9Xlis1FxzxL01pL_VQVVmYLhRYztg8wwtV66JnBHMKmz8RLAqY94zHoObtDkFPktaW6Eo4J5O2AfXdkBOp51RoTp-_8bY8f9ckoajx51CiS3l2EdcMFqn9ktLAPyb6A8kgPkhXdpUiXGgBmeUXf4P8Eeyll_NxNohklMRbiu73YrHvXZUX2WFxJlIYf7mbSAiZzVSz9IBm-eM921shGsRkZh5BGow%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fa4c6ce4505548c68018d0948cf28d2a&_e=O0G4kZyjLCrDt1ByB-NZZHcArb9Cz6l8mUtcc0jeEaHR9Gzw8MXOjZpGrV3STnY3e2QXGdRKGeCo_ore27AJtYfwFeU9fH03iwsu1ZgI6T0sy4ypyhm0LqRo4KhSxT4AGZ-Ul4pDmpu4ljBvCT1FlGj7kuOOlf3bPHR2fRlFxXXkWpOYbfa4dONVu9Xlis1FxzxL01pL_VQVVmYLhRYztg8wwtV66JnBHMKmz8RLAqY94zHoObtDkFPktaW6Eo4JX7eVe3iBvkr607muRv5DocWE7-hxDXIf9qjgAsuWw1abo9tpridwGtLZYopKrhm9sY4gSYx9OwW5Moay7GkkEdYeMNZCaIu43_iVKNC4oOreCjztEqGCsKs-kDZdvClhwSM0OF3m1MYRqm_-32eEKA%3D%3D)

name: @Debbie shared a photo
subject: My first job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress.
| | |
---
Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline tonight. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $1 million end-of-week fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
**[(If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott this fall, you can chip in here to help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90621299/491114033/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1680-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcyN2YwY2MtZWM1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heuyk2vnOA63JchXzxSmRDrBZfRPp4Q1x4faDA3fz7g=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90621300/491114034/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1680-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcyN2YwY2MtZWM1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heuyk2vnOA63JchXzxSmRDrBZfRPp4Q1x4faDA3fz7g=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and _still_ struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
**So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop.** It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. **I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.**
**Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. ****I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change._And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign in November._**
[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen doughnuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you chip in before midnight to help me meet my end-of-week fundraising goal and defeat Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, and every single gift makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90621301/491114035/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1680-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcyN2YwY2MtZWM1Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heuyk2vnOA63JchXzxSmRDrBZfRPp4Q1x4faDA3fz7g=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out this evening because we have an important deadline tonight. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $1 million end-of-week fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. = = When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change.And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign in November. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
Next week in Manchester - Free Digital Activism Classes

** Free Digital Activism Training
------------------------------------------------------------

** August 12 - 16
------------------------------------------------------------

** 6pm - 8pm each night
------------------------------------------------------------

Liberty Digital Marketing is pleased to announce an in-person training that will take place August 12-16 in Manchester, NH. Classes will take place daily from 6:30 PM to approximately 8:00 PM.

Free dinner provided.

Monday August 12 - Intro to Digital Activism

Wednesday August 14 - AI Demystified

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Quad Cities, USA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RgHIjsZIeDf43Mlr-IotNQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRom1BBP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZqtGy7hm0BgsK1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, The Quad Cities are a pretty special place to call home. We’re a big, diverse and vibrant community that stretches across two states, separated only by the Mississippi River. If it wasn’t for the signage welcoming you to Illinois or Iowa, you wouldn’t know we were two states at all – it’s why I like to call our community “Quad Cities, USA.” **Unfortunately, though, in recent years it seems that the river between the two sides has grown a little wider – literally.** Flooding season on the Mississippi just passed and in Iowa, downtown areas flooded, streets were closed, and businesses had to shutter. I wish this was a one-off, but climate change has caused flooding like this to become an annual tradition, but not on both sides. You see, in Illinois, Democratic leaders took action. We funded and built a series of flood walls to protect our communities, businesses, and homes from what our neighbors experience across the river. The divide, unfortunately, doesn’t end there. **The two sides of the Quad Cities are even being separated by the rights we have.** In Illinois, a woman’s right to choose is protected in the state constitution, but just last week in Iowa, extremists leaders put into effect a 6-week abortion ban, stripping away a woman’s right to choose before most women even know they are pregnant. **Divisions like these are happening all over the country because extremist politicians are flooding governments with dangerous legislation, while ignoring the basic needs of their communities. We need fewer extremist politicians and more common-sense leaders who want to look after their neighbors, protect their community, and respect the rights of everyone.** [**Let’s work on that together, Peter. If you can, chip**$ 7** into my campaign to bring more IL-side, people-first thinking to the House.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/5ZEmR2JAVamq9gEnL87mQQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRom1BBP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEzLTIwMjQ_) | ****[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/5ZEmR2JAVamq9gEnL87mQQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRom1BBP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEzLTIwMjQ_)****
---
Happy Sunday. Be well!
\- Eric

body:
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug24.3TlJ8p&refcode=em240811-1-c&t=1&akid=5368%2E196590%2ELGiilb)
Friends — The excitement around the Harris-Walz presidential ticket is real. People across the country are fired up to reject the far-right at the polls and beat Donald Trump once again.
Here in Wisconsin, Trump was ahead by as much as 6 or 7 points in some polls just a month ago.**But Kamala Harris is turning the tide, fast.**
With three months until election day, we have more momentum than ever — which means NOW is the time to go all in.
The Long Run is working to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars for progressive candidates across the country, especially here in Wisconsin.
Every down-ballot candidate we support helps drive more voters out to the polls on election day. Voters who will help us defeat Donald Trump, hold the Senate majority, and elect more change-makers to Congress and statehouses than ever before.
We can’t let Wisconsin be the state that hands power to Trump and the far-right. So please, we’re asking for your help in continuing to build on the momentum of the last few weeks.
[**Can you make a donation and power our efforts to win in Wisconsin? November is getting closer by the day, and we’re running out of time to invest in change-making candidates.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug24.3TlJ8p&refcode=em240811-1-c&t=2&akid=5368%2E196590%2ELGiilb)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I want to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm counting on you to have my back again
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623447/491120799/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ4OTZmZC1mMDU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNmTxUPLt1yMWHWwS2RCDbqsrPjTz88to3kZCVxkmyE=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 14 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act and is helping to stop the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York in 2022. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave this November — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before my midnight deadline tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623448/491120800/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ4OTZmZC1mMDU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNmTxUPLt1yMWHWwS2RCDbqsrPjTz88to3kZCVxkmyE=)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623453/491120805/1575385346?refcode=jtk5269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ4OTZmZC1mMDU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNmTxUPLt1yMWHWwS2RCDbqsrPjTz88to3kZCVxkmyE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in November, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Republicans. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623454/491120806/1575385346?refcode=jtk5269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ4OTZmZC1mMDU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNmTxUPLt1yMWHWwS2RCDbqsrPjTz88to3kZCVxkmyE=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623455/491120807/1575385346?refcode=jtk5269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ4OTZmZC1mMDU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNmTxUPLt1yMWHWwS2RCDbqsrPjTz88to3kZCVxkmyE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Joe Biden
subject: Take a look at this picture, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
It's been four years since I picked Kamala as my running mate, and it’s been the best decision I've made. | | |

Peter, take a look at this picture of Kamala and me. clean_body: It's been four years since I picked Kamala as my running mate, and it’s been the best decision I've made. | | | Peter, take a look at this picture of Kamala and me. On this day four years ago I asked her to join my campaign as my running mate, and it’s been the best decision I've made. Kamala's sharp. She's tough. She's going to make one hell of a president. It warms my heart to see how this grassroots team has embraced Kamala. Thank you, Peter, in particular for doing your part to support her campaign. But we can't take our foot off the gas. It's time we redouble our efforts to defeat Donald Trump and JD Vance at the ballot box. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Kamala and Tim need you. I hope you'll have their backs as you've had mine. Thank you, Joe Joe Biden President of the United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Joyce Craig
subject: proud to announce our Energy Independence and Climate Protection Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623584/491120869/47545062?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024_header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=)

Peter,

For New Hampshire’s families, businesses, and communities to thrive, we need affordable, reliable energy and a healthy environment.

That’s why I was proud to announce our campaign’s [ Energy Independence and Climate Protection Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623585/491120870/848865482?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.08.11_ENERGYPOLICY_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=&emci=a58e59d8-5a56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=bdef118d-f157-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=22452673) alongside local energy and climate leaders this week. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623586/491120871/-722033815?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.08.11_ENERGYPOLICY_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=&emci=a58e59d8-5a56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=bdef118d-f157-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=22452673) If you’re on board with reducing New Hampshire’s carbon footprint and protecting our state for future generations, [ can you endorse our Energy Independence and Climate Protection Plan and help us fight for a clean energy future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623587/491120872/-722033815?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.08.11_ENERGYPOLICY_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=&emci=a58e59d8-5a56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=bdef118d-f157-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=22452673) | [**ADD YOUR NAME >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623588/491120873/-722033815?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.08.11_ENERGYPOLICY_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=&emci=a58e59d8-5a56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=bdef118d-f157-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=22452673)
---
New Hampshire is at an energy crossroads, Peter.

As the price of fossil fuels continues to rise, innovation in green energy has made solar, wind, and battery storage cheaper and more reliable than ever.

I know how to make changes that reduce costs and help protect our climate. During my time as Mayor of New Hampshire’s largest city, we built the largest solar array in New Hampshire, lowered energy costs and led the state in clean energy.

**As Governor, I'll work with our communities to lower energy costs and protect our environment!**

[If you’re with me, can you sign off on our Energy Independence and Climate Protection Plan? We still need [6] more responses from 18326.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90623589/491120874/-722033815?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.08.11_ENERGYPOLICY_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVmMTE4ZC1mMTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjfRFRtXIseV5BmlO7b3-uz5yqW0L4hdJn6shZJdyis=&emci=a58e59d8-5a56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=bdef118d-f157-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=22452673)

Joyce Craig

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: One of the best ways you can support Lucas Kunce over the next 12 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Recurring donations allow our campaign to confidently budget for all the important things we’ll need to win this race.
#
It’s been a big week for our campaign, Peter.
Lucas officially became the nominee to replace Josh Hawley. We released our first TV ad of the general election. We accepted more than five debate invitations. And Hawley’s campaign placed their first major TV ad buy — spending $1 MILLION to blast Missourians with false attacks about Lucas.
**Over the next 12 weeks, our campaign needs all hands on deck to keep fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters on TV, online, and on the ground. One of the best ways you can help us do that is by setting up a weekly recurring donation of $20, $10, or even just $5 today.**
**[START A WEEKLY RECURRING DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66285?refcode=em20240811-7301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7301%2E614464%2EsEyo0n)**
Recurring donations allow our campaign to confidently budget for all the important things we’ll need to win this race — reserving time for our ads, planning events across the state, printing literature about Lucas, and so much more.
**[So Peter, will you generously take your first step in supporting our campaign by setting up a weekly recurring donation of $20, $10, or even just $5 today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66285?refcode=em20240811-7301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7301%2E614464%2EsEyo0n) You can cancel your recurring donation at any time if your budget changes, and it will automatically end after November’s election!**
**[START A WEEKLY RECURRING DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66285?refcode=em20240811-7301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7301%2E614464%2EsEyo0n)**
This is our one and only chance to defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat — and we can’t do it without your help.
Thank you for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

|

Hey y'all, it's Harry. I wanted to personally reach out to you today while I'm in the great state of Michigan, meeting with Democrats across the state to support the Harris-Walz ticket. It's still wild to me that I'm here – working alongside one of the most historic campaigns of our lives.

A few years ago, I was just a Capitol Police Officer who protected the folks in and out of that building. **_But that all changed when Donald Trump instructed his violent supporters to storm the Capitol._**

That was a dark day for our democracy. People lost their lives. Officers, myself included, still battle the PTSD till this very day. And now, Donald Trump is just one election away from being back in power and back in a position to incite more violence.

Make no mistake about it – Trump will demolish our democracy. There will be no option B if he retakes the White House.

I created Dunn's Democracy Defenders to help stop MAGA-extremism and elect Democrats who will uphold the sanctity of our democracy. And right now, we need your grassroots support. Will you please rush an urgent donation to help us fight for democracy and defeat Donald Trump?

clean_body: | =# Hey y'all, it's Harry. I wanted to personally reach out to you today while I'm in the great state of Michigan, meeting with Democrats across the state to support the Harris-Walz ticket. = | = It's still wild to me that I'm here – working alongside one of the most historic campaigns of our lives. A few years ago, I was just a Capitol Police Officer who protected the folks in and out of that building. But that all changed when Donald Trump instructed his violent supporters to storm the Capitol. That was a dark day for our democracy. People lost their lives. Officers, myself included, still battle the PTSD till this very day. And now, Donald Trump is just one election away from being back in power and back in a position to incite more violence. Make no mistake about it – Trump will demolish our democracy. There will be no option B if he retakes the White House. I created Dunn's Democracy Defenders to help stop MAGA-extremism and elect Democrats who will uphold the sanctity of our democracy. And right now, we need your grassroots support. Will you please rush an urgent donation to help us fight for democracy and defeat Donald Trump? = | = ---|--- = | = = | = More to come, Harry = Dunn's Democracy Defenders 401 2nd Avenue South Suite 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States | Paid for by Dunn's Democracy Defenders PAC

clean_body: I'm not sure if you've been getting my emails | = Folks, hi – me again. 👋 I’m not sure if you’ve been getting my emails. I’ve reached out a few times since the start of August, but I think I’ve hit a wall. Here’s why: our fundraising has gone into the gutter. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Look, I know the easy option is X’ing out of emails like these. But, the truth is that they’re an important part of our campaign strategy. Much of our fundraising relies on what supporters like you give through the emails you get from me and my team. So, when fewer people are opening and reading these emails, our fundraising dips as a result. That means less raised, and less invested in our campaign. And with six Republicans vying to defeat me, we need to be firing on all cylinders to keep this seat out of their hands. = 🙏 If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for reading, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. name: Mark Hamill
subject: we MUST defeat Republican Larry Hogan in Maryland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/29872?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2204%2E52803%2ENHiolX ][IMG]

I cannot overstate the danger of a Senate controlled by the
GOP, Peter.

In order to maintain balance and keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we
must do everything in our power to elect my friend Angela Alsobrooks as
the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/29872?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2204%2E52803%2ENHiolX ]But Republican Larry Hogan is standing in our way, and he’s backed by
some of the absolute worst characters in the GOP. Can I count on you to
join me in helping Angela defeat her Trump-endorsed opponent?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/29872?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2204%2E52803%2ENHiolX ]Donate

Angela Alsobrooks has dedicated her career to putting Marylanders and
their families first.

Everything she does, every campaign decision she and her team make, is
done with the goal of increasing opportunity, equity, and a sense of
community.

But Mitch McConnell is chomping at the bit for the opportunity to flip
Maryland red, stoking fear, hatred, and division along the way.

McConnell and his dark money super PACs want to buy this seat and install
Republican Larry Hogan to give them the Senate majority they need to pass
a national abortion ban, eliminate protections for the LGBTQ+ community,
and doom our planet to the climate crisis.

It’s going to take a true, grassroots alliance to overcome Hogan and the
GOP in Maryland, and I’m helping Angela however I can.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/29872?t=1012&amount=25&akid=2204%2E52803%2ENHiolX ]Will you join me in supporting Angela’s campaign to defeat Larry Hogan,
defend our razor-thin Senate majority, and give Marylanders another
champion in the Senate?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Thank you for everything you do in support of our

Peter.

Let’s make the Force strong with Angela by voting for her in November.

– Mark Hamill

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Today I need your help
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important... | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=209982a5b96e4d259216d5223e522810&_t=ogx7jixWKRtXi7fLoQbEsJ94OsziVpxdEj9yyo_mQXzCXsyv2EvdtTtFSs9SENXRpgIk_IiUaf7C2TkJpAHszkiTMGGglruGaywjcJDtfiMjLjmlWy3ae9Lp1siVVCpg)_
---
|
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=209982a5b96e4d259216d5223e522810&_e=N-MwSYLdBb2dXKpSlRkwVxasnykV_7UwGkxX2ppJpmomgLHPcOZ13QQWRpIx-ZzWc8Wc-TRYwcEFUAXoc1g1NJ4LpieaK3NkkgPp-hYsPxDiXVmEAQjBOZ-_3lWpV3TOYBvhGeliWG4C-IXqu9FQj9R5sEbZFuWmSRYtQGQk9o8CAVmdB9XyKuvW3LkfqWPd7jbPjypdJe1omj4-55-gUDEPwQwYlDqvCJmU5W96zVaxpVhPe4pG_6UNzcV_Rwe0_ZLr53crSsQ9jv1gv0KS3EQ-kE9EnNws770tmfekhH_--iiZr0susKA6ojSFTDoKAMm_soVrRyGlDx5y_Qs45fGT4WHCLs-j28srV8akIEXEI72oLgBwwZLWwFZmY_mEpYCkdpClNLk7WdMgSjMWeir3lXMnIMf--3IVkTo7eLo%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal.

Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=209982a5b96e4d259216d5223e522810&_e=N-MwSYLdBb2dXKpSlRkwVxasnykV_7UwGkxX2ppJpmomgLHPcOZ13QQWRpIx-ZzWc8Wc-TRYwcEFUAXoc1g1NJ4LpieaK3NkkgPp-hYsPxDiXVmEAQjBOZ-_3lWpV3TOYBvhGeliWG4C-IXqu9FQj9R5sEbZFuWmSRYtQGQk9o8CAVmdB9XyKuvW3LkfqWPd7jbPjypdJe1omj4-55-gUDEPwQwYlDqvCJmU5W96zVaxpVhPe4pG_6UNzcV_Rwe0_ZLr53crSsQ9jv1gv0KS3OwBzJxLe8l2hrgwpladVsDR7dlEbxIQES_KSKb35gbUZfzX0jirQ24tslA4eAeCcs1qoSqFfh_Fs3tTckzK8nvCbUgpIC7FutEwAMzUXv_C_n3b0_hxJVav86onrnvp3md1DwyMiKSoh-C0gCgbjUo%3D) **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.**

Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him.

I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief.

I believe that you believe that too.

I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment.

The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. **[**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=209982a5b96e4d259216d5223e522810&_e=N-MwSYLdBb2dXKpSlRkwVxasnykV_7UwGkxX2ppJpmomgLHPcOZ13QQWRpIx-ZzWc8Wc-TRYwcEFUAXoc1g1NJ4LpieaK3NkkgPp-hYsPxDiXVmEAQjBOZ-_3lWpV3TOYBvhGeliWG4C-IXqu9FQj9R5sEbZFuWmSRYtQGQk9o8CAVmdB9XyKuvW3LkfqWPd7jbPjypdJe1omj4-55-gUDEPwQwYlDqvCJmU5W96zVaxpVhPe4pG_6UNzcV_Rwe0_ZLr53crSsQ9jv1gv0KS3KuIwAzFqIE1JjXITpzlssbiX8Z0O2SRmLJDjgcPmafGYfqHARklenfY1mqb9IsNgbdQDV8jTplERBsmjbei7ACSPDGUn_sMOxPnYh6vyFwpSOeHsWBtd1J3MOGv7HYNeK9NhZp9BcsWgabbcnmoXl4%3D)**

I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn?

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=209982a5b96e4d259216d5223e522810&_e=N-MwSYLdBb2dXKpSlRkwVxasnykV_7UwGkxX2ppJpmomgLHPcOZ13QQWRpIx-ZzWc8Wc-TRYwcEFUAXoc1g1NJ4LpieaK3NkkgPp-hYsPxDiXVmEAQjBOZ-_3lWpV3TOYBvhGeliWG4C-IXqu9FQj9R5sEbZFuWmSRYtQGQk9o8CAVmdB9XyKuvW3LkfqWPd7jbPjypdJe1omj4-55-gUDEPwQwYlDqvCJmU5W96zVaxpVhPe4pG_6UNzcV_Rwe0_ZLr53crSsQ9jv1gv0KS3DOfAbwivX4vGtcb5zQhD3BBf80GL0dzKSfg1TyXyYGbBqgUr3MlwZCZQlMDB_QPRzZMjzyGxjp3EJaT2lhjRrR9fRt-4hl1QhQplVxyWq0NOiyMYGF4dZ2Xi4WQJkbWadkb_uw2QAy1fVeJ1GyWcIo%3D)

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: John Kennedy
subject: Help me, Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You're my only hope.

->

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=703740.100.1.820c3fb088f7f3b5e8dd55b5090e4c8e )<-

**You know me, and you know I'll always tell it like it is, so let me lay it out for you; I'm about as nervous as a cat in a room full of rocking chairs because my advisors have just given me a hot, steaming batch of _BAD NEWS._**

My campaign's losing funds, we're running into the red here, and the only thing that can save it - is an EMERGENCY fundraising deadline.

I know, you've heard this before - BUT let me tell you, I'd greatly appreciate anything that you could contribute; according to my financial team, we just need **$15,000 in grassroots fundraising to gain the momentum we need.**

-> **_I'd be happy as a hog in mud if you could contribute ANYTHING towards my deadline._** <-

**RUSH ANYTHING** ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=703740.101.1.3d224bae60056c7dabddf419ee5cfc93 )

**Thank you for all your support. I will never let you down, and I hope you can lend me your support. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=703740.107.1.a1ee2ccc8b5280847ccf8ebdf9a8892f )**

Best,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/53401?id=703740.108.1.ca8d96609f88d06286a3fbdd241b8745 )

Senator Kennedy

Friend, I just got some news from my campaign manager that I needed to share with you:

**National Republicans are outspending us on TV to launch nasty attack ads and flip this seat. Now, the latest polls show me neck and neck with my MAGA opponent.**

With experts from _CNN_ to _Politico_ saying our race could decide Senate control, we cannot afford to be outspent and drowned out with less than 100 days until the election.

That's why we have to keep our TV ads running all the way through Election Day. **But unless we close our budget gap, our ads could go dark, and we'd cede the airwaves to Republican attacks.**

name: Jon Tester
subject: The significance of $12
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
Folks, I have a big favor to ask:
Will you make a split donation of $12 (the price of one of my signature flattop haircuts) to help us reach 50,000 grassroots donations before our mid-month deadline? Montana’s Senate race will be won by a handful of votes, and my team needs even more resources to stand up to the millions of dollars outside groups are throwing my way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $12 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester?express_lane=true&amount=12]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
Thousands of folks have chipped in since we launched this campaign. And whether you’ve given $5, $50, or $500, I couldn’t be more grateful to have your support. Your donation helps us show pundits and my opponent that we have grassroots momentum on our side.
Trust me, I know how far a few bucks can go: My flattop haircut costs just $12.
In all seriousness, we’ve got our work cut for us. Outside groups are spending up a storm to defeat me. My multimillionaire opponent has already cut his campaign $2.4 million from his own wallet. And virtually every election expert ranks this race as a toss-up.
It would mean a lot to have your support in this race because every donation goes a long way. Even $12.
So, will you split $12 or more to help us reach our goal so I can bring this race home? We’ve got less than 100 days until the election, so let’s get it done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Breaking down your $10 donation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re asking you for $10 today to retake the initiative against JD Vance and Trump for attacking Tim Walz. But this isn’t $10 we’re going to set aside for a rainy day.
#
Peter —
We’re asking you for $10 today to retake the initiative against JD Vance and Trump for attacking Tim Walz.
But this isn’t $10 we’re going to set aside for a rainy day. We’ve been playing defense so far, but now we’re raising to go on offense against these liars. So let us break that $10 donation down for you:
If you chip in $1, that’s worth about **1000 views** for a digital advertisement.
$10, that’s **10,000 views.**
$100 — **100,000 views.**
$1000 — **1,000,000 views.**
This is an arms race, and we’ve got to build up our arsenal. **We’re working on raising $150,000 right now** , and if everybody reading this chipped in just $10 we’d hit that goal in the blink of an eye.
But not everyone donates. Not everyone can afford it, and not everyone understands how important their $10 is.
That’s why it’s so important that you chip in, Peter. VoteVets is one of the only organizations in the game who can take on this fight, but we can’t do it without your help.
So, can we count on you?
[**Make a donation of $10 to VoteVets today and help us reach this goal so we can go on offense against JD Vance and Trump. We wouldn’t be asking you if this was not so important.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.ccu_CS&refcode=em240811-1-30&t=1&akid=26298%2E3013755%2EaktXBF)**

name: Hamm, Jon
subject: Missouri’s U.S. Senate race needs your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
There’s an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626022/491126938/1079316600?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=&emci=80cb0ad8-7256-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=c2996dfd-f657-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=11913588) To unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=Tw1Sw%2Bha2J04ALv05tF4HGlD%2FMkN2eRwDs8pq4fB7%2BHDZvipGlCb31at5gU6wvtNqzI3GOu97Qg9VL2%2FfqAVeK1V7D5Af63ct18wlAZXgS%2F3XcwHPi6r1E%2BjsgvpdVxLC1EDDVA%2F2E7JODpfhpNyuEvHMolLordyR%2Fh6v29hIrlTtgitkoRrG3YtdGIvY9gLH7x%2Bxt2ijlvrVNeSsy7%2BzYwm2jhS1Z2d8Sql%2FkdQVdd7y4cD8rKkUq3zCKSB0%2FCtn8fnaVB0O3A1y1%2BIOtNjV4rSifAspWqG0eUUwAo9%2BkOk3qFqPxDtIN80MjZg%2BCRY3O53YA75goMwyA7AGm5zEMEKGdCxx%2B58rczUjaP1f3JF2cMqiznr3ww74CGdqea4AyGy3Ehb96HrzG1hHhZoOmo79%2Fanbu8NGo%2BYImJ0QokW9GU0wAXMudlqqjHzPPVS)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626023/491126939/2113074009?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=) Hey there, it's Jon Hamm. **There's an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about.** So before I ask you to support my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please let me explain why no one can afford to sit on the sidelines in this race. | | [**DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626024/491126940/2113074009?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=)
---
Let's start at the beginning. When I first got to know Lucas, his story resonated with me. He's a born-and-raised Missourian who knows the real value of community — helping each other out, for better or for worse.
Growing up, his parents went bankrupt from his youngest sister's medical bills and his family survived on the support of their friends and neighbors. After getting to college on a Pell Grant, Lucas decided to join the U.S. Marine Corps to honor the community that had given his family so much. He served for 13 years, including three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan before later being stationed at the Pentagon.
Once he left active duty, Lucas turned his focus to the corrupt politicians and corporate monopolies that dominate our economy and squeeze small businesses. He took on everyone from Big Tech and Big Ag to defense contractors and pharmaceutical companies.
**Now, Lucas is running to defeat January 6th coward Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real, everyday people.**
| [**ELECT LUCAS KUNCE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626025/491126968/2113074009?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=)
---
Let's just be clear here: Hawley's January 6th cowardice isn't the only reason he's incapable of representing my home state.
**Since he was elected to office, Josh Hawley hasn't fought to bring even $0.01 back to our communities — but he’s had plenty of time to make money for himself.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626026/491126969/2113074009?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=)
While giant corporations strip our state of opportunity and jack up prices, Hawley is only focused on enriching himself. He’s made hundreds of thousands of dollars more than his congressional salary by selling his weird book all about _"Manhood."_
**All this, while he made taxpayers cover the cost of his own lawbreaking.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90626027/491126970/2113074009?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.11_KunceHamm_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5NmRmZC1mNjU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23CJMn44b2Sw_kYZ5-ql4ZF00831uGd6kzVjiKuX73Q=)
Missouri can't afford another six years of Hawley in the Senate, folks, and voters of all stripes seem to agree.
**_Morning Consult_ reported that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican incumbent up for re-election this November.** And even Hawley's own former mentor, Missouri's three-term Republican U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was _"the worst decision I've ever made in my life."_
After spending a whole year consolidating support from workers, community leaders, and organizations across Missouri, Lucas Kunce has more than proved that he has what it takes to win this race. Multiple polls even confirm he's in a dead heat with Hawley. That’s why I'm asking for your help, folks:
[**Will you join me in supporting my friend Lucas Kunce by splitting a donation of any amount between his campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today? clean_body: There’s an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about. You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = Hey there, it's Jon Hamm. There's an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about. So before I ask you to support my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please let me explain why no one can afford to sit on the sidelines in this race. | | = Let's start at the beginning. When I first got to know Lucas, his story resonated with me. He's a born-and-raised Missourian who knows the real value of community — helping each other out, for better or for worse. Growing up, his parents went bankrupt from his youngest sister's medical bills and his family survived on the support of their friends and neighbors. After getting to college on a Pell Grant, Lucas decided to join the U.S. Marine Corps to honor the community that had given his family so much. He served for 13 years, including three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan before later being stationed at the Pentagon. Once he left active duty, Lucas turned his focus to the corrupt politicians and corporate monopolies that dominate our economy and squeeze small businesses. He took on everyone from Big Tech and Big Ag to defense contractors and pharmaceutical companies. Now, Lucas is running to defeat January 6th coward Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real, everyday people. | = Let's just be clear here: Hawley's January 6th cowardice isn't the only reason he's incapable of representing my home state. Since he was elected to office, Josh Hawley hasn't fought to bring even $0.01 back to our communities — but he’s had plenty of time to make money for himself. = While giant corporations strip our state of opportunity and jack up prices, Hawley is only focused on enriching himself. He’s made hundreds of thousands of dollars more than his congressional salary by selling his weird book all about "Manhood." All this, while he made taxpayers cover the cost of his own lawbreaking. = Missouri can't afford another six years of Hawley in the Senate, folks, and voters of all stripes seem to agree. Morning Consult reported that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican incumbent up for re-election this November. And even Hawley's own former mentor, Missouri's three-term Republican U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was "the worst decision I've ever made in my life." After spending a whole year consolidating support from workers, community leaders, and organizations across Missouri, Lucas Kunce has more than proved that he has what it takes to win this race. Multiple polls even confirm he's in a dead heat with Hawley. That’s why I'm asking for your help, folks: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Lucas Kunce and Lisa Blunt Rochester: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Lucas won't be another shady, corrupt politician. He's put his money where his mouth is since day one — refusing to accept any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives. He's running to be a real warrior for working Missourians, unbeholden to anyone other than the everyday people who elected him to office. Lucas will fight for investment in our state — rebuilding forgotten communities, creating jobs, and empowering workers. He'll stand up to the attacks on reproductive rights by controlling politicians like Hawley. He'll work to end the corporate grip on power in our country, by banning insider trading and abolishing corporate PACs. And he'll be accountable to real, everyday Missourians. I can't tell you how excited I am about everything we'll be able to accomplish in Missouri with Lucas fighting for us in the Senate, folks. | | Peter, Ron DeSantis’ fascism is seeping into new territory, and if we don’t stop it right now, every Florida student’s future is at risk.

And as a Florida representative, as someone who grew up in public schools in Florida, and as someone who sees Florida youth affected by DeSantis’ fascist policies, this is personal to me.

It’s also undeniable: DeSantis has proven again and again that he _does not care_ about protecting our youth. Instead, he and his extremist buddies are going after education at every school grade level in Florida, depriving students of their basic rights.

**We need to stand as a collective to keep DeSantis and all his far-right extreme cronies from putting Florida youth in danger. But I have to be able to fund this fight – and I’m falling short of my End-of-Summer goal.**

[**_This public deadline is the perfect time to show the Florida GOP we're ready to fight back at full force. Please, Peter: Help me stand against Ron DeSantis and his fascist agenda by donating $27 to my End-of-Summer goal >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/RaK9x3qzVpfWwoR2TTKhJQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRom1-JP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDgxMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9mbHlvdXRoX2VuX3JzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJrUXJtSU5RcTkzN0loQnpHZDlXdTZ4NzB0eiZyZWZjb2RlMj0ya1FybUlOUXE5MzdJaEJ6R2Q5V3U2eDcwdHomcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmtRcm1JTlFxOTM3SWhCekdkOVd1Nng3MHR6VwNzcGNCCmaridq4ZqOTNytSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter, DeSantis has implemented _ruthless_ policies that directly impact students across all of Florida - starting in elementary and making its way up to universities in the state:
* He’s banned books in all public schools that erase Black and Brown history - even the books you’d least expect.
* He’s directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, with his “Don’t Say Gay” bill - and specifically attacking trans youth, by prohibiting them to get the gender-affirming care they need.
* And of course, proposed a permitless carry bill - that will put hundreds of thousands of Florida students in immediate danger.

This list goes on and on – but these issues alone are enough to take a stand against DeSantis and get him out of office, along with all his far-right MAGA buddies, who are only in it for themselves.

Peter, I ran for Congress because I’ve been fighting people like DeSantis for years, but I know I could not do it alone. So I am asking you to support our movement to fight back against these horrific policies that hurt students and undermine our Democracy. [**_My End-of-Summer deadline is approaching. I need you to donate $27 toward my goal so when the reports of our fundraising efforts come out, the far-right extremists squirm at our results and realize we have strength in numbers they lack. I have a big announcement to share with you.

|

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wU-Dy_LPnUr1MkjeaD9KLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRom3LyP0RPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODExJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXVjblcDc3BjQgpmq9bcuGbvsxtOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Friend,

I have a big announcement to share with you.

First, remember what we’re up against in the 2024 election:
* We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last.
* Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country.
* Uniparty politicians in D.C. don’t care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests.

Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it’s in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU.

Since I ended my presidential campaign, I’ve considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement:

**Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation._I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024_!**

[As a personal favor to me, can you please donate $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 before midnight and help Turning Point PAC fund ballot chasers?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wU-Dy_LPnUr1MkjeaD9KLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRom3LyP0RPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODExJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXVjblcDc3BjQgpmq9bcuGbvsxtOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

The media continues to lie to us.

The justice system is politicized.

And America-last politicians in D.C. don’t care about it.

Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It’s not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. The August 20th primary election is right around the corner, Peter! I have enjoyed every minute of my time meeting Alaskans across our great state. From the challenges to the good stories, our people have heart and true grit. The support for this Alaska-First campaign is palpable. Governor Dunleavy and President Trump have been extremely supportive as we fight to retire Mary Peltola. I look forward to seeing you on the trail over the next week and a half. Warm regards,
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=f614d62aa40640a7ac1d4d7df682b73f&_e=7eB_WUVy3rjckkUuShuGB1rRwU7o_QtukTn733uJeKBrOOSVq0s0hBm3MfxZtiWL01jvvWpw2Id6wdBqIsvl1eyMSjmuLjJeoxdtJlWQkxFe8hvIYZdVgEVMOIk1q963npracl1lMdJqYZ4e93qiCBoCyytaZqMLClGnwHvgLI3EUxUGwcXTXO13max2BSjNrBn0BeFHchZj9P0_24H5NBnJYNDEcBmUTJESzkEZt0nypmCn8Em-ZCe8PA5VkcvVEACpGkeFyI1zuIncerSPny9yGY2hLg8ODnI4bkf3IXwbeVups_lu_KYcm_Rg95Vc-OrdnJiFvjm0ClusxCuoWc30389sTl65bc0xeJ_HWR8%3D)

Trump** **✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska** **✅ Anne Garland Young, _Widow of Don Young_** **✅ Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA)** **✅ International Union of Police Associations** **✅ Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America** **✅ Congressional Leadership Fund** **✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson** **✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik** **✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise** **✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer** **✅ Winning for Women PAC** **✅ WY Congresswoman Harriet Hageman** **✅ E-PAC** **✅ Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC**

| | |
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=f614d62aa40640a7ac1d4d7df682b73f&_e=7eB_WUVy3rjckkUuShuGB1rRwU7o_QtukTn733uJeKBrOOSVq0s0hBm3MfxZtiWL01jvvWpw2Id6wdBqIsvl1eyMSjmuLjJeoxdtJlWQkxFe8hvIYZdVgEVMOIk1q963npracl1lMdJqYZ4e93qiCBoCyytaZqMLClGnwHvgLI3EUxUGwcXTXO13max2BSjNMTN0-h7xj2sMfvR5SJ-dTWI6AuDWspPPZ8yRAdr0FceOcHz7O-vnu8QmdYvxxVIrZ8smaFp_0drYbY7qzIx3HifG-fIAfrwyOTvtH0yCwBY6LL5kuSYKVtEZic31X5cTWP8PGxxHLMdsbQy8duts-cjzrCXk6Vc9g66iLMdEXUs%3D)
---
**The NRCC Puts Our Campaign
On The "Young Guns" List**
---
I was thrilled to be named in the first wave of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Guns Program. It’s time to get our country back on track, which is why I am honored to be named to NRCC’s Young Guns Program in my race to defeat liberal Mary Peltola. I have a proven record of fighting for Alaskans and winning, and that’s exactly what I will do when I get to Washington, DC. During my interview, I talked about a number of important issues facing Alaskans, my congressional campaign to unseat Mary Peltola, and why I was endorsed by President Trump.

**When asked about my run for Congress and my priorities I responded –** _“I’m running to serve Alaskans and the first thing I want to work on in DC is getting our border closed. We don’t have any national security with open borders, and once we have our border closed, I strongly believe we need to revamp our immigration system. I do not understand why it can take 10 years for somebody to legally come into our country."_ _
_**When asked about President Trump, I said –** _“Well, I do have an endorsement from him, which I’m happy about. I’ll tell you how I feel about him. He was fantastic for the state of Alaska. He opened things up. He was going to allow the Keystone Pipeline. All these other things that would have benefited Alaska and what I know for a fact is that every time he talked to the governor, he said, ‘What can I do for Alaska?’ I know he loves Alaska. He’s familiar with what we need. I feel confident that, should he be elected, that on day one he will unleash our resources. ”_ To read more about what I had to share with the Kodiak Daily Mirror, click **[here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=f614d62aa40640a7ac1d4d7df682b73f&_e=7eB_WUVy3rjckkUuShuGB79tn9RUM1uGsWpoNnQu_Vh4e04FYNr3ywwIBL7ePc8CPq0H8Blet0ORLA-Zbo6OqgMp3_gwk3ostjE6vrJHuxAOLvHNShanwoDwLwnX6uR-OFxHiyndO-T3TTKrX6fmAyQwqFQcjgntl60jGgXsdGwu-_pOcEvmJ40MPs0RI5v0fsKuTdYHXGd9mXp7TMuqP7FRFBtrmEDLpNvXl0m5nEcvzgdoas13Ma6ief5N0t2OaPC7rA4QJbRmsxyBugb_GEW_EhxUf5B9kGYWTRqsyuw%3D).**

clean_body: | | | The August 20th primary election is right around the corner, Peter! I have enjoyed every minute of my time meeting Alaskans across our great state. From the challenges to the good stories, our people have heart and true grit. The support for this Alaska-First campaign is palpable. Governor Dunleavy and President Trump have been extremely supportive as we fight to retire Mary Peltola. I look forward to seeing you on the trail over the next week and a half. Warm regards, Nancy Dahlstrom Republican Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We've built a LARGE team over the last 9 months! We still have a long ways to go, but I am grateful for the support of leaders across and state and our country! ✅President Donald J. Trump ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young ✅ Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA) ✅ International Union of Police Associations ✅ Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC ✅ WY Congresswoman Harriet Hageman ✅ E-PAC ✅ Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC | | | The NRCC Puts Our Campaign On The "Young Guns" List I was thrilled to be named in the first wave of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Guns Program. It’s time to get our country back on track, which is why I am honored to be named to NRCC’s Young Guns Program in my race to defeat liberal Mary Peltola. I have a proven record of fighting for Alaskans and winning, and that’s exactly what I will do when I get to Washington, DC. Mary Peltola has voted in lockstep with the Biden-Harris administration’s anti-Alaska agenda. This November, we have an opportunity to vote for real change. “Extreme House Democrats’ border, crime and cost of living crises wrecked Americans’ safety and security. Fortunately, these Republican candidates are already well on their way to running winning campaigns that will grow our House majority in November.” \- NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson | My Interview With The Kodiak Daily Mirror In case you missed it, I recently made a campaign stop in Kodiak where I sat down for an interview with the Kodiak Daily Mirror. During my interview, I talked about a number of important issues facing Alaskans, my congressional campaign to unseat Mary Peltola, and why I was endorsed by President Trump. When asked about my run for Congress and my priorities I responded – “I’m running to serve Alaskans and the first thing I want to work on in DC is getting our border closed. We don’t have any national security with open borders, and once we have our border closed, I strongly believe we need to revamp our immigration system. I do not understand why it can take 10 years for somebody to legally come into our country." When asked about President Trump, I said – “Well, I do have an endorsement from him, which I’m happy about. I’ll tell you how I feel about him. He was fantastic for the state of Alaska. He opened things up. He was going to allow the Keystone Pipeline. All these other things that would have benefited Alaska and what I know for a fact is that every time he talked to the governor, he said, ‘What can I do for Alaska?’ I know he loves Alaska. He’s familiar with what we need. I feel confident that, should he be elected, that on day one he will unleash our resources. ” To read more about what I had to share with the Kodiak Daily Mirror, click . | Public Safety Employees Association Endorses My Campaign Recently, The Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA) announced their endorsement of my campaign for U.S. Congress. The PSEA represents law enforcement personnel across the state of Alaska. With crime on the rise across the country, public safety has been front and center in American politics. The PSEA announced their endorsement of my campaign citing my years of dedication to public safety and my promise of pro-police leadership when I serve Alaska in Washington. | On the Trail I LOVE getting to meet so many great Alaskans on the campaign trail. Check out some pictures from our travels: | | From the Ketchikan Blueberry Festival... | | | | | to Touring the Fairbanks Foodbank... | | | | | & Talking with Fishermen & Processors in Kodiak! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | With the Paris Olympics coming to an end and Team USA's victories capturing everyone’s enthusiasm, it's the perfect time to channel that excitement into supporting our campaign! Show your commitment to putting AMERICA FIRST this election season by grabbing one of our "America First Alaskans" items today. Grab yours | It is clear that Mary Peltola’s record is marked by decisions that are out of touch with the needs and priorities of Alaskan families. Her recent vote to lock up ANWR not only undermines Alaska’s economic and energy security but also fails to reflect the interests of her constituents. | Thank you for diving into the latest edition of the Dahlstrom Dispatch! Our goal is to restore our conservative voice in Congress, and with your support, we can make it happen. If financial contributions aren't possible for you at the moment, don’t worry! There are numerous other ways you can support this campaign. Whether it's volunteering your time, spreading the word, or simply staying engaged, every bit of support counts. | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? If so, below to sign up for our Dahlstrom Dispatch and never miss a beat! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

**TO: Gov. Tim Walz**
**FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Congratulations!🥳** Dear Gov. Tim Walz,

**Congratulations on being selected as VP Harris’ running mate for the vice presidency!**

You are a stark reminder of what we need more in politics – honesty, a heart made for service, and a deep love for this country!

Your resume is top notch! **From serving in our military, to lowering medical costs for Americans, and expanding access to reproductive healthcare** – you’ve proven that you’re committed to improving the lives of ALL Americans!

I strongly support you and VP Harris as you fight _for_ Americans and _against_ the MAGA extremism Donald Trump is trying to corrode our democracy with!

[That's why I’m signing this letter and sending a small donation of $7 with Democracy On The Line now to ensure we can defend the White House and our democracy from MAGA extremism this November! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90627103/491130954/-1133837067?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20240811_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZTVjM2MxLWZhNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z3-WquCA9vcDwDmGpGXPm3tdh-Q98JTR5LBQpOgYalk=) | [1,482 SPOTS LEFT: PITCH IN $7 NOW TO CONGRATULATE TIM WALZ »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90627104/491130955/-1133837067?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20240811_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZTVjM2MxLWZhNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z3-WquCA9vcDwDmGpGXPm3tdh-Q98JTR5LBQpOgYalk=)

| | |

All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**
Black Americans have long faced _far too many_ obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.
**The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.**
I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign.
**To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.[Please, will you donate to my campaign and Maggie Hassan's to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, become the first Black Senator from Texas, and be the leader Texans deserve? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90627131/491130988/1987603654?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2648-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1YzNjMS1mYTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vR05w2x7MQsQPnCsjrgkvAbwEfcGqQIJ1L2e6m0h4iY=)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90627118/491130973/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU1YzNjMS1mYTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5O-TGL7MZyTB8KNhrshn0CjOp-nfKPbBo00znn5xxg=&emci=c767fdef-9e57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=d1e5c3c1-fa57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
My husband Adam Frisch ran against Boebert in 2022 and came just 546 votes short of defeating her. Our family, campaign team, and all of our volunteers had worked hard – very hard. Adam drove over 24,000 miles with our son Felix meeting with voters across the entire district. But ultimately, we were out-spent and came up short.
This past year, we decided to give it another go, and we’ve been working even harder than the last campaign. With support from grassroots donors like you, we were out-raising Boebert – and Adam had already driven _another_ 24,000 miles to listen to voters. It looked like we were heading for a win... so Lauren Boebert ran off scared.
**But with Boebert now out of the race, things are going to be harder.** We’ve got a new Republican opponent who is trying to hide his extremism, and the Republican Super PACs are already circling to try to stop us from winning.
**This is a must-win House seat this November. Ours was the closest race in the entire country in 2022. But if Adam is going to win this critical House seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, can Adam count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to give before midnight tonight – to help him finish the job and win this critical House seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90627120/491130975/1610638071?refcode=em20240811mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d1e5c3c1-fa57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU1YzNjMS1mYTU3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5O-TGL7MZyTB8KNhrshn0CjOp-nfKPbBo00znn5xxg=)
