clean_body: When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been. Hello, When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been. My husband Adam Frisch ran against Boebert in 2022 and came just 546 votes short of defeating her. Our family, campaign team, and all of our volunteers had worked hard – very hard. Adam drove over 24,000 miles with our son Felix meeting with voters across the entire district. But ultimately, we were out-spent and came up short. This past year, we decided to give it another go, and we’ve been working even harder than the last campaign. With support from grassroots donors like you, we were out-raising Boebert – and Adam had already driven another 24,000 miles to listen to voters. It looked like we were heading for a win... so Lauren Boebert ran off scared. But with Boebert now out of the race, things are going to be harder. We’ve got a new Republican opponent who is trying to hide his extremism, and the Republican Super PACs are already circling to try to stop us from winning. This is a must-win House seat this November. Ours was the closest race in the entire country in 2022. But if Adam is going to win this critical House seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now: = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Our entire family has been so humbled by the support from people like you. We’re so grateful that you’re on this journey with us. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank you. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Can you please read it? It’s your patriotic support that gives me strength to keep fighting.
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAUhH-NuRnhZ4LhwGEbQqVdqWrVSq16sRz7ERzZxgsmUf59BZvtdTwzms9P-ejs8GiJ-EIARmsWAkD4CwF4-QG_f_7CEwr6dnn_TtUJX79tr3AkAOkR8b_12ZKjV9Ztqugy04KuQesMWyaA8wZK3mRjezaAA0NlKjaYUpSmbA5wLvCAjDXicMhsCwWURc0YqwrBirwuVA1Cnxk0eEZek7K425CbKShnrmlefcz15DPXjinFZZ_UE-gX1OuM-d2GGc3mINDvbhpUslua6sl7mxIivQ6aQO8iHQe6Y9CbChqpw5RwpreroTdGeL8mLz0au3rCuydvtYnLtM4aCe9clC7KcXjqWvmo7CUQ3n1yyRS03Os_2j_K5ThIs--TLn6Gp5AwJMK7jTYhgUoGZw3h3cv6Vx2Pl_Ux7-J-Ot79ea9Pw5t4_ZrNrYl365xdKkHK4rJN3b_p1sK_AAAA__8_7aGm)

**A LETTER FROM AMERICA’S NEXT VICE PRESIDENT JD VANCE**
I’ve been traveling around the country sharing President Trump’s vision for a brighter future, but I wanted to take a moment to send you a message from the bottom of my heart:
**THANK YOU, Friend.**
You’ve selflessly stepped up to support our campaign, even while Kamala Harris wreaks havoc on our economy.
_And trust me, Friend, I understand the value of a dollar._
As you probably know already, I didn’t grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I’ve had the misfortune of working with in the D.C. swamp.
I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations.
In Middletown, hard working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas by the “elites” who rule our country.
But under President Trump’s strong leadership, their manufacturing jobs finally started to come back.
Despite all the incredible progress he made, I’ll be honest with you: communities like mine are in more danger than ever if Kamala Harris takes the White House.
Friend, President Trump and I are fighting to keep the American Dream alive for future generations, but we can’t do it alone.
**_[So today, I’m humbly asking you to step up one more time and contribute any amount - even just $1 - to get President Trump back in the White House.>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAUxD-NuRmZZ4LhwGFbQqVdqdr-kdobcuzn4Mg2XjCJ0k9fwWb3Op4Zzc9P-uisubdEfCEAo9ULASD8iQA8_YA_v37jEQV9Ob-9UnnE5-_bK3wlAOke8dP6aMnRS-s2VXSZbkHVoFSGbSGA8wZK3mRjy8pTWZq6BlWBEepUMMma0-EA4iAORujMtsCgZHVRFBUTBctrJmvYnNDgCXlNSnazIddTkE5f0rz6mKvJZ64dU4rLPqkn0C-o1hnzmw0z6s1BoN_dNMhktzRVk_c2JUR6MYpA7yIdDd0x6FUGhdRhSjjT60XTa0F4vyY_eNR29YR3D95qE5dpnRUS3rk4uDiM5qEr6aO050B498E1pKCGvf69_b18GM2g932Dix_hKSQMifBuo01IoBqCs5rw7t-9q6om_nyVu7ifjnd_3-qjeRHP37K51fFmnbNLJUjJztvU_ZuuLfwPAAD__06RoKk)_**
[DONATE TODAY](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAUhH-NuRnhZ4LhwCEtodWutGrVSq16QcZ-BEe2ccAkyr-vYLN7Hc-M5vOTLlgzPGoivhCA0eiFABB-JADHn_Dn1288oaCv5-sPKk_48ra9wlcCEB8BP63PlhSdNHZTRZPoGlQJSiVYMwGcV5DzKhlrNmjIei0EU_rAmeKoOCv6Q5VVvcgPeWJqyCDPSsZYkQmWpWUmSxCqZ1Bhj7wkeXY3PtWTl1Zf4ry6kKrJJbYeYwzLPqkl0C6o1hnTu_Ez6s1BoN3d1MtotjRVk3MmRkR6GRSB1gY6DnTHoDfpFVKLMeJMbxdNb4zwdo2uc6jN6ghvnrzFJi7TOiskvLGhs6Ebh6eupAvSnD3hzQdXF73q9vr39vfybhw6ve_rbPgITz6ij4Q3G21EAkXnrdGEN_-Op6ssH9-Pb7u4n443f6_laXgVL9-Sudbhbqw1SyFInp23qfs33Wr4HwAA__-FCKC4)
I ran for the Senate because I knew somebody had to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and be a voice for YOU - the American people.
And I’m running to be your next Vice President so we can finish what we started.
**_[Please, if you’re able, chip in one more time and let’s save this country in November!>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAUhH_N42YEz1kMBw7bEirtaquuWmmrXpBjP4Ij2zhgEu2_ryDJXsczo_n8pAvW9J81iG-AOBg9AyLwZ0B8fseP339oT4K9Hs-_mNzTy8_1Fb8DYvwM9GW9t6TkpLGrKppE16hKVCqhOhfIeYU7XiVDXYk-ywspxKEiyctKSHwijlnPlXpC3iemxgx3WZnneZGJPEvLTJYo1CHHig7ES9hlV-NTPXpp9SlOiwupGl1i6yHGMG-TWsB2JrVMlF6Nn0ivDsB2czMvo1nTTI3OmRiJ2KlXgK0NbOjZhsEu0itilmKkiV1Oml1y4O0SXedIm8UBb-68xSrO4zIpAt7Y0NnQDf1dV9IFaY4eePPg6qJX3VZ_a7-Vd0Pf6W1fZ8MjPPpIPgJvVtpIgEXnrdHAm3_N-0e8nt_ebuJ2Ot78PZf7_lW8_EimWoersdbMhYBddlynbt90qfF_AAAA__-pxaEv)_**
Thank you and may God bless you,

Despite all the incredible progress he made, I’ll be honest with you: communities like mine are in more danger than ever if Kamala Harris takes the White House. Friend, President Trump and I are fighting to keep the American Dream alive for future generations, but we can’t do it alone. I ran for the Senate because I knew somebody had to stand up to the corrupt Washington establishment and be a voice for YOU - the American people. And I’m running to be your next Vice President so we can finish what we started. Thank you and may God bless you, JD Vance Future Vice President of the United States | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC Inc., a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

Fellow Patriot,

I have a big announcement to share with you.

First, remember what we're up against in the 2024 election:
* We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last.
* Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country.
* Uniparty politicians in D.C. don't care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests.

Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it's in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU.

Since I ended my presidential campaign, I've considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement:

**Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation._I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024_!**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. clean_body: Fellow Patriot, I have a big announcement to share with you. First, remember what we're up against in the 2024 election: We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last. Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military. The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country. Uniparty politicians in D.C. don't care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests. Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it's in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU. Since I ended my presidential campaign, I've considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement: Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation.I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024! The media continues to lie to us. The justice system is politicized. And America-last politicians in D.C. don't care about it. Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It's not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024. The reality is it will require all of us to step up to win in November. It can be by volunteering your time for Get Out the Vote efforts. It can be by making sure your family votes. name: John Fetterman
subject: PA in Paris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
From winning Team USA’s first gold medal to being the flag bearers at the closing ceremony, athletes from Pennsylvania have been making us tremendously proud!
#
Derek,
From winning Team USA’s first gold medal to being the flag bearers at the closing ceremony, athletes from Pennsylvania have been making us tremendously proud!
I want to take a minute to shout out all the Olympians from PA who gave their all in the games. I am also proud of these Pennsylvanians who are bringing home a medal as a result of their excellence in Paris:
Chris Guiliano + team 🥇
Ariana Ramsey + team 🥉
Nick Mead, Justin Best, and Michael Grady (+ Liam Corrigan from CT) 🥇
Maia Weintraub + team 🥇
Casey Kaufhold + team 🥉
Joe Kovacs 🥈
I’ll be watching the closing ceremony to see Nick Mead carrying the star spangled banner representing our country with such pride! 🇺🇸
**Now that our Olympians have won gold in Paris, it’s time we set our sights on winning gold at the ballots in November!** 🥇 I am so proud to be supporting my fellow Senator from PA, Bob Casey, in what has been a tough battle against private interests hoping to flip his seat, but they will not prevail.
**[To help Senator Casey defeat the Republicans who are trying their hardest to flip this seat, will you chip in a split $5 donation and ensure his campaign has the resources they need to secure gold at the ballot box in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240811?refcode=em20240811-9269&refcode2=9269_434096_X3wBJR&akid=9269%2E434096%2EX3wBJR)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240811?amount=5&refcode=em20240811-9269&refcode2=9269_434096_X3wBJR&akid=9269%2E434096%2EX3wBJR)**
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240811-9269-footer&t=1&refcode2=9269_434096_X3wBJR&akid=9269%2E434096%2EX3wBJR)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

**John Deaton and Ian Cain take the Same Anti-Trump Position**
During the WRKO Massachusetts Senate Republican Primary Debate on August 8th, moderator, Jeff Kuhner, asked each candidate if they would vote for Donald J. Trump in November?
Bob Antonellis replied “YES” and supports America first policies.
But it exposed the Achilles’ Heel of John Deaton and Ian Cain. They each said they would not vote for Trump, Harris or Kennedy. They are abstaining from supporting the Republican Presidential nominee.
Ask yourself how two Republican candidates voice the same position and will not support the party? Is this the advice coming from the Crypto World?
If they are not willing to commit to an America first presidential vote, which is a vote against the “Border Czar”, how can you believe their claims that they would prioritize the border?
Can we believe their claim to be against tampons in the boys’ room when they are not even willing to vote against Tim Walz, whose nickname is now, “Tampon Tim”?Cain and Deaton are part of the problem in Washington D.C. Robert “Bob” Antonellis is the solution.
Please listen to:
**Jeff Kuhner’s WRKO's MA Senate Republican Primary Debate on August 8th:** https://wrko.iheart.com/featured/the-kuhner-report/content/2024-08-09-1179-the-kuhner-report-wrkos-massachusetts-senate-republican-primary-debate/
Respectfully submitted,
Robert Antonellis U.S. Senate Candidate [R-MA]

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We’re here to inspire. Not fearmonger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
You deserve honesty and respect.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90629091/491137623/1328794144?refcode=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MDJjMjVlLWZmNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEUEuvzS3YJEobM_4fugM8fqblEA5kLUgK_qnKJITE4=&emci=ff15d64d-b255-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi, it’s Jane Fonda here. I know you probably get a lot of emails and text messages begging for money, often from sources that are unclear about their intentions. I bet you’ve seen those emails that say things like _“600% Match Ends Tonight!!!”_ or make absurd claims that “missing a donation” will doom the entire movement forever. Let me be abundantly clear: That is not what we do at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We believe in treating our supporters with respect, and we understand that support comes in all shapes and sizes — whether you volunteer your time, donate monthly, share our posts on social media, or simply read these emails to stay informed about our work. We believe in: **Inspiration Over Fear:** I want to inspire you to take action with JanePAC, not scare you into it. The climate crisis is a serious and urgent problem, but we do not need to resort to exaggeration or hyperbole to make our case for taking action. We know that most people are motivated to support our work because they share our hope for a healthy and prosperous future. Your involvement, whether through donations or other forms of support, is a powerful force for change. **Value and Honesty:** Our emails are meant to be informative and honest, giving you meaningful insights and updates into the work that JanePAC — and our endorsed candidates — are doing. We don't use fake matches, and we won't tell you that missing one single fundraising deadline means our movement is doomed for eternity. We want to update you on our progress and be honest about our successes and shortcomings. Transparency is key, and we want you to feel invested in our work, not disconnected. **Genuine Connection:** We’re here to build a movement, not just fundraise. That’s why we also share opportunities to volunteer and get involved in ways that don’t involve donating. JanePAC does have goals and deadlines, but my team isn’t going to pressure you with those fake 600% matches or absurd threats to “revoke your Democratic status” if you don’t donate. **Instead, we’re simply asking you to lend your support when you can because you _believe_ in our mission.** Every dollar you donate helps us provide direct support to down-ballot candidates who are committed to fighting the climate crisis and holding corporate polluters accountable. **[So, would you consider making a donation to help us continue our work? Your support is crucial in fighting for climate action and electing climate champions.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90629092/491137624/2105508926?refcode=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MDJjMjVlLWZmNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEUEuvzS3YJEobM_4fugM8fqblEA5kLUgK_qnKJITE4=)** If you can’t donate today, that’s okay, too. Maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a **[volunteer activity](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90629093/491137625/-907986478?refcode=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MDJjMjVlLWZmNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEUEuvzS3YJEobM_4fugM8fqblEA5kLUgK_qnKJITE4=&emci=ff15d64d-b255-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=4823105)** down the road. No matter what, I’m glad you’re here and part of this movement. | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90629094/491137626/2105508926?refcode=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.a602c25e-ff57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MDJjMjVlLWZmNTctZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEUEuvzS3YJEobM_4fugM8fqblEA5kLUgK_qnKJITE4=)

I bet you’ve seen those emails that say things like “600% Match Ends Tonight!!!” or make absurd claims that “missing a donation” will doom the entire movement forever. Let me be abundantly clear: That is not what we do at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We believe in treating our supporters with respect, and we understand that support comes in all shapes and sizes — whether you volunteer your time, donate monthly, share our posts on social media, or simply read these emails to stay informed about our work. We believe in: Inspiration Over Fear: I want to inspire you to take action with JanePAC, not scare you into it. The climate crisis is a serious and urgent problem, but we do not need to resort to exaggeration or hyperbole to make our case for taking action. We know that most people are motivated to support our work because they share our hope for a healthy and prosperous future. Your involvement, whether through donations or other forms of support, is a powerful force for change. We don't use fake matches, and we won't tell you that missing one single fundraising deadline means our movement is doomed for eternity. We want to update you on our progress and be honest about our successes and shortcomings. Transparency is key, and we want you to feel invested in our work, not disconnected. Genuine Connection: We’re here to build a movement, not just fundraise. That’s why we also share opportunities to volunteer and get involved in ways that don’t involve donating. JanePAC does have goals and deadlines, but my team isn’t going to pressure you with those fake 600% matches or absurd threats to “revoke your Democratic status” if you don’t donate. name: Robert Spencer
subject: We’re suing UCLA administrators
body:
Young America's Foundation

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Fellow Patriot,

My name is Robert Spencer. I'm an author, speaker, and expert
on global Jihad and Islamic terrorism, and I wanted you to know
how pro-Hamas forces are taking over higher education.

Recently, the University of California in Los Angeles (UCLA)
blocked me from speaking to their students about Hamas' reign of
terror through a Young America's Foundation (YAF) lecture.
Instead of supporting free speech and open dialogue, UCLA
administrators sided with radical leftist agitators and canceled
the event.

UCLA's reason? They said that the ongoing pro-Hamas leftist
supporters on the university grounds posed a safety hazard to the
students who wanted to host and attend the event.

UCLA should have upheld law and order by clearing the
encampments and prosecuting all violators to the fullest extent
of the law.

Instead, they took every available action to block me from
speaking and to prevent their conservative students from
exercising their First Amendment rights to freedom of speech and
assembly.

The organization that invited me to speak - Young America's
Foundation - is suing UCLA for this blatant violation of freedom
of speech.

Give $50 right now to fight back and help sue UCLA!

Colleges are supposed to promote learning and dialogue, not to
provide sanctuary to radical agitators threatening Jewish
students and Jihad on campus. Yet, today, many have become
sanctuaries for radical ideologies.

All of this is having an effect on students' opinions and
attitudes today.

Did you know that according to a recent NBC News poll, only 15%
of young people ages 18-29 say their sympathies are with Israel,
and nearly 1/3 of students say they sympathize with Palestinians?

In another poll, 20% of young Americans have a positive view of
Osama Bin Laden!

At UCLA (shortly before I was slated to deliver my speech
there), pro-Hamas militants knocked a Jewish girl unconscious and
stomped on her Israel flag. And there was no outrage over this by
leftist administrators at the college.

Instead, a conservative coming to speak on campus is the UCLA
administrators' greatest fear and the biggest security threat!

Enough is enough. We need your support to help YAF win this
lawsuit against UCLA and help fight for students' free speech
rights nationwide.

You may have heard of Young America's Foundation as the
country's leading conservative youth organization for more than
60 years. YAF goes directly to high school and college campuses
with the best speakers in the conservative movement, including
Ben Shapiro, Matt Walsh, Katie Pavlich, Lt. Col. Allen West, and
many others so that students can freely express and engage with
the values that make us free. YAF promotes your values, such as a
strong national defense, individual freedom, limited government,
and freedom of speech to large student audiences.

Young America's Foundation is taking a stand against UCLA's
censorship of conservative free speech.

YAF is suing UCLA and will take them to court so that students
can hear the truth about Hamas-the truth that their school is
fighting to keep from them.

But they can't do this alone. UCLA has vast resources and teams
of lawyers preparing to defend their excuse for shutting down a
conservative lecture on campus.

Will you give $50 right now to stand with the conservative
students of UCLA and fight back? We are looking for 76 Americans
to step forward today with a gift to protect conservative free
speech. And every dollar you give will fuel our fight to ensure
that students on EVERY campus can learn the truth about Israel,
Hamas, and the freedoms that make America great.

Here's the secure link where you can quickly make your gift:
https://secure.yaf.org/ucla-lawsuit-protect-conservative-speech

YAF does not play around when students' First Amendment rights
are infringed. YAF sued the University of California at Berkeley,
and won a major freedom of speech lawsuit!

But they need your support right away!

UCLA and every other leftist university are counting on
conservatives like you sitting this fight out. Thank you for
taking action right now and fighting back.

Sincerely,

Robert Spencer

YAF Speaker, Bestselling Author

Young
America's Foundation
11480
Commerce Park Drive Suite 600
Reston,
VA 20191-1556

800.USA.1776

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

You were added to the system August 17, 2023.

http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/iW75NeGWNl

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/p/oW75NeGWNl

Hi Peter, With only TWO DAYS left until the August Elections we are in full GOTV mode. We’re all hands on deck and have brought in some key supporters for the final stretch: former Congressional candidate Randy Bryce, Eric’s mother, friends, and many more. But, our door knocking efforts will only go so far with the money we have left. For every dollar we raise from now until Election Day, we can knock on 6 more doors, make 15 phone calls or send 40 text messages. Friend, Riley Gaines here. I need to tell you what we are facing from the radical left. My first encounter with this lunacy was when I was at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team and was a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5-time SEC champion, and SEC record holder in butterfly. In March of 2022, I and the other female swimmers were _**FORCED**_ to swim against a _**MALE**_ , Lia Thomas. After tying with me for the trophy, I was told “Lia” needed to hold the trophy I _won_! _**YEARS**_ of my hard work, practice, and perseverance were destroyed for the woke agenda. If that wasn’t enough, I was even **FORCED** to share a locker room with a **MAN**! **Every day more girls have to undergo HEARTBREAKING stories just like mine where our championships are STOLEN from us. ** _I’ve decided to partner with my friends at American Principles Project to END the war on women from the far left!_ Kamala and Walz are _**RADICALS**_ who support **FORCING** women and girls to share their _sports, bathrooms, and locker rooms with men_! This _**MADNESS**_ has to end. The momentum is growing around the country for our mission, so we can’t slow down now. There is an uphill battle to November, and we must elect politicians who will fight for our girls, not bend the knee to radical activists. **[Can I count on you for a one-time donation of $20? Let’s END the war on women!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=2b72b4b47a924d6abff9891dbc3eb206&_e=s2DomzsBV5s8aPA2Nsbn5AAWfIr2C0UXsX7JW5FffbErQ8iuNjhiV3lxc5kAEquguUMYhNzof8dXLD6yncW_SmigMNRB1B5VGSefNzco_ICZqnufwG6Pv63nmOF-4OKGBWaOawGTrws4eW_GeVIdQYNuhuE-ppRnkzM-ZbvJNbvJypMn5f53lGCGnaN5nt-GsN5hb8WzJM2AO3Jx-W8A8Q5wmzJA71IuhosbYDAyPIupUhKubPAS7QtFAsBfFyZjwh_v5O2QOGE6-EEyAfZf0Olzlsf4jJesrlFGybsjlKCWspH47UgyJ73Y1Gp-mtY7ZO1G8vfjOlXvD1cl5klagpx5qEUdDMvIUVMHDKMUM6u1NsCpTEO7YfnTOVUrqvrD) **
---
[**END THE WAR ON WOMEN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=2b72b4b47a924d6abff9891dbc3eb206&_e=s2DomzsBV5s8aPA2Nsbn5AAWfIr2C0UXsX7JW5FffbErQ8iuNjhiV3lxc5kAEquguUMYhNzof8dXLD6yncW_SmigMNRB1B5VGSefNzco_ICZqnufwG6Pv63nmOF-4OKGBWaOawGTrws4eW_GeVIdQYNuhuE-ppRnkzM-ZbvJNbvJypMn5f53lGCGnaN5nt-GsN5hb8WzJM2AO3Jx-W8A8etYXIYXFmjBoRJLs-nc_AyCaCl-1b-Hxh2VsaPP0W1KAeAcYP-S5j-YZeDx1xA2xaHnqQKaZMRPCEIPl6GFljTd1-xDmczDiU41wklrdK6EZ2CRaseQhPpK8gkmGIxOrHGy7PioJgZxi57tsDGxzBDr8xIbqRtad_2xJ35uMCqe)

We won't rest until our daughters have their own _**PRIVATE**_ spaces free from MEN! If Kamala and Walz win women will face _**HORDES**_ of men in our sports and our locker rooms!

[**DEFEND OUR GIRLS!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=2b72b4b47a924d6abff9891dbc3eb206&_e=s2DomzsBV5s8aPA2Nsbn5AAWfIr2C0UXsX7JW5FffbErQ8iuNjhiV3lxc5kAEquguUMYhNzof8dXLD6yncW_SmigMNRB1B5VGSefNzco_ICZqnufwG6Pv63nmOF-4OKGBWaOawGTrws4eW_GeVIdQYNuhuE-ppRnkzM-ZbvJNbvJypMn5f53lGCGnaN5nt-GsN5hb8WzJM2AO3Jx-W8A8etYXIYXFmjBoRJLs-nc_AwESZHhn8t9VAlJ5D6R0YTF9VSkXKCl5D92GWw9jm_M1yPSlTPq8_rSW-Y1owTnGRt0PNAYcLXuq6wSMMsjDnzK4jg53yzs6to6IRsCwalhhIeHqeHiaAyODzK04fsU6Uxz9Y455vNEsgctxol7kmVl)

Happy Sunday, friend! As I finish my morning coffee, I want to take a second to talk about my campaign. I’ve loved being able to speak to people around Southern California about the issues that matter to them. Over the course of this campaign, I’ve heard it all. From the need to tackle rising costs, protect our access to healthcare, keep our communities safe, and more. **But, friend, more than anything I have heard a universal call for us to come together. Families in Orange County – and families across the United States – are fed up with the extreme, divisive policies that Michelle Steel and the rest of the MAGA cohort are pushing.** I’ve always been someone who believes in bringing people together. When I was in the Army, it did not matter if you were a Democrat or a Republican - you worked together to get the job done. I don’t see enough of that in Congress. Especially with this current extremist majority. _**Now I am running for Congress to put people above politics and continue to give back to the country that has given me so much.**_ [And I am going to need your help to get there. clean_body: Happy Sunday, friend! As I finish my morning coffee, I want to take a second to talk about my campaign. | = Happy Sunday, friend! As I finish my morning coffee, I want to take a second to talk about my campaign. I’ve loved being able to speak to people around Southern California about the issues that matter to them. Over the course of this campaign, I’ve heard it all. From the need to tackle rising costs, protect our access to healthcare, keep our communities safe, and more. But, friend, more than anything I have heard a universal call for us to come together. Families in Orange County – and families across the United States – are fed up with the extreme, divisive policies that Michelle Steel and the rest of the MAGA cohort are pushing. I’ve always been someone who believes in bringing people together. When I was in the Army, it did not matter if you were a Democrat or a Republican - you worked together to get the job done. I don’t see enough of that in Congress. Especially with this current extremist majority. Now I am running for Congress to put people above politics and continue to give back to the country that has given me so much. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Derek Tran will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Derek | | Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P.O. Friend, We have proof from satellite images that China has spying facilities in our backyard, just 90 miles away in Cuba. They’re building spy bases on top of old Soviet facilities, aimed at our sensitive military facilities across the southern United States. The Biden-Harris administration has known about them for some time but this news was only recently made public. Democrats in Washington are not taking the China threat nearly as seriously as they should, and this is just another example of their misplaced priorities and misplaced attention. **[**This is a dangerous time for America. name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: What more do you need to know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by End Citizens United-Nonfederal
body:
We’re committed to doing everything we can to make sure we win this election at the ballot box, but we won’t have a chance if we don’t raise the resources we need to win. That’s why you’re so important to this campaign.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21846%2E4449941%2EFkPllJ)
---
Team —

By now, you’ve probably seen all the evidence you need to know that Kari Lake can’t be allowed anywhere near the Senate. But Senator Kari Lake might be more likely than we think.

This race is closer than ever. First, a fresh poll showed Kari and Ruben tied. Soon after, a respected polling outfit projected Kari Lake as the likely winner in Arizona. And just a couple days ago, a brand new poll of likely voters in Arizona showed Kari defeating Ruben by one point.

This will be the closest Senate race in the country. Seriously.

We’re committed to doing everything we can to make sure we win this election at the ballot box, but we won’t have a chance if we don’t raise the resources we need to win. That’s why you’re so important to this campaign. And it’s why we’re asking you: [**Please, split a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign and Fight for Reform to help them elect state and local Democrats. Arizona is a MUST WIN state, but right now we’re trending in the wrong direction. Help us turn that around by chipping in whatever you can.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/48086?t=7&akid=21846%2E4449941%2EFkPllJ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/48087?t=8&akid=21846%2E4449941%2EFkPllJ)

name: Katrina Christiansen
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Katrina Christiansen
body:
---
| | [**_Peter, I have one of the best shots in the entire country to unseat a Republican Senator. But I can’t win this uphill battle alone. I need 415 supporters to step up before midnight to make sure I have the resources necessary to win this race and compete with Cramer’s special interest cash. So I’m asking you to rush $15 or anything you can spare. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632079/491147974/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=) I’m running for every person Kevin Cramer has turned his back on. [**People like my Grandmother.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632080/491147977/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=) As she struggled to pay the bills piling up around her on a fixed income, she was forced to ration her heart medication to save money. She died not too long after that from congestive heart failure. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632081/491147978/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)
_Katrina and her Grandmother_
---
Unfortunately, my grandmother’s story isn’t unique, Peter.
So many people in North Dakota live on fixed incomes and are forced to make tough choices between paying for their medicine and keeping the lights on.
Yet politicians like Kevin Cramer do nothing to fix it – it’s infuriating.
That’s why I’m running to replace Kevin Cramer who accepts money from pharmaceutical companies and votes AGAINST lowering prescription drug prices for our seniors.
[**_But I need your help to get to Washington where I will fight tooth and nail to deliver for everyday Americans – like you. I need 415 gifts before midnight to fund my people-powered campaign and compete with Cramer’s deep pockets. Can you rush $15 before midnight to help? Anything you can spare makes a world of difference. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632082/491147980/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)
[**People like my parents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632083/491147983/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=) They worked hard to provide for us as they struggled to get by in rural America.
They counted on food stamps to put dinner on the table.
They counted on government-funded programs, like Headstart to put me in Preschool.
So believe me when I say, I understand the struggle millions of families face.
[**But I’m up against Republican Kevin Cramer who has only voted to slash funding from federal programs struggling families rely on and funnels special interest cash into his campaign coffers. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632084/491147985/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)
[**_Peter – I will never forget where I came from or who I am fighting for in the Senate. But first, I have to compete with Cramer’s millionaire and billionaire mega-donors. I’m not taking a dime of Corporate PAC money – so to fund this groundbreaking campaign, I’m counting on your help. I need 415 gifts before midnight to build an unstoppable foundation of support, win this competitive race, and finally send Cramer packing for good. Will you chip in $15 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632085/491147986/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)
[**People like my children.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632086/491147987/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)** ** They make me proud to be their mom every single day, and they deserve to live in a country where hard work is rewarded and they can get ahead.
One without gun violence, soaring student loan debt, and inaction toward climate change.
I know I’m not alone, Peter.
So many parents are worried about what kind of future our kids will have.
And I’m ready to do something about it.
[**_We simply can’t afford six more years of Kevin Cramer. We need a voice in Washington that will fight for the kids who don’t have enough food to eat, the families who can’t afford to go to the doctor, and the seniors barely getting by on a fixed income. That’s why I’m running for Senate – to make a difference for families struggling to get by. But right now I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in $15 before midnight to fully fund my campaign, retire Kevin Cramer, and prove our campaign has what it takes to win? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90632087/491147988/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240811_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2YWM5MTctMDU1OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U32SkBYtIWAh-eO-C6WquTfxCJqOUlveNAIRN_GcXDE=)
My campaign starts and ends with folks like you, Peter, and everyone else that I’m fighting for.
Republicans think that if they throw enough money at this race, we’ll just give up.
But we know what, and who, we are fighting for – and that we just can’t afford to lose.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/7b3554d7-1405-407d-96b7-7efd80b56fcf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This post is adpated from an X (formerly Twitter) thread I wrote [here](https://substack.com/redirect/e294c3e6-b6af-4039-8863-3806000ec85a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* [https://x.com/brian_lenney/status/1822681004462813537](https://substack.com/redirect/e294c3e6-b6af-4039-8863-3806000ec85a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

I said as much here earlier this year...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/79f2b8ca-dafe-4a99-9aa6-47ccccd04e96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**Idaho absolutely should not be giving Big Pharma, like Bayer, a free pass from lawsuits.**_
Let's talk about antibiotics...
Sure, they kill harmful bacteria, but they also take down the good stuff in our gut. That might not sound like a big deal, but it can throw our whole system out of whack. So, why should Bayer get a free pass when their products could potentially/allegedly mess up our health like that?
Then there's glyphosate...
_It's a "chelating agent"--meaning it grabs onto essential minerals in our bodies and doesn't let go. _
Think about it: that's great for killing weeds, but for us? It's like having a thief in the body that leeches minerals from the body **FOREVER** (it's actually called a "forever chemical"). Soooo.... Glyphosate isn't just "passing through," it sticks around, wrecking everything from our cells to our DNA until we die.
This stuff is a cancer risk waiting to happen, and we're supposed to sit back and let Bayer off the hook?
## "TRUST THE SCIENCE"
During the COVID crisis we were told to "trust the science" and believe everything was "safe & effective."
These phrases got thrown around to justify anything and everything the government wanted. Now, they want to give Bayer the same kind of legal shield vaccines got in 1988?!
Is THAT what Idahoans want their legislature to do?
To shield and protect Big Pharma?
And who's science are we trusting anyway?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7d8c0815-f79a-448e-9b86-c766ffb3ac98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The EPA says](https://substack.com/redirect/84776049-203e-42e9-b24c-1d44869ef6c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)1 glyphosate is "unlikely to be a human carcinogen," (note the hedging) but the [University of Washington found](https://substack.com/redirect/4cf832ae-ea8d-4467-a907-a5384d494235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)2 a 41% increased risk of non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
The International Agency for Research on Cancer called it **["probably carcinogenic."](https://substack.com/redirect/bd022271-f641-4663-9797-c138685115d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**3
With "science" all over the place, how can we just hand Bayer a get-out-of-jail-free card?
## **No Quarter**
Bottom line: real people in Idaho are allegedly suffering because of these products.
Ag workers, farmers--they're on the front lines, and they're potentially paying the price with their health. Are we seriously going to say that it's okay to trade crops for cancer?
To sacrifice the future just to pad Bayer's pockets right now? _**When Idahoans voted us in, I bet they didn 't have "give lifetime immunity to Big Pharma" on their bingo cards.**_ It's crucial to keep these corporations accountable.
_Bayer doesn 't need another hall pass. _
They need to be held responsible for what their products allegedly do to people. Idaho should focus on decisions that protect its citizens, not let Big Pharma off the hook. It's time to stop bending over backward for corporations and start looking out for the real people who live here.
Cheers,
Brian
**P.S.** Watch Democrat Senator James Ruchti's powerful debate on this same bill:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3aa7e9cf-c99a-49a0-bed7-3a5773a5afa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
1
https://www.epa.gov/ingredients-used-pesticide-products/glyphosate
2
https://www.washington.edu/news/2019/02/13/exposure-to-chemical-in-roundup-increases-risk-for-cancer/
3
https://www.iarc.who.int/news-events/glyphosate-monograph-now-available/

clean_body: It’s the epitome of what the “elites” in DC have been doing to families like mine for decades. | | | | | When I saw this picture on Twitter, it instantly pissed me off. Please forgive my language, but look at the price on the bottom right: $62,000. The Vice President earns a salary of $284,000 a year. Kamala has never created a business. She’s never worked her butt off to become personally wealthy. No, like many in politics, she’s enriched herself from the DC Swamp so she can afford to wear necklaces that cost more than two months' wages. This is the epitome of what the “elites” in DC have been doing to families like yours and mine for decades. Right now, she’s raised over $310 million to go to the White House! President Trump is the only president in my lifetime who has stood up for working families, and it’s because of this, they want to destroy him. So I’m going to ask you for $5 now to help him get elected, but I can assure you of this, your donation won’t go towards a $62,000 necklace. It won’t go to enriching the DC Swamp who hates your values. It will go towards electing the only man who can save America: Donald J. Trump. I know $5 is a lot of money in America today. So if you can’t afford to chip in, please don’t worry about it. President Trump & I know you’re still a top supporter. Thank you, JD Vance Future Vice President of the United States | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. As a first-generation Mexican-American, my life’s story reflects the dreams and struggles of many in New Mexico’s 2nd. I never envisioned myself running for Congress. But in 2017, when I saw all the hateful things MAGA extremists were saying about people like my mother — who is a proud Mexican immigrant, single mom and hard worker — I knew New Mexico needed someone who would step up and fight for all of the hardworking people looking to achieve their dreams. [You have my word that I’ll continue to work hard so that dream is accessible to everyone — but I can’t do it without you. Since 2017, hateful extremist rhetoric has only escalated from people like my opponent, Donald Trump and J.D. Vance.
J.D. Vance even referred to Democrats (specifically naming Vice President Harris) as “a bunch of childless cat ladies” — before blocking a bill that would establish the right to seek IVF treatments. **If that’s not hateful, I don’t know what is.**
Our community deserves better than that kind of “leadership,” and I’m determined to deliver it.
[I need your support to continue delivering for the people of New Mexico. If you can, please chip in $10 or any amount you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90633346/491152864/644372192?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_60DO_081124_1_1_MYSTORY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RkNzcwNi0wODU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxdMFbvi1-48inxLuhBq6nnaqflC21_DSE7ZQizBV30=)

Vance. J.D. Vance even referred to Democrats (specifically naming Vice President Harris) as “a bunch of childless cat ladies” — before blocking a bill that would establish the right to seek IVF treatments. subject: Vote for Dr. Michael Goldstein – the Rocky Balboa of Fairfield County - in the August 13 Republican Primary.
body:
Nobody Fights Harder than Dr. Goldstein

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..8-N9hGB1oK8qdue6JsJBYRK_32lJg9_IEP1NcmNb7eM?) for more
---
# [Vote for Dr. Michael Goldstein - the Rocky Balboa of Fairfield County - in the August 13 Republican Primary. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=147588322&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTg4MzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTc4MjEsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk4OTgyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.d-RnVghY-dNxTc7v3SE9Bi9WAFqRUh8_qlcQVx2En6A)
### Nobody Fights Harder than Dr. Goldstein
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Aug 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=147588322&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTg4MzIyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMzM5NzgyMSwiZXhwIjoxNzI1OTg5ODIxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.LsQssWiLulhd6NQus0cHNS8g6djur81fZ4rx1SktjE8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=147588322&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTg4MzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTc4MjEsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk4OTgyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.d-RnVghY-dNxTc7v3SE9Bi9WAFqRUh8_qlcQVx2En6A&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=147588322&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTg4MzIyLCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTc4MjEsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk4OTgyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.d-RnVghY-dNxTc7v3SE9Bi9WAFqRUh8_qlcQVx2En6A)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/vote-for-dr-michael-goldstein-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
August 11, 2024
Many people who seek political office do so because they need a career. In fact, our entire political structure is dominated by professional politicians.
But not Dr. Michael Goldstein. The 74-year-old Greenwich ophthalmologist (eye surgeon) and lawyer is financially secure. He could be in Florida reducing his handicap. He could be hanging out at the beach nursing Pina Coladas while reading the latest Ken Follett thriller.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d3369eae-2663-4f75-939f-9711434ec924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
www.goldsteinforcongress.com
Instead, he is seeking to unseat Jim Himes, an entrenched incumbent who does little for Fairfield County but raises huge amounts of money from corporate America and returns the favor by being their sock puppet.
Michael broke the Energy story several weeks before everyone. Now you are all up in arms about your Eversource bills. And if you are stuck in traffic, blame Himes and get to the polls. Michael has solutions for I-95
Here are the Dr. Goldstein's [Seven Deadly Sins ](https://substack.com/redirect/aa2c0348-804f-431c-9a34-71d0e4c1e9f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of the Biden/Harris/Himes administration:
* First - They have done nothing to stop traffic congestion on Route 95 and the Merritt Parkway
* Second - They Took Away Our Affordable Energy
* Third - They Came After Our Children With Their Transgender Agenda and Plan to Destroy Women's Sports
* Fourth - They Opened the Border to Everyone Including Terrorists, Criminals, Gang Members, Drug Dealers, Child and Sex Traffickers
* Fifth - They Have Turned Our Healthcare System Into a Bureaucratic Overpriced System Where Patients, Doctors and Other Healthcare Providers Don't Matter
* Sixth - They Have Legitimized Antisemitic Riots and Physical Assaults Against Jews and Jewish Institutions
* Seventh - Crime Pays

Michael was a complete unknown two years ago and garnered 40% of the votes in a primary in only eight weeks of being on the scene.

Many of you two years ago learned of Michael as a freedom-fighting physician and patriot and went to the ballot box. Since then, Michael has continued to train like a good boxer does and has not stopped fighting. Michael, as the underdog, almost picked up the party endorsement. He lost that by just a handful of votes.

This only galvanized Michael's resolve to fight. His campaign has received dozens more endorsements than his opponent. Michael's endorsements are meaningful ones consisting of elected officials, national organizations, local organizations, grassroots, organizations and groups that are comprised of everyday hardworking Americans like you.

The party endorsements that Michael has earned from your elected officials and candidates indicate that this is the man they want fighting side-by-side with them in the ring for us to win November.

Primaries are fights within the party to pick the best candidate to represent you in a general election. Michael Goldstein is a Man of the People and that's what ROW B is all about.

Michael has cared for the eyes of 1,500 boxers including Oscar de La Hoya and Evander Holyfield. Thus, it's only appropriate to call this primary a Rocky story. Michael has been the common sense conservative and man of the people. His whole campaign has been about taking it to the people, taking it to the streets, taking it to you and your families and showing you why he has earned your support. That's exactly what he's done.

It's a Rocky moment and Dr. Goldstein is that true fighter.

Let's put a doctor in the House to reduce our healthcare costs and tackle the challenging issues facing Connecticut such as energy, education, housing, infrastructure and the border.

Fight with Michael and Vote with Him on ROW B on Tuesday August 13.
---

name: Kevin Lincoln
subject: Reaching out again
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m a Marine Corps veteran, blue-city Republican mayor, husband and father running for Congress in California’s battleground 9th District. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4b6ee9cedcad48ca9bf7cc569e9130fe&_e=ZrxCy4yv3oeg9m5yO__aBA3xagyeBzCZWuZmvNyVPgdLE6QcjCKrOhN9ZkmLkzpWI6ONIkBYsPOtYu-IBnRAUavkkV1s0i6n_JWduX9SCxtRkfJfLptmOG4EwX33c55ZvZ2El_HLZ-4kkqjMV_phUAEFdTU0m5KUsY5StH-AokTxmBqJvGrpqx8lRGdRkpLPaQK5AapsW0cNfgoQKiTZdtqySEB2-Ka5qdOyzhWl5GqxIywsKEmRjC4VKIrBBQUqkFLHK2t26ADIhRo39BYMLUjpLlZHVJKjWaKgSQSpRQVcAZLT8Y_hcueewMkZOjqdPnWqjl4Igcl3lZOgcNd-_PvId4EMOhC3Kyru7QCFKq1mqmqPa22KCbvI2jdmm-5T)
Hi, Peter,

I just want to take a second to re-introduce myself.

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, blue-city Republican mayor, husband and father running for Congress in California’s battleground 9th District.**

This is one of the top seats targeted to flip from blue to red in 2024, and it’s a vital part of our strategy to protect and _expand_ our GOP House majority. That’s why **Speaker Mike Johnson** and House Republican leaders are backing my campaign.

In our primary, more voters cast their ballot for a Republican than for my Democrat opponent, Josh Harder.

Now, House Democrats have placed Harder in their **most vulnerable** category – _they know they’re in trouble._

We’re locked in a tight race, and every advantage is needed to pull ahead and flip this seat.

[**All I’m asking is for every patriot reading this to chip in just $5 to send a conservative mayor and Marine to Congress to fix the mess the left has made of America.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4b6ee9cedcad48ca9bf7cc569e9130fe&_e=ZrxCy4yv3oeg9m5yO__aBA3xagyeBzCZWuZmvNyVPgdLE6QcjCKrOhN9ZkmLkzpWI6ONIkBYsPOtYu-IBnRAUavkkV1s0i6n_JWduX9SCxtRkfJfLptmOG4EwX33c55ZvZ2El_HLZ-4kkqjMV_phUAEFdTU0m5KUsY5StH-AokTxmBqJvGrpqx8lRGdRkpLPaQK5AapsW0cNfgoQKiTZdtqySEB2-Ka5qdOyzhWl5GotHuTzW5NIgivCoMqcvFc3DCCIibOGHmW3spWGzv0YxSfgCYSapKz4HznLofD-sqboP_rQsswPki9ewvq_1IeO7S1v47xXdJ96CFBEwN8yic-59j4K0v7QZLSEvhP64ZfmVKD9ZugbYnjWRN0u0nQ8)

_Can I count on your support?_

[**SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4b6ee9cedcad48ca9bf7cc569e9130fe&_e=ZrxCy4yv3oeg9m5yO__aBA3xagyeBzCZWuZmvNyVPgdLE6QcjCKrOhN9ZkmLkzpWI6ONIkBYsPOtYu-IBnRAUavkkV1s0i6n_JWduX9SCxtRkfJfLptmOG4EwX33c55ZvZ2El_HLZ-4kkqjMV_phUAEFdTU0m5KUsY5StH-AokTxmBqJvGrpqx8lRGdRkpLPaQK5AapsW0cNfgoQKiTZdtqySEB2-Ka5qdOyzhWl5GqOp2_CnWbGQWdieu-2fzKEUM7CdtFyVSzWacyjWEVI5DKvjNb-eqK-aDn9Pt1SIa6Peh7jwfw-Yl6aMw52XGQO_W1wSMO08dxXGgIRCZjPp0pi10U8tPiZRxc4is6vfA7JrRWxjPrkI1USiCbO7umm)
Semper Fi,

**Kevin Lincoln**
Veteran, USMC
GOP Nominee, CA-9

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

This is one of the top seats targeted to flip from blue to red in 2024, and it’s a vital part of our strategy to protect and expand our GOP House majority. Now, House Democrats have placed Harder in their most vulnerable category – they know they’re in trouble. We’re locked in a tight race, and every advantage is needed to pull ahead and flip this seat. subject: The Olympics Have A Racism & Misogyny Problem

The latest injustice against American gymnast Jordan Chiles continues a trend of anti-Black and anti-woman policies that have stained the Olympic Games

# [The Olympics Have A Racism & Misogyny Problem](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=147563379&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTYzMzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTgxMDQsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk5MDEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OSf0d1X9kX4GbfpKyBI5WXg4kouRaU-SL_905464cwo)
### The latest injustice against American gymnast Jordan Chiles continues a trend of anti-Black and anti-woman policies that have stained the Olympic Games
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Aug 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=147563379&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTYzMzc5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMzM5ODEwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzI1OTkwMTA0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tyhc-QVgyGKZ4W2Qsgle24pXq-E7GwXguz7WRfn0ca0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=147563379&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTYzMzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTgxMDQsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk5MDEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OSf0d1X9kX4GbfpKyBI5WXg4kouRaU-SL_905464cwo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=147563379&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTYzMzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTgxMDQsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk5MDEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OSf0d1X9kX4GbfpKyBI5WXg4kouRaU-SL_905464cwo)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC90aGUtb2x5bXBpY3MtaGF2ZS1hLXJhY2lzbS1hbmQtbWlzb2d5bnk_.Ws7l5kOPntFIvBsDfRQb-phe4VbnCt90PqLtgkexj-E?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-olympics-have-a-racism-and-misogyny?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..q-jN0FRkLDU3gKQ3zLja6JZFtXRkrTPaFK9sMKTBdx0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=147563379)
There are only two reasons an Olympian is ever stripped of a medal: Doping and cheating. Jordan Chiles did neither, and yet the Olympic committee is stripping her of her hard earned bronze medal anyway. How did this happen? **Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/23d73a8a-3cc1-4863-b829-558749ab656c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=147563379&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3NTYzMzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjMzOTgxMDQsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk5MDEwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OSf0d1X9kX4GbfpKyBI5WXg4kouRaU-SL_905464cwo)
First, let's quickly review what happened:
* Chiles initially placed 5th in the floor exercise due to a judging error. The judges did not credit her properly for a difficult move she successfully performed.
* Chiles appealed the error. The judges reviewed and realized their error. The judges subsequently awarded her the additional points she deserved. Those additional points elevated Chiles to a bronze medal. _Then it got really confusing_.
* The Romanian gymnast Ana Barbosu who was now rightly bumped into fourth place, protested. Accordingly, the Romanian team appealed on procedural grounds, i.e. that Chiles didn't appeal the judges error _fast_ enough. The judges reviewed the appeal, then reversed again.
* Gymnasts only have 1 minute to review the judge's scoring, determine if any errors were made, and then appeal those errors. Apparently, Jordan Chiles committed the crime of appealing the judges score in 64 seconds--4 seconds beyond the 60 second limit.
* Upon review, the judges agreed with the Romanian team, and despite Jordan Chiles scoring better than the Romanian gymnast, reversed their decision and stripped Chiles of her bronze medal.

To be clear, Chiles performed better. She legitimately won the bronze. But because the judges screwed up, and Chiles didn't call out their screw up fast enough--Chiles has to suffer the consequences of the judges and the IOC's incompetence, and lose her bronze medal.
## A troubling pattern of racism and misogyny
This injustice against Jordan Chiles is horrible in its own right. It is also part of a broader disturbing pattern of racism and misogyny at the Olympics--one that we cannot afford to ignore if we want to maintain the sanctity of the Olympic Games. While the Olympics have certainly led in brilliant moments of countering racism (See, e.g. Jesse Owens), the current trends are failing to live up to that standard.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5a87205-da62-49fc-ad1c-b2e916d459f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jordan Chiles--a Black woman--has her Olympic medal stripped despite her superior performance. But, despite a recognized judges error, her medal is instead given to a Romanian athlete Ana Barbosu who underperformed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7cb71fcc-52ec-4414-a885-6eb765fb2408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imane Khelif--an Arab woman--is demonized with false allegations about her gender. But instead, the Italian woman Angela Carini she beat gets offered $50,000 from the IBA for quitting the match after 46 seconds. (Fortunately Khelif won gold anyway).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef02e0e8-4620-4736-99dc-754d9f93bb20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Sha'Carri Richardson--a Black woman--was banned from 2021 Olympics for using marijuana as an anti-depressant after her mother died. But meanwhile Russian athlete Kamila Valieva tested positive for the banned performance enhancing drug Trimetazidine and was still allowed to compete in the Olympics undeterred.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7855cee-a4d7-49ce-ae75-65b44300ee5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
French Muslim women who choose to wear the hijab out of personal modesty are banned from competing in the Paris Olympics. Meanwhile, Alen Hadzic and Steven van de Velde--white men--committed sexual assault and rape of a minor, respectively, in violation of Olympic Ethics rules which ban sexual assault, are still allowed to compete in the Olympics unhindered.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..q-jN0FRkLDU3gKQ3zLja6JZFtXRkrTPaFK9sMKTBdx0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=147563379)
## Black people really do need to be twice as good
The systemic racism and discrimination against Black and brown women in the Olympics, combined with the lax standards afforded to white athletes, is clearly upsetting. And far from the above anecdotes, the data backs up the systemic nature of the above injustices. [A recent academic study found and quantified this exactly](https://substack.com/redirect/adea3db2-5654-4f03-baac-cc9200599b0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> For decades, black parents have told their children that in order to succeed despite racial discrimination, they need to be "twice as good": twice as smart, twice as dependable, twice as talented. This advice can be found in everything from literature to [television shows](https://substack.com/redirect/4d9cbe7d-76f7-4b67-80b5-c73c754510d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to day-to-day conversation. Now, a [new paper](https://substack.com/redirect/6a9e07bb-ad5f-4986-83fb-c7de2d4586a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the National Bureau of Economic Research shows that when it comes to getting and keeping jobs, that notion might be more than just a platitude.
> There's [data](https://substack.com/redirect/64be97db-d641-441a-8017-4adb9b127698?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that demonstrates the unfortunate reality: Black workers receive extra scrutiny from bosses, which can lead to worse performance reviews, lower wages, and even job loss. The NBER paper, authored by Costas Cavounidis and Kevin Lang, of Boston University, attempts to demonstrate how discrimination factors into company decisions, and creates a feedback loop, resulting in racial gaps in the labor force.
> In order to keep a job, black workers also must meet a higher bar. Only in instances where black workers are monitored and displayed a significantly higher skill level than their white counterparts would they stand a significant chance of keeping their jobs for a while, the researchers found. But even in instances where the productivity of black workers far exceeded their white counterparts, there was still evidence that discrimination persisted, which could lead to lower wages or slower promotions.
Likewise numerous studies show (e.g. [here](https://substack.com/redirect/ff0c8938-18b6-4563-a2e8-54867064e4ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [here](https://substack.com/redirect/4da6b344-2ec1-44fd-b3d9-5f55eb44ec05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [here](https://substack.com/redirect/cf01526c-379f-4bbc-bd95-34859329975d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) that women are promoted less often than men despite similar skill levels. In a near verbatim textbook case of anti-Black discrimination, Jordan Chiles received unwarranted subpar scores from the judges (i.e. bosses), then unwarranted extra scrutiny from the judges via the appeal from the Romanian team, and as a result lost her bronze medal. Meanwhile her white counterpart received less scrutiny, performed worse, and still received a bronze medal despite lacking the talent and skills to win the bronze on merit.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..q-jN0FRkLDU3gKQ3zLja6JZFtXRkrTPaFK9sMKTBdx0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=147563379)
## Here's the bottom line
An Olympics that allows white male rapists to compete unhindered, but bans women of color who choose to observe modesty, that rewards white athletes who use performance enhancing drugs, but bans Black athletes who use marijuana (which is most definitely not performance enhancing), and excuse mediocrity to award white women unearned medals, but conjure up excuses to deny Black women their rightfully earned medals, is an Olympics that betrays the very pillar of fair and just competition that the Olympic Games are supposed to exemplify.
Jordan Chiles earned her bronze medal. She did everything right. The IOC should not only ensure Jordan Chiles retains her rightfully earned bronze medal, but they should also issue an apology for the injustice, humiliation, and disrespect shown to her. Forcing Chiles to suffer the consequences of incompetence from judges is an outrageous proposition. It reeks of racism. And it cannot stand. This unjust act is a stain on the IOC and mandates immediate remediation--that is--if the IOC desires to live up to the Olympic promise of fair and just competition.
Thanks for reading Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid! This post is public so feel free to share it.
