clean_body: The latest injustice against American gymnast Jordan Chiles continues a trend of anti-Black and anti-woman policies that have stained the Olympic Games | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When the time is right, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $5/mo or $50/year subscription! The latest injustice against American gymnast Jordan Chiles continues a trend of anti-Black and anti-woman policies that have stained the Olympic Games | | | Aug 11 | | | | | | | | | | | | There are only two reasons an Olympian is ever stripped of a medal: Doping and cheating. Jordan Chiles did neither, and yet the Olympic committee is stripping her of her hard earned bronze medal anyway. How did this happen? Let 's Address This. | | ---|---|--- First, let's quickly review what happened: Chiles initially placed 5th in the floor exercise due to a judging error. The judges did not credit her properly for a difficult move she successfully performed. Chiles appealed the error. The judges reviewed and realized their error. The judges subsequently awarded her the additional points she deserved. Those additional points elevated Chiles to a bronze medal. Then it got really confusing. The Romanian gymnast Ana Barbosu who was now rightly bumped into fourth place, protested. Accordingly, the Romanian team appealed on procedural grounds, i.e. that Chiles didn't appeal the judges error fast enough. The judges reviewed the appeal, then reversed again. Gymnasts only have 1 minute to review the judge's scoring, determine if any errors were made, and then appeal those errors. Apparently, Jordan Chiles committed the crime of appealing the judges score in 64 seconds--4 seconds beyond the 60 second limit. Upon review, the judges agreed with the Romanian team, and despite Jordan Chiles scoring better than the Romanian gymnast, reversed their decision and stripped Chiles of her bronze medal. To be clear, Chiles performed better. She legitimately won the bronze. But because the judges screwed up, and Chiles didn't call out their screw up fast enough--Chiles has to suffer the consequences of the judges and the IOC's incompetence, and lose her bronze medal. A troubling pattern of racism and misogyny This injustice against Jordan Chiles is horrible in its own right. It is also part of a broader disturbing pattern of racism and misogyny at the Olympics--one that we cannot afford to ignore if we want to maintain the sanctity of the Olympic Games. While the Olympics have certainly led in brilliant moments of countering racism (See, e.g. Jesse Owens), the current trends are failing to live up to that standard. | | ---|---|--- Jordan Chiles--a Black woman--has her Olympic medal stripped despite her superior performance. But, despite a recognized judges error, her medal is instead given to a Romanian athlete Ana Barbosu who underperformed. | | ---|---|--- Imane Khelif--an Arab woman--is demonized with false allegations about her gender. But instead, the Italian woman Angela Carini she beat gets offered $50,000 from the IBA for quitting the match after 46 seconds. (Fortunately Khelif won gold anyway). | | ---|---|--- Sha'Carri Richardson--a Black woman--was banned from 2021 Olympics for using marijuana as an anti-depressant after her mother died. But meanwhile Russian athlete Kamila Valieva tested positive for the banned performance enhancing drug Trimetazidine and was still allowed to compete in the Olympics undeterred. | | ---|---|--- French Muslim women who choose to wear the hijab out of personal modesty are banned from competing in the Paris Olympics. Meanwhile, Alen Hadzic and Steven van de Velde--white men--committed sexual assault and rape of a minor, respectively, in violation of Olympic Ethics rules which ban sexual assault, are still allowed to compete in the Olympics unhindered. Black people really do need to be twice as good The systemic racism and discrimination against Black and brown women in the Olympics, combined with the lax standards afforded to white athletes, is clearly upsetting. And far from the above anecdotes, the data backs up the systemic nature of the above injustices. : For decades, black parents have told their children that in order to succeed despite racial discrimination, they need to be "twice as good": twice as smart, twice as dependable, twice as talented. This advice can be found in everything from literature to , to day-to-day conversation. Now, a from the National Bureau of Economic Research shows that when it comes to getting and keeping jobs, that notion might be more than just a platitude. There's that demonstrates the unfortunate reality: Black workers receive extra scrutiny from bosses, which can lead to worse performance reviews, lower wages, and even job loss. The NBER paper, authored by Costas Cavounidis and Kevin Lang, of Boston University, attempts to demonstrate how discrimination factors into company decisions, and creates a feedback loop, resulting in racial gaps in the labor force. In order to keep a job, black workers also must meet a higher bar. Only in instances where black workers are monitored and displayed a significantly higher skill level than their white counterparts would they stand a significant chance of keeping their jobs for a while, the researchers found. But even in instances where the productivity of black workers far exceeded their white counterparts, there was still evidence that discrimination persisted, which could lead to lower wages or slower promotions. Likewise numerous studies show (e.g. , , and ) that women are promoted less often than men despite similar skill levels. In a near verbatim textbook case of anti-Black discrimination, Jordan Chiles received unwarranted subpar scores from the judges (i.e. bosses), then unwarranted extra scrutiny from the judges via the appeal from the Romanian team, and as a result lost her bronze medal. Meanwhile her white counterpart received less scrutiny, performed worse, and still received a bronze medal despite lacking the talent and skills to win the bronze on merit. Here's the bottom line An Olympics that allows white male rapists to compete unhindered, but bans women of color who choose to observe modesty, that rewards white athletes who use performance enhancing drugs, but bans Black athletes who use marijuana (which is most definitely not performance enhancing), and excuse mediocrity to award white women unearned medals, but conjure up excuses to deny Black women their rightfully earned medals, is an Olympics that betrays the very pillar of fair and just competition that the Olympic Games are supposed to exemplify. Jordan Chiles earned her bronze medal. She did everything right. The IOC should not only ensure Jordan Chiles retains her rightfully earned bronze medal, but they should also issue an apology for the injustice, humiliation, and disrespect shown to her. Forcing Chiles to suffer the consequences of incompetence from judges is an outrageous proposition. It reeks of racism. And it cannot stand. This unjust act is a stain on the IOC and mandates immediate remediation--that is--if the IOC desires to live up to the Olympic promise of fair and just competition. Friend, I spoke last week with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **We're officially being outspent on TV ads.** I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me. That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me. What if I told you that more than 40,000 people lost their lives to gun violence last year while the gun lobby strengthened its vice grip on GOP leaders? What if I told you that GOP leaders across the nation are rapidly stripping away our reproductive freedoms – but as long as I’m attorney general, New York will always be a safe haven for all who need reproductive care? And if I told you that the most powerful and corrupt forces in our country who I work to hold accountable are rooting for me to fail so they can continue to act without consequence? Peter, truly, the list could go on and on. There are so many reasons why I need your support right now, so I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being a fearless fighter for justice with me. Your continued support means more than you know. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

clean_body: | | | In less than 50 days, Coloradans will be receiving their ballots to vote in the general election. = | = Team, The House majority hinges on Colorado. Donald Trump knows that too — which is why he’s gone all-in to endorse some of the most extreme MAGA candidates, including Lauren Boebert and Gabe Evans. = Both candidates want to deny women their reproductive freedom. Both candidates have embraced election denialism and spread Donald Trump’s Big Lie to cast doubt on the 2020 election. And both want to lead our state down a dangerous and extreme path that will take us backward. We cannot let that happen. The only way we can reject MAGA extremism and deliver for Colorado families is by winning at the ballot box this fall. That starts with making sure voters understand the stakes before they get their ballots.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Fellow Conservative,

Things are about to go from bad to worse in our fight to flip Wisconsin RED in November.

The money flowing in from Chuck Schumer, Kamala Harris and Tammy Baldwin’s army of D.C. megadonors and Super PACs is unprecedented. _**Frankly, I’ve never seen anything like this!**_

If we fail to keep up, Eric Hovde’s narrow lead over Tammy Baldwin will be erased overnight, and we’ll lose our best shot at retaking the Senate Majority.

[**It’s not too late. Can you step up with a donation of $5 or $10 to help us stay on track to flip Wisconsin RED in November?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=03e9b34561054adc97df514e1d736eae&_e=iMRQZT9T5NlgpNndwTrj-YVwrWYtCiVJKDWjLGFdCEg-vYpm8Xn1ZoEq1CAtSfVbePBon29_c_KuREP-ZNXv51o2SNuVeB66Iq7JKU3_B56WB2e9niP0meKgweuHTflPZZNOFruO9PyRc0eC2v_ry-3MriDLF-NyINP6Tdk47dXaI8j996MBl85cyCUKT4P5RE0YbKYQyghCUHU0iBJt-6-NU7gOSM6wTqz5xmjLcByITCU_tirfdGTGLO6gOFBE1KdNzHx1cuMgIAJ4D1mItdU-K2MrUCxhF5FmehQFVz-yvNlqzwoZIQRcJVHCJv5h4fngYoA9LeCyEiiBo05dwKoYd8jdaYxyC_b8TN5yO-6FxDsd9C_kP5fGJVzHAgW8jk-sPJN6Iw5ydGW0MI8bbw%3D%3D)

subject: Natural ‘brain healer’ suppressed by FDA?
body:
Untitled Document

Top Articles of
the Week

Natural 'brain healer' suppressed
by FDA?

Tim Walz's skeletons in his
closet fall out causing Democrat Party meltdown

Trump clobbers Kamala with a
surprise she's freaking out about

Leaked video of Kamala Harris
just sunk her campaign instantly

Trump campaign advisor drops the
hammer on Kamala Harris in Fox News appearance

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

It's one of the biggest medical
scandals in history.
This all-natural " Nobel
prize brain healer" could have saved millions from the pain of
Alzheimer's - except the FDA and Big Pharma suppressed it for 70
years.

This "1-hour brain
tech" is so powerful,
it won the Nobel
Prize twice.

But now, top neurologists at the
world's most prestigious institutions1 - including an Ivy League
school2, Oxford3, Johns Hopkins4, and Stanford1 - are finally
speaking up.
According to researchers at the
University of Pennsylvania…6
One hour of exposure to this
"age-defying brain tech" is enough to help your body clean out
decades of dead neurons, amyloid plaque, inflammation, and brain
toxins…
Enhance the rapid regeneration of
younger brain cells by 748%...
And rediscover the mental
sharpness you enjoyed in your 20s.
No need to rely on prescriptions,
doctor visits, or medical insurance…
When this drug-free solution can
help you defy cognitive decline.
Clinical trial restores youthful
brain power to 70-year-olds in 1-hour (full story here).
To Your Good Health,

Al Sears, MD, CNS

References:

Guadagni V, Drogos LL,

MD, Hogan DB, Poulin MJ. Aerobic exercise improves cognition and
cerebrovascular regulation in older adults. Neurology. 2020 May
26;94(21):e2245-e2257. doi: 10.1212/WNL.0000000000009478. Epub
2020 May 13. Erratum in: Neurology. 2020 Nov 10;95(19):890. PMID:
32404355; PMCID: PMC7357295.

name: polling@voteractionproject.org
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
You are invited to join our one-click response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Senator Kyrsten Sinema infamously spoke on the Senate floor amidst debate about meaningful voting rights legislation and said:
" Eliminating the 60-vote threshold will simply guarantee that we lose a critical tool that we need to safeguard our democracy from threats in the years to come. "
She may be retiring, but the Senate still hasn't changed their rules. We need to hear from you, please answer our simple question below:
Team: Do you think preserving the filibuster is more important than protecting voting rights?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081124_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081124_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_1&amount=25]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Can we count on you in this fight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We need you to make a stand right now for true democracy and reject this corrupt system.

|
---
| | | [We need you to make a stand right now for true democracy and reject this corrupt system.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Our democracy is under threat.
The DNC has launched an unprecedented attack on Robert F. Kennedy Jr., challenging his residency in New York in a shameless bid to eliminate a strong contender from the race.
Think about it: What do you call someone who **has a home** in New York, is **registered to vote** there, and **pays taxes** in the state?
A New York resident!
[Yet, the DNC is exploiting every loophole, willing to disregard basic facts, to cling to power and silence voices of change.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=3)
RFK Jr. has been forced to endure a grueling interrogation in a New York courtroom, facing relentless attacks from the Democratic Party-aligned super PAC, Clear Choice.
Judge Christina Ryba even had to intervene to stop the vicious "badgering" of Kennedy by Clear Choice’s attorney.
The courtroom exchanges have been heated and intense, revealing the extent of the DNC's desperation to control the political narrative.
This isn’t just a minor political dispute; it’s a crucial moment for the direction of our nation.
Instead of engaging in robust debates about America's future, the DNC is resorting to anti-democratic tactics designed to eliminate competition.
The fierceness and intensity of this courtroom attack is on top of the vicious media attacks on Kennedy. Ironically, the hysterical assaults on Kennedy’s good name show how afraid the Establishment is of RFK Jr.
In fact, the Big Ag, Big Pharma, and Big Military interests fear Bobby Kennedy more than any other political candidate because they know he can’t be bought and he can’t be intimidated.
[If we allow these power-hungry elites to manipulate the system now, what will they do next? ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=4)
[Will we let them decide who can run for office, who can have a voice, and who gets to vote?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=5)
[We need you to make a stand right now for true democracy and reject this corrupt system.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=6)
[ Help Fight Election Interference ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=7)
There are only 90 days left until the election and we have a robust goal of $3 million this month. The countdown is on to the election!
Donate now to support RFK Jr. and protect the integrity of our elections. Your contribution is vital in this fight for the future of our democracy.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=8)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=9)

This is more than a campaign—it's a movement to reclaim democracy from those who seek to destroy it.
[Join us. Stand with us. Fight with us.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_court_battle_8_9_rs_uo_nd1&n=13)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend, I don’t want to scare you, but if we don’t take back the House in November, we risk losing much more than just one election.

**If MAGA Republicans get unchecked control of Washington, everything we care about – protecting abortion rights, securing a stronger future for our kids, and more – could be at risk.**

The House very well may be the last backstop to democracy. My race for Congress is a pure tossup – and it is likely to determine control of the House. So I’m not exaggerating when I say donating to this campaign is one of the single most important things you can do to save our country.

[**Today, I am humbly asking you: will you rush a donation to my campaign for Congress and the Voter Protection Project today to help us take back the House and stop the MAGA Republican agenda?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74378?t=6&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS) | [DONATE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74378?t=7&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
---
My opponent has thrown his full support behind Donald Trump. He is on the record supporting a national abortion ban. And he won’t commit to protecting Social Security and Medicare.

If he gets the 218th vote in Congress, it’s game over. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to win this race.

[**In a tossup race like mine, I need to raise a lot more money to share my message and reach more voters, and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help. So, will you donate just $10 today to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us take back the House and stop the terrifying possibility of MAGA control of Washington?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74378?t=8&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kristen McDonald Rivet and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74379?t=9&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74380?t=10&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74381?t=11&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74382?t=12&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/74378?t=13&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS)
Thanks,

Kristen
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=16001%2E878179%2E_SX3BS) to request fewer emails. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I want to tell you about the Missouri I grew up in — and why Josh Hawley could never understand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in.
**Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
[**Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66256?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/66255?refcode=em20240811-7305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240811-7305-footer&t=14&refcode2=7305_614464_-p9vO7&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=7305%2E614464%2E-p9vO7). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: Peter, I have a big announcement to share with you. First, remember what we're up against in the 2024 election: We are in the middle of the worst border crisis in our history: a nation without borders will NOT last. Young people have lost pride in America, and we have a recruitment crisis in our military. The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots - from Donald Trump to everyday citizens across our country. Uniparty politicians in D.C. don't care about any of this and continue to sell out American interests. Our grandchildren will read about 2024 in their history books. Whether it's in a GOOD way or not depends on YOU. Since I ended my presidential campaign, I've considered what I ought to do with my time, energy, and resources to continue fighting the America-First movement and our country... So here is my BIG announcement: Turning Point PAC is funding necessary ballot chasers in key swing states in order to win our country back in 2024. The groundwork is laid. But Charlie Kirk needs to raise $50,000 to keep these activists on the ground and fund the operation.I PROMISED to Charlie that I would help him reach this goal and WIN the House, Senate, and White House in 2024! The media continues to lie to us. The justice system is politicized. And America-last politicians in D.C. don't care about it. Turning Point PAC is doing what needs to be done to win. It's not glamorous work in front of the media limelight. But the PAC is funding the success of these ballot chasers to make sure every vote is counted, and Americans get out in droves in 2024. The reality is it will require all of us to step up to win in November. It can be by volunteering your time for Get Out the Vote efforts. It can be by making sure your family votes. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: Dahlstrom Dispatch
body:
| | | [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=003da3b593&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=1c6771be9b&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
The August 20th primary election is right around the corner! I have enjoyed every minute of my time meeting Alaskans across our great state. From the challenges to the good stories, our people have heart and true grit. The support for this Alaska-First campaign is palpable. Governor Dunleavy and President Trump have been extremely supportive as we fight to retire Mary Peltola. I look forward to seeing you on the trail over the next week and a half. Warm regards,
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=81b71dc5e3&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**Nancy Dahlstrom** _Republican Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large_
---
|
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=500e526cb6&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
We've built a LARGE team over the last 9 months! We still have a long ways to go, but I am grateful for the support of leaders across and state and our country! **✅****President Donald J. Trump** **✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska** **✅ Anne Garland Young, _Widow of Don Young_** **✅ Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA)** **✅ International Union of Police Associations** **✅ Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America** **✅ Congressional Leadership Fund** **✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson** **✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik** **✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise** **✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer** **✅ Winning for Women PAC** **✅ WY Congresswoman Harriet Hageman** **✅ E-PAC** **✅ Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC**
---
| | |
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=561e4e7599&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**The NRCC Puts Our Campaign
On The "Young Guns" List**
---
I was thrilled to be named in the first wave of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Guns Program. It’s time to get our country back on track, which is why I am honored to be named to NRCC’s Young Guns Program in my race to defeat liberal Mary Peltola. I have a proven record of fighting for Alaskans and winning, and that’s exactly what I will do when I get to Washington, DC. Mary Peltola has voted in lockstep with the Biden-Harris administration’s anti-Alaska agenda. This November, we have an opportunity to vote for real change.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=41a97650df&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
_“Extreme House Democrats’ border, crime and cost of living crises wrecked Americans’ safety and security. Fortunately, these Republican candidates are already well on their way to running winning campaigns that will grow our House majority in November.”_ **\- NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson**
---
|
---
**My Interview With The Kodiak Daily Mirror**
---
In case you missed it, I recently made a campaign stop in Kodiak where I sat down for an interview with the _Kodiak Daily Mirror_. During my interview, I talked about a number of important issues facing Alaskans, my congressional campaign to unseat Mary Peltola, and why I was endorsed by President Trump.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=bf4fd56659&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**When asked about my run for Congress and my priorities I responded –** _“I’m running to serve Alaskans and the first thing I want to work on in DC is getting our border closed. We don’t have any national security with open borders, and once we have our border closed, I strongly believe we need to revamp our immigration system. I do not understand why it can take 10 years for somebody to legally come into our country."_ _
_**When asked about President Trump, I said –** _“Well, I do have an endorsement from him, which I’m happy about. I’ll tell you how I feel about him. He was fantastic for the state of Alaska. He opened things up. He was going to allow the Keystone Pipeline. All these other things that would have benefited Alaska and what I know for a fact is that every time he talked to the governor, he said, ‘What can I do for Alaska?’ I know he loves Alaska. He’s familiar with what we need. I feel confident that, should he be elected, that on day one he will unleash our resources. ”_ To read more about what I had to share with the Kodiak Daily Mirror, click **[here](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=737feb5fd3&e=a20d8ad2ed).**
---
|
---
**Public Safety Employees Association Endorses My Campaign**
---
Recently, The Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA) announced their endorsement of my campaign for U.S. Congress. The PSEA represents law enforcement personnel across the state of Alaska. With crime on the rise across the country, public safety has been front and center in American politics. The PSEA announced their endorsement of my campaign citing my years of dedication to public safety and my promise of pro-police leadership when I serve Alaska in Washington.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=615c104b09&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
|
---
**On the Trail**
---
I LOVE getting to meet so many great Alaskans on the campaign trail. Check out some pictures from our travels:

---
| | _From the Ketchikan Blueberry Festival..._
---
| |
---
|
---
| | _to Touring the Fairbanks Foodbank..._
---
| |

|
---
| | _& Talking with Fishermen & Processors in Kodiak!_

With the Paris Olympics coming to an end and Team USA's victories capturing everyone’s enthusiasm, it's the perfect time to channel that excitement into supporting our campaign! clean_body: | | | The August 20th primary election is right around the corner! I have enjoyed every minute of my time meeting Alaskans across our great state. From the challenges to the good stories, our people have heart and true grit. The support for this Alaska-First campaign is palpable. Governor Dunleavy and President Trump have been extremely supportive as we fight to retire Mary Peltola. I look forward to seeing you on the trail over the next week and a half. Warm regards, Nancy Dahlstrom Republican Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We've built a LARGE team over the last 9 months! We still have a long ways to go, but I am grateful for the support of leaders across and state and our country! ✅President Donald J. Trump ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young ✅ Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA) ✅ International Union of Police Associations ✅ Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC ✅ WY Congresswoman Harriet Hageman ✅ E-PAC ✅ Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC | | | The NRCC Puts Our Campaign On The "Young Guns" List I was thrilled to be named in the first wave of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Guns Program. It’s time to get our country back on track, which is why I am honored to be named to NRCC’s Young Guns Program in my race to defeat liberal Mary Peltola. I have a proven record of fighting for Alaskans and winning, and that’s exactly what I will do when I get to Washington, DC. Mary Peltola has voted in lockstep with the Biden-Harris administration’s anti-Alaska agenda. This November, we have an opportunity to vote for real change. “Extreme House Democrats’ border, crime and cost of living crises wrecked Americans’ safety and security. Fortunately, these Republican candidates are already well on their way to running winning campaigns that will grow our House majority in November.” \- NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson | My Interview With The Kodiak Daily Mirror In case you missed it, I recently made a campaign stop in Kodiak where I sat down for an interview with the Kodiak Daily Mirror. During my interview, I talked about a number of important issues facing Alaskans, my congressional campaign to unseat Mary Peltola, and why I was endorsed by President Trump. When asked about my run for Congress and my priorities I responded – “I’m running to serve Alaskans and the first thing I want to work on in DC is getting our border closed. We don’t have any national security with open borders, and once we have our border closed, I strongly believe we need to revamp our immigration system. I do not understand why it can take 10 years for somebody to legally come into our country." When asked about President Trump, I said – “Well, I do have an endorsement from him, which I’m happy about. I’ll tell you how I feel about him. He was fantastic for the state of Alaska. He opened things up. He was going to allow the Keystone Pipeline. All these other things that would have benefited Alaska and what I know for a fact is that every time he talked to the governor, he said, ‘What can I do for Alaska?’ I know he loves Alaska. He’s familiar with what we need. I feel confident that, should he be elected, that on day one he will unleash our resources. ” To read more about what I had to share with the Kodiak Daily Mirror, click . | Public Safety Employees Association Endorses My Campaign Recently, The Public Safety Employees Association (PSEA) announced their endorsement of my campaign for U.S. Congress. The PSEA represents law enforcement personnel across the state of Alaska. With crime on the rise across the country, public safety has been front and center in American politics. The PSEA announced their endorsement of my campaign citing my years of dedication to public safety and my promise of pro-police leadership when I serve Alaska in Washington. | On the Trail I LOVE getting to meet so many great Alaskans on the campaign trail. Check out some pictures from our travels: | | From the Ketchikan Blueberry Festival... | | | | | to Touring the Fairbanks Foodbank... | | | | | & Talking with Fishermen & Processors in Kodiak! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | With the Paris Olympics coming to an end and Team USA's victories capturing everyone’s enthusiasm, it's the perfect time to channel that excitement into supporting our campaign! Show your commitment to putting AMERICA FIRST this election season by grabbing one of our "America First Alaskans" items today. Grab yours | It is clear that Mary Peltola’s record is marked by decisions that are out of touch with the needs and priorities of Alaskan families. Her recent vote to lock up ANWR not only undermines Alaska’s economic and energy security but also fails to reflect the interests of her constituents. the link below to check out the AKGOP Peltola Files and stay up-to-date on the fight to restore conservative values to Alaska's congressional seat._ | Thank you for diving into the latest edition of the Dahlstrom Dispatch! [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT_8CF8m0Ob5uWnWrf0uEpj3qsFu1qhIranEPWHVTW2RE9354jZttn9kamEwOYOpRruJl1UjN3-5x0Y59RhlahxMREmBtvwmoDqfr2ltDsiazVLsSNjWRzozy0ThMtUxUojpVai_2Nvwan57ryEu4X_aF2YQ-s2XGAnZaWf6CWpnkCT3PwaCR-R_3cs1E2iwSZgz6pdz3VNrjQOnGlsQpnxAbp7T5nd_ECjdetoALMvFA9ghOJzz8vLj5I6Ef7GB-ZQ-Ho3TXnRCH_BbbtoTb1bc5bGuLNRjkPB02w1mb4lqQap4ZuVFNDSfIVJJ6p8pf4q_JhL3vSVbB6VKDNoD22nohKCldJ7a1ZYUSsDsr_n7A/48t/kB7Q7259QfGdbjNEain0vw/h2/h001.hNjYd5KMruC1Gm69ByLcL-MAmxespuedvgMVbxEzQFQ)

They spoke to an arena packed to the rafters with excited Nevadans full of joy and enthusiasm who are ready to do the work and make sure we win Nevada this year.

**You’ve heard this before, but Nevada is the most important swing state in this election.**
[CHIP IN >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT_8CF8m0Ob5uWnWrf0uEpj3qsFu1qhIranEPWHVTW2RE9354jZttn9kamEwOYOpRrPjnuON654ll6abkzNh4BnUkVMdJXfp2fH3vePN7CkMAyd_EiH3Q8YU_0nt-NrpX15UQ3KF3znflWCW-BPAtjqkvYrBoA7Go3udrIy6wHYqX-Yiqo-xYZ2_GxIWjRkHiMIbQSw9k2jyaK8txRHogy2crJrZxhB2oK0lixrMYolgCzYuE1arZwx9niIWPxEl_6sKtR7MmihkFCD0onz_ptD_lx0NEnb7Z62N2e878cTbf8-4-luV--LX0Qg_g3HH3kh9U43IyeYJpAOLZnFagO_lOeWPElEN-jnK0pxbbA0EA/48t/kB7Q7259QfGdbjNEain0vw/h3/h001.plvCzVKzMZ5sOTiANqVSzlfWkSy1cpla0UgC1GcfZyE)
---
**We need to win Nevada to send Kamala Harris to the White House. We need to win Nevada to re-elect Jacky Rosen and hold the Senate. And we need to win Nevada to re-elect our Congressional delegation so we can flip the House.**

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT_8CF8m0Ob5uWnWrf0uEpj3qsFu1qhIranEPWHVTW2RE9354jZttn9kamEwOYOpRruJl1UjN3-5x0Y59RhlahxNm61AMggZV1sEkd_5aNIygq643kw1kPTVe4JaG4B0ngRGubEW35JpmVInxCf88DhYe9g6YXuC3ZnLet5C-vm9IW8N7TFpnV5JTD9M0MO3wq9Vdws_5XBE_v4221EMnl0h3fu_Vcqw4FkX1Q63w4c5IZLlWgasvgOVXxGGHjNpxHBLazi_N2fFD2bjQA6Sm49x3GIkoxgCB3D5Xp36nsnxXDvGFGQ0vPmESMOUVgb6qC9gATpn6G8BIDbLGTvKGMhw6lXlSAbbKHT-V6PM-9LOo/48t/kB7Q7259QfGdbjNEain0vw/h4/h001.3Ajk23S55tmUBZPz96McvtFPXgI3feckHOHsPDxVCdc)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT_8CF8m0Ob5uWnWrf0uEpj3qsFu1qhIranEPWHVTW2RE9354jZttn9kamEwOYOpRruJl1UjN3-5x0Y59RhlahxOCJkQ980UAU_tZKqw5AOHO7ASSqtO1bmQQVu5IGA_jjZhN6dcggaCLIoqsc9P2UEnfaFOm58lY_0NtgJL-e_dCxiMvRKlg-44mxIMlm4LQ_B4WefUd13HPJ0OwSy4jdY1-5WMh1RY-c1-12F7IqfweGHc8aD-R3uuC-cNHdkplQtMZhiV16GdljdjlSSDZhzXHnEAT3rG8typBnneQhhBn4BkT9ZgARi1lh3WyzYz4dKAZIonLao1YDss3WQk8duOs7SBCDLgQsQYwG5QmJMR0/48t/kB7Q7259QfGdbjNEain0vw/h5/h001.Yszg-PDwYDMdHFrrpdWToRALFvK3SAF8UochKhJUpm8)

clean_body: Kamala Harris and Tim Walz came to Vegas and spoke to a rally filled to the rafters with supporters full of joy and enthusiasm. | | | | ** That’s my takeaway from Kamala Harris and Tim Walz visiting us in Vegas yesterday. They spoke to an arena packed to the rafters with excited Nevadans full of joy and enthusiasm who are ready to do the work and make sure we win Nevada this year. You’ve heard this before, but Nevada is the most important swing state in this election. We need to win Nevada to send Kamala Harris to the White House. We need to win Nevada to re-elect Jacky Rosen and hold the Senate. And we need to win Nevada to re-elect our Congressional delegation so we can flip the House.** There’s still a long way to go until November, but we’re on track to win if we do the work. subject: Who is Emilia Sykes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
You might have heard my name before, but a lot of people don’t know who I really am and what I am really about

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90636578/491164284/985656312?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.11_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZkMGFmYy0wZjU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0T3xbpfAHdz3bY8JNou1LJEP1AblcnjCfM7gG7pHtVM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90636579/491164291/985656312?&amount=13&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.11_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZkMGFmYy0wZjU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0T3xbpfAHdz3bY8JNou1LJEP1AblcnjCfM7gG7pHtVM=) You might have heard my name before, but I wanted to take the time to introduce myself and why I am running for re-election in OH-13. If I could only tell someone one thing about myself, it would be how proud I am to have been born and raised in the Birthplace of Champions. I am so proud to call this district home. I first started serving this community in Congress in 2023, thanks to this strong grassroots team. Every day has been a privilege, one I do not take lightly _— but our work is unfinished, which is why I am running for re-election._ Whether it is lowering costs, expanding opportunity, or ensuring safe communities—no issue is too big or too small.**If it matters to you, it matters to me.** I want to keep delivering the results that Northeast Ohioans deserve, but this election will not be easy. **My opponent and his allies are spending millions to try and buy this seat, and if they win, they will spend the next two years fighting for their extreme agenda.** [**This election is considered a pure toss up and if we are going to win in November, I need your help. Thank you so much,
_Emilia Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

clean_body: You might have heard my name before, but a lot of people don’t know who I really am and what I am really about = = You might have heard my name before, but I wanted to take the time to introduce myself and why I am running for re-election in OH-13. If I could only tell someone one thing about myself, it would be how proud I am to have been born and raised in the Birthplace of Champions. I am so proud to call this district home. I first started serving this community in Congress in 2023, thanks to this strong grassroots team. Every day has been a privilege, one I do not take lightly — but our work is unfinished, which is why I am running for re-election. Whether it is lowering costs, expanding opportunity, or ensuring safe communities—no issue is too big or too small.If it matters to you, it matters to me. I want to keep delivering the results that Northeast Ohioans deserve, but this election will not be easy. My opponent and his allies are spending millions to try and buy this seat, and if they win, they will spend the next two years fighting for their extreme agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much, Emilia Sykes A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood, 314 Action, CHC Bold PAC, New Dems Action Fund, Dems Serve, IBEW, Nebraska AFL-CIO, Communication Workers of America, Voter Protection Project, JStreet, and over 40 local elected officials.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan took food out of children’s mouths
body:
https://www.tamiewilson.com/ [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]
Friends ,
Here’s a shocking fact: Jim Jordan has NEVER voted for a Farm Bill.
Not once.
This week, Jim Jordan had the nerve to tour the West Ohio Food Bank. The staff pleaded for more funding to address the growing hunger crisis in our district, and he said: “I'll look into it” – when he knows he is part of the problem.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_image1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_image1]
The annual appropriations bill known as The Farm Bill not only provides critical support for family farms like the one I grew up on, it provides essential funding for nutrition programs like the West Ohio Food Bank that help families in Ohio and beyond.
I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that go into food production and making sure there's enough on the dinner table. I will champion the Farm Bill and its vital funding to ensure our communities are fed and our farmers are supported. Contribute today to help me fight for our families . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_link1]
Our food banks are begging for help, and Jim Jordan shows up for a photo-op, pretending to care while blocking the funding they desperately need.
The audacity is stunning.
How can he claim to represent our communities when he consistently votes against the very programs that ensure families have enough food on the table?
I believe that everyone deserves to know where their next meal is coming from and absolutely no child should go to bed hungry. Jim Jordan has voted against the very program that puts food in children’s mouths every single year he’s been in Congress.
Unlike Jordan, I’m committed to securing the resources our communities need, ensuring that working families and seniors don’t wonder if they’ll have enough to eat.
If you’re tired of the hypocrisy, join me in this fight to bring real change to Washington. Let’s send Jim Jordan packing and bring back leadership that actually cares about the people it represents.
Contribute today and help us ensure that no one has to go hungry while politicians like Jordan play games with our livelihoods. Together, we can show him the door. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_image2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_image2]
Donate to Tamie Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_button]
Tamie Wilson is the Democratic nominee ready to unseat ULTRA MAGA extremist Jim Jordan in OH-04. A single mom and survivor who knows what it’s like to endure and overcome challenges, Tamie's fighting for jobs, healthcare, and positive change for everyday Americans. Your donations will help Tamie turn out every voter we need to flip this seat and send Jordan packing.
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240811_food_banks_footer]

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Hammered:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
As you read this, a Republican super PAC is running $32 million worth of ads in swing states across the country.
---
$7, Derek. That is what we're asking you to contribute to the Democratic National Committee. If you already know the stakes of this moment and are ready to donate right now, please use this link: [**https://democrats.org/go/August-deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?refcode=em_20240811_715_fr&amount=7&refcode2=715_22930333_dNalax&akid=715%2E22930333%2EdNalax) Otherwise, let us explain: Kamala Harris is now the Democratic nominee for president. As you read this, a Republican super PAC is running $32 million worth of ads in swing states across the country. Not only are they hammering the vice president with attacks; these ads will impact races up and down the ballot as well. body:
we have to make up serious ground
| | |

This doesn't make any sense, folks:
**A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until midnight, but somehow we're still short of our weekly fundraising goal.**
National Republicans have made defeating me a top priority and experts are rating my Senate race a tossup, so I really need your support to compete against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana.
This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up, with $4 million in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl.
I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short has real consequences. If everyone who received this email chipped in $5, we could close the gap _tonight_ , but the truth is not everyone will.
**[So I’m humbly reaching out to ask you to split a donation before midnight and help reach these crucial goals. name: Team Sherrod
subject: "100% pro-life with NO EXCEPTIONS."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
The Senate is our last line of defense against Donald Trump, JD Vance, and Bernie Moreno's MAGA agenda.
| | |
---
Friend: MAGA Republican Bernie Moreno has made it crystal clear that he's willing to **OVERTURN** the will of Ohioans and vote for a national abortion ban if elected to the Senate. **In fact, he's said he's "100% pro-life with no exceptions." **

Unlike his Trump-backed opponent, Sherrod stands with the majority of Ohioans who believe reproductive health care decisions shouldn't be made by politicians. He's fighting day in and day out in the Senate to restore reproductive freedom for all Americans, including access to abortion and in vitro fertilization.
But now that Donald Trump and JD Vance are officially on the ballot, the stakes couldn't be higher. If elected, Trump, Vance, and Moreno will have the power to pass their dangerous Project 2025 agenda – banning abortion, IVF, and contraception.
Friend, the Senate is our last line of defense against Trump, Vance, and Moreno. **That's why protecting our Senate majority is absolutely critical.[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help us win in Ohio, keep the Senate blue, and stop a national abortion ban?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90637414/491167566/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2426-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTIwZmM4NC0xMjU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmLs2dPimOx1dfvO7mjWhQsdhFBeIjEkZXiz7e85v6I=)**

name: Nikki (via Team Nikki)
subject: The power of unions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90637442/491167681/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjM0ZDM4Yi0xMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gHqrgi1COKdBrK2W6fp3QeD3QND4SVEg6eFZBRqUqM=)
---
Hey there, I wanted to reach out today to talk about something that's incredibly important to me: supporting working families and strengthening unions. As the granddaughter of a union painter and a proud union member myself, I know firsthand the power of unions in closing the gaps and providing opportunities for everyday families. **That's why I've made it my mission to advocate for workers and fight for their rights.** But I can't do it alone. We need to build a strong blue majority right here in Central and Southern Illinois so we can pass the _PRO Act_ and continue delivering for our unions and American labor. I'm proud to have been part of the most pro-labor administration in our nation's history, led by President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. Their commitment to strengthening unions and supporting working families is unmatched. And as president, Kamala Harris will continue to deliver for our nation’s unions. clean_body: | = Hey there, I wanted to reach out today to talk about something that's incredibly important to me: supporting working families and strengthening unions. As the granddaughter of a union painter and a proud union member myself, I know firsthand the power of unions in closing the gaps and providing opportunities for everyday families. That's why I've made it my mission to advocate for workers and fight for their rights. But I can't do it alone. We need to build a strong blue majority right here in Central and Southern Illinois so we can pass the PRO Act and continue delivering for our unions and American labor. I'm proud to have been part of the most pro-labor administration in our nation's history, led by President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. Their commitment to strengthening unions and supporting working families is unmatched. And as president, Kamala Harris will continue to deliver for our nation’s unions. Together, we can make sure that every worker has a fair chance at success. But let me be honest with you, we're facing opposition from those who want to undermine the progress we've made. They’d rather cut tax breaks to the wealthiest among us and weaken our unions across the country. That's why your support is so crucial. We need to show them that working families deserve better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we can create an economy that works for everyone. Thank you for considering a donation to support our campaign. Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a real difference. Thanks for everything, — Nikki | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| I want to take you on a quick journey through my life and path of leadership.

I was born in San Jose to Chinese-American parents. My brother and I grew up in an environment that fostered hard work, ambition, and dedication.

I earned an associate’s degree from **De Anza Community College** in Cupertino. I finished my education at **San Jose State University** , where I received a bachelor’s in political science.

| | **Throughout his time in public service, Evan has defended our most vulnerable and built coalitions to deliver solutions. Now, he's running for Congress at an inflection point for Silicon Valley and the nation.

Our region needs a representative who will lead on maintaining our global competitiveness, combat hate, stand up for the vulnerable, protect reproductive freedom, reduce crime in our communities, and ensure the middle class can once again afford to buy a house and raise a family where they work.

Together, we will usher in a new era of courageous leadership for Silicon Valley.**

clean_body: Throughout my journey of public service, I have broken barriers and made history by being young, openly gay, and Asian-American. Now, I have the opportunity to be the first LGBTQ+ and Asian-American representative for CA-16. | = | I want to take you on a quick journey through my life and path of leadership. I was born in San Jose to Chinese-American parents. My brother and I grew up in an environment that fostered hard work, ambition, and dedication. I earned an associate’s degree from De Anza Community College in Cupertino. I finished my education at San Jose State University , where I received a bachelor’s in political science. = | = Throughout my journey of public service, I have broken barriers and made history by being young, openly gay, and Asian-American.Now, I have the opportunity to be the first LGBTQ+ and Asian-American representative for CA-16. From community college to running for Congress, I have overcome many challenges and worked hard to deliver for the people of California. And my journey doesn’t end here. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Together, Evan | | = Paid for by Evan Low for Congress Evan Low for Congress 1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201 Sacramento, CA 95815 United States | = = | | Throughout his time in public service, Evan has defended our most vulnerable and built coalitions to deliver solutions. Now, he's running for Congress at an inflection point for Silicon Valley and the nation. Our region needs a representative who will lead on maintaining our global competitiveness, combat hate, stand up for the vulnerable, protect reproductive freedom, reduce crime in our communities, and ensure the middle class can once again afford to buy a house and raise a family where they work. Together, we will usher in a new era of courageous leadership for Silicon Valley. =**_

body:
Republicans knew these cases would reach the Supreme Court |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90637794/491168760/75979627?sourceid=1054552&refcode=WTENET26_20240811_SCOTUSApprovalRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJlN2FlNy0xMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRavoCTzsQ4BtMprkPT452wwf0hX_c3xUp6B36WBBUQ=&emci=70591d78-5c56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=8e2e7ae7-1358-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=5177934) Peter,

It's been more than two years since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , ending Americans' constitutional right to abortion. Since that disastrous ruling, the cases reaching the Court continue to jeopardize the reproductive freedom and civil rights of _millions_ of Americans.

**To put it simply, Peter, our most fundamental rights now depend on the whims of a Court the American people did not elect.** And we know exactly who to blame for this: An extreme Republican Party who hand-picked justices with the intent of taking this country back into the dark ages.

**Today, we're asking pro-choice activists like you to let us know where you stand. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now >>** **Do you approve of the Supreme Court?** | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90637795/491168761/75979627?sourceid=1054552&refcode=WTENET26_20240811_SCOTUSApprovalRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJlN2FlNy0xMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRavoCTzsQ4BtMprkPT452wwf0hX_c3xUp6B36WBBUQ=&emci=70591d78-5c56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=8e2e7ae7-1358-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=5177934) | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90637796/491168762/75979627?sourceid=1054552&refcode=WTENET26_20240811_SCOTUSApprovalRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJlN2FlNy0xMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRavoCTzsQ4BtMprkPT452wwf0hX_c3xUp6B36WBBUQ=&emci=70591d78-5c56-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=8e2e7ae7-1358-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=5177934)**

clean_body: Republicans knew these cases would reach the Supreme Court | Peter, It's been more than two years since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , ending Americans' constitutional right to abortion. Since that disastrous ruling, the cases reaching the Court continue to jeopardize the reproductive freedom and civil rights of millions of Americans. To put it simply, Peter, our most fundamental rights now depend on the whims of a Court the American people did not elect. And we know exactly who to blame for this: An extreme Republican Party who hand-picked justices with the intent of taking this country back into the dark ages. Today, we're asking pro-choice activists like you to let us know where you stand. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now >> Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | | ---|--- Thank you, the EMILYs List Research team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. Friend, I spoke last week with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **We're officially being outspent on TV ads.**
I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me.
But here's the deal: **The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio.** That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me.
Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win.
**To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $200,000 daily fundraising goal to hit before midnight tonight. And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Wow!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Kamala, Tim, and I couldn't believe what we saw at yesterday's rally in NV:
Derek,
I spoke at an incredible rally with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz in Las Vegas yesterday, and I have to tell you: I’m blown away.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em_rosen.gKPooQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20240811_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=7228%2E5257348%2Ee48nJl)
It was _thrilling_ to see so many Democrats fired up about defending this battleground – which is key to keeping both the Senate and White House blue. **But, Derek, we need to remember: Winning in Nevada this November is not going to be easy.**
This state is a toss-up, we’re being called the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and dark money donors are flooding Nevada with _millions_ of dollars to buy my seat and flip it red. The ONLY way we can fight back and win is with the grassroots support of folks like you.
**That’s why I’m personally asking for your help so we can build on the momentum from this rally – but we still have a long way to go to reach our $100,000 goal.**
**[So please, if you’re ready to power this movement to victory, now is the best time to step up. Please split $10 or more between my campaign and Adam Schiff to help us keep Nevada blue and defend the Senate and the White House for Democrats.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em_rosen.gKPooQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20240811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=7228%2E5257348%2Ee48nJl)**

The New York Sun told you the truth.
