name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Pictures from the scrapbook.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I’m the Democrats #1 target.

| |
---
| | |
My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I'm the Democrats #1 target.

In 2022, I defeated a liberal Democrat in one of the closest elections in the entire country to help Republicans retake the House of Representatives. They are already spending big bucks to try and defeat me, so I wanted to see if you would be willing to support our campaign.

But first, I wanted to tell you a little about myself and what led me to run for Congress in the first place.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i8xOzstYpxMRPdg0SmCpW5DvMMrjcf0xq1jmsv-_NjbLfTVeZ1yYUmaX8WuJc4ONELSeJwIUJrAfktKhXGk2QPbvlFYlJqsO21w6W2B0zUQcY4owmRzd_QOChsn_9nvLC41JUwyjvTZGi8FKHv9aMUl5WNh6zr1WcLMEu-Si4si-w%3D%3D)
---

That photo above is me and my husband, Steve. He is a retired F-18 pilot, and I'm a proud Navy wife and mother to four amazing children.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i8RSBZORyhg1VLMlN4GxrR9TraA8rpfdZ5V7snwVv0fMtJIuz4KceebxANMJ1-qWEychV94NX3i-j6x5gSosXKfqs0ucu7SY8e_WybmGPmQjnhcSnHfi_lnp99Klu0gYLvsOSwSJyaarx3zp8WEhwztTXE25QBS_NcDF9SWTAADpQ%3D%3D)
---

I also served in the Navy. That photo above is my helicopter with my call sign on it - "Blossom." I was winged as a naval aviator in 1995 and served our nation for a total of 10 years as a helicopter pilot flying H-46 and H-3 helicopters, completing two deployments to the Persian Gulf.

After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. It was an honor to care for our Greatest Generation, and I helped them fight the system to get the healthcare they deserve.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i-nBUPZwu5Vw1oYMtcrD9pcOsP4fqYwxpRHdGc_EcmRl89gXHhkPREj2ljvM6tje8aPTZ_LF3K_knA-H9h4TcphyCFi4odTqyk_tzIfmPMCNn3vmX_l8nLquq357Ru92H5jRJNXouSNpQFKqMl1OU4oc01Rj6VQPLa2e365tr85Kg%3D%3D)
---

Over time, I got frustrated watching the evening news and just hearing about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. But I'm not one to just complain about problems. I like to solve them.

_**So I got off my couch, and I ran for office.**_

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i-ZSqOdVIbjAflikNEvZhfded59hHxRvJvWvaZSs1Yhcui4motZ3OEFyIQxCp8mt9U2qogF-jcOos9R9F5yJk_HcIYw_4sdyPi4g6N83xhhVlxtGV1FCPbtd1iY6Qy9Jka_6X9jYW-61wcCjmciBxL60oLczpdZ4GOty1fcvQZl1A%3D%3D)
---

I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to actually solve problems. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities.

Eventually, I realized a lot of the problems facing my family, our neighbors, and our community were actually coming from Washington. We were represented by a Democrat who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time, and I felt we needed a representative who would actually put our values and community first.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i-T2DNfd19rRyHImZXMXh_CNQ8pEh9vTUnxSuz3UnwCZRZ5C5a5N3T4Ql8r7CmQPia9S1oTIIeZP7rhcPscUSqX53a__nD7IHp-0_UMUjhOAwXziZDR__F48OhufR0OZPTQMCBCz0Hgp_kHoiF1m4unuJCZwbzGfj3LO4YV_r6DeQ%3D%3D)
---

So, I once again decided to stop complaining and _actually do something about it_. So I ran for Congress!

When I commit to something, I give it my all, and that's what we did with the campaign. We were up against a lot. National Democrats poured over $10 million into my opponent's campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i_Xo7P8ownCxQWQm1ImK32FsImJLA8Up9hRZ2-4zhJ78ng0_r6uw2OW2A7iw5TGsEjOqlZc8AgYG7Rv4DLJrUv6_9ZrOlppiZ90lWt71u5zT-3OPd6vpcqz3kJqslVoRm-SRdoB1wdtDZMaxCT-83xZ4quMu5SJEK9t3C_mUZbvSw%3D%3D)
---

But, we stayed focused on the task at hand and never lost sight of why I was running. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation.

And in Congress, we've already been able to make a big impact. **We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans.** We're making good progress, but the work is just getting started.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i8V1M-KyLDnVbh5LknMC2WrWtpM0rQ44jcwysdh1lPi9ervHKm3nqQLGpgms1BKC0KyxRR-TWQGUyS12bYdhQeswlisfWfjCBb_y0OADgYzODZLFfM6G0byHLKiMdApNbIY5pK3rmBN-S-DD012R43kz2dZli3V0tX1Uz7hNQaPwA%3D%3D)
---

**But the Democrats and their deep pocket donors are already setting out to defeat me.** The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has announced my seat is one of their top targets in 2024, so I'm hoping you will donate today to help our campaign keep going strong.

---
| | [KEEP JEN IN THE FIGHT](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7a49c5e3a0894b5691f5be12b9cdd54c&_e=ey8BWVhZWouxAVUfxpshZ6Ynv5aWhvqDZMNKIxlObuAdO5aAQziigj6xTs3YENvuqBdz_vdo8ADI--c1iI2RF8hH9vbc_cYJvQDTxNEEXZXsDQT4_UjZMm6fvCKqYd0EHEGjcastaCz1ks1CIzVnMWy_Gz5L8WwTq2CHY0TPVenzqEY78rbHBskPd4y47RImi7E5PFOP-fHoBD1O2X0NCNpehoqqHGgIrOYHFXcF6i8p8FW6eKnSsqO5OEXIJla7qgYXpSwLYZ1CEsaWaqktNC3I2JFE9ZHT9fsHNFLheeFPsKylzPFHH1LkK7p2Tvdp-2H46wpEnz3Led51jDjnZ-MxuOXHZS60XXe9f3EI81ewIz3J3I0Gyk_iAJ4blSKP5PZ48ff27PByIOD-QcryqA%3D%3D "DONATE TO JEN KIGGANS")
---

If you want to see more regular, everyday citizens in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. Can you spare anything to help me defeat the Democrats in this #1 Battleground race?

I can't stand sending messages like this. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office...but then I remember that America is always worth protecting...no matter what!

Thanks for reading my message. I hope I was able to earn your support.

---

clean_body: My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I’m the Democrats #1 target. | | | | | My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I'm the Democrats #1 target. In 2022, I defeated a liberal Democrat in one of the closest elections in the entire country to help Republicans retake the House of Representatives. They are already spending big bucks to try and defeat me, so I wanted to see if you would be willing to support our campaign. But first, I wanted to tell you a little about myself and what led me to run for Congress in the first place. | That photo above is me and my husband, Steve. He is a retired F-18 pilot, and I'm a proud Navy wife and mother to four amazing children. | I also served in the Navy. That photo above is my helicopter with my call sign on it - "Blossom." I was winged as a naval aviator in 1995 and served our nation for a total of 10 years as a helicopter pilot flying H-46 and H-3 helicopters, completing two deployments to the Persian Gulf. After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. It was an honor to care for our Greatest Generation, and I helped them fight the system to get the healthcare they deserve. | Over time, I got frustrated watching the evening news and just hearing about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. But I'm not one to just complain about problems. I like to solve them. So I got off my couch, and I ran for office. | I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to actually solve problems. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. Eventually, I realized a lot of the problems facing my family, our neighbors, and our community were actually coming from Washington. We were represented by a Democrat who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time, and I felt we needed a representative who would actually put our values and community first. | So, I once again decided to stop complaining and actually do something about it. So I ran for Congress! When I commit to something, I give it my all, and that's what we did with the campaign. We were up against a lot. National Democrats poured over $10 million into my opponent's campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me. | But, we stayed focused on the task at hand and never lost sight of why I was running. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. And in Congress, we've already been able to make a big impact. We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans. We're making good progress, but the work is just getting started. | But the Democrats and their deep pocket donors are already setting out to defeat me. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has announced my seat is one of their top targets in 2024, so I'm hoping you will donate today to help our campaign keep going strong. | | "DONATE TO JEN KIGGANS" If you want to see more regular, everyday citizens in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. Can you spare anything to help me defeat the Democrats in this #1 Battleground race? I can't stand sending messages like this. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office...but then I remember that America is always worth protecting...no matter what! Thanks for reading my message. I hope I was able to earn your support. | | "DONATE TO JEN KIGGANS" -Jen | | To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add https:///info@contact.jenforcongress.com?recurring=true&utmcampaign=20240811CS-SDA-2.114682t1527551-2068&extid=20240811CS-SDA-2.114682t1527551-2068 to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click . Democrats are working overtime to DEFEAT Navy Veteran Jen Kiggans! They know if they flip Jen's seat, that they can retake the entire House Majority. We can 't let that happen! As a Navy veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom, Jen is committed to servant leadership. But without YOUR support, she risks losing the ability to fight for you and our values! Donate now to defend Jen Kiggans and protect our GOP Majority. A lot of folks probably don’t know this, Peter, but Kamala Harris and I actually go way back.

Both of us came up in public service as district attorneys, and over the last decade, we’ve fought hard to protect our communities and provide opportunities for all families.

She’s been a mentor and friend for more than 14 years, and our relationship has helped shape how I view public service.

I often refer to her as _“my quintessential big sister,”_ because she has always shown up for me when I needed her.

In fact, when I first won my race to become Prince George’s County Executive, one of the first calls I received was from her.

I’d like to share one piece of advice that she shared with me: _More important than being first at something is to make sure you are not the last._

And now that we’re standing on the precipice of electing our country’s first woman president, that advice feels more appropriate than ever.

Once again, it seems we have a huge opportunity to elevate one another’s message and campaign, and deliver for those we seek to represent.

[Will you please split a $15 donation right now between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help me defeat Republican Larry Hogan so Kamala Harris has a Democratic Senate majority on Day 1? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90638542/491171325/324525579?refcode=DR_FR_SPLIT_90DO_240811_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NzFmOTY5LTE2NTgtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IJfFwV7YCuXEO9tQW9EFr0DQOBafopzmj2xTLY4Gz0g=)

This whole election cycle boils down to this, Peter:

Will our country be dragged backwards, reverting back to an era of fear, overreach, and fewer rights?

subject: Reaching out about something I need your help with
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
My team is going to randomly select a number of people who chip in to this email, and I’m going to give them a call and thank them — personally — for making that donation.
#

Hey Peter,
Opening an email might seem like a small act. But just by doing that, you’re helping us reach more people. And clicking through to read this makes you one of my most engaged supporters.
Seriously.
So, I wanted to do something different today, for you and some of my other supporters.
My team is going to randomly select several people who chip in to this email, and I’m going to give them a call and thank them — personally — for making that donation.
What do you say, Peter?
[**Pitch in $5 or more and your name will be on that list. I’m already incredibly grateful for you, and I’d love to chat if you have the time.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-august24.kZit_I&refcode=em240811-2-90&t=1&akid=2843%2E734936%2EznVu95)

name: John James
subject: Top target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, I’ll get right to the point.

**As of last week, we are OFFICIALLY in the general election in Michigan. And right now, I’m the #1 target in the country for the radical Left. **

After winning his primary, my socialist opponent has already started to rack up support from radical, far-Left Democrats across the country. They’re determined to get rid of me because they HATE that I’m a black conservative combat veteran who unapologetically loves this country and stands with President Trump. _**They know I’m a major threat, and they want me gone. If we don’t step up our game, they might actually get what they want.**_ Here’s the deal. Last election, I only beat my opponent by 1600 votes. Now that I’m in a re-match, the Democrats see an opportunity to take back their House majority through our district. The margin for error in this race is zero and I need your urgent support.

The only way we can DEFEAT the radical Left is if we work together, and I’m really counting on you now that the heat is on. clean_body: | | | Friend, I’ll get right to the point. As of last week, we are OFFICIALLY in the general election in Michigan. And right now, I’m the #1 target in the country for the radical Left. After winning his primary, my socialist opponent has already started to rack up support from radical, far-Left Democrats across the country. They’re determined to get rid of me because they HATE that I’m a black conservative combat veteran who unapologetically loves this country and stands with President Trump. They know I’m a major threat, and they want me gone. If we don’t step up our game, they might actually get what they want. Here’s the deal. Last election, I only beat my opponent by 1600 votes. Now that I’m in a re-match, the Democrats see an opportunity to take back their House majority through our district. The margin for error in this race is zero and I need your urgent support. The only way we can DEFEAT the radical Left is if we work together, and I’m really counting on you now that the heat is on. **** All eyes are on Michigan, and we can’t win without your support. name: Eugene Vindman
subject: I never imagined I would be here today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90638759/491172004/-491556796?refcode=240811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2M3MmRiMS0xNzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmlrfdv4MNiy-uNNcU5CISAjj-lGy5Ms-eYZPszQ_L8=)
---
I never imagined that I would be here today, friend. I’m a Jewish-Ukrainian immigrant whose family came to America to find hope like so many others, and I was proud to join the military and serve my country. When my brother, Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, and I witnessed President Trump abuse his power and threaten to block Ukraine’s military aid unless they investigated Joe Biden, we refused to stay silent. We reported the call up the chain of command and it eventually led to his impeachment, but it cost us our careers when we were fired in retaliation. Back then, **I never envisioned I would run for Congress** , but in the nearly five years since that phone call, the Republicans have shown the dangerous path they are willing to tread. From the insurrection of January 6th to their assaults on fair elections and fundamental rights, Republicans have gone all-in on authoritarianism. Now, our democracy teeters on the brink. That's why I need your support today. Our race is one of the key few that will determine party control of the House. So we can’t fall behind on our fundraising if we want to beat the GOP and keep our democracy out of the dangerous hands of MAGA Republicans. The path to winning the House majority runs through VA-7, and the only way we can win is if I have you by my side. [**Can you please split a contribution between Serve America and my campaign today and join us in our fight against the far-right? We need all the help we can get to win this seat and protect our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90638760/491172005/-1537968876?refcode=240811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2M3MmRiMS0xNzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmlrfdv4MNiy-uNNcU5CISAjj-lGy5Ms-eYZPszQ_L8=) I’m running because I believe it’s the duty of those in office to put the needs of their communities and their country over everything else. Because it’s our duty to step up and defend our democratic rights. I hope you’re with me. — Eugene Vindma [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90638761/491172006/191792663?refcode=240811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2M3MmRiMS0xNzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmlrfdv4MNiy-uNNcU5CISAjj-lGy5Ms-eYZPszQ_L8=)

| Peter,

Do you have 30 seconds? I promise I’ll keep this short.

Already, thousands of Virginians have made clear that they support our message: protecting our rights, lowering costs, supporting our schools, and keeping our communities safe.

We know that our government can and should work to create opportunity, advance progress, and ensure the health and prosperity of its people.

I know that this moment is only the beginning. We have a long road ahead to victory, but we will do it together. We're coming up on our first public filing deadline of 2024, and we need your support.

# [Distrust Until Verified](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=147346615&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3MzQ2NjE1LCJpYXQiOjE3MjM0MDU3MTgsImV4cCI6MTcyNTk5NzcxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0g0ONlfSBV7wxtUOVBBrcnZGqyAp7LLnvxi9QY3BoDA)
### Understanding and Connecting with Gen-Z
| | [Benda For Commonsense](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---
| Aug 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=147346615&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3MzQ2NjE1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMzQwNTcxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzI1OTk3NzE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA2NjQ0MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fZ52neYoHvYYmfGm1K0WPhGXdJyCVZUPqpqJMsGXP5Q&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

I have been working through an internal conflict: pundits and the mainstream media want to label the Zoomer/Gen Z 1 generation as [lazy](https://substack.com/redirect/dbbfdcee-ceb1-408d-9eb3-8d75de34dcbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [uninformed](https://substack.com/redirect/03b44ca0-6d17-4da7-a21f-bbfd5c8388ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in polical matters. Yet, as a parent of two twenty year olds, I am surrounded by young adults in their mid-twenties that seem to be politically astute and engaged.
In an attempt to obtain some main street perspective on this issue, I leveraged my summer interactions with this age group to conduct an informal poll of my own. I have interviewed just over a dozen zoomers asking three simple questions:
@Bendasense Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5kYXNlbnNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qZY0LdExTNd6a7zZz70CGHsXNuqgnPNnx7qBlUaqp90?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=147346615)
1. Where do you hear about news/current events.
2. How do you learn more about news/current events; and
3. What influencers do you trust.

## BACKGROUND
As I was compiling my results, a poll was released by the [Center for the American Experiment](https://substack.com/redirect/23fd53e8-0374-4153-9d18-41f65f1f1f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). One significent finding was that over seven in ten young people (18 to 34) closely follow both national and state politics. This report confirmed what I was hearing - they are paying attention.
Why it matters: [41 Million Votes](https://substack.com/redirect/ef266016-c030-4d7f-acd2-eda57b2aa1d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a lot. While Gen Z adults [distrust America's political institutions](https://substack.com/redirect/0c79dd68-00d6-40c1-b776-cf1dcc8bb0c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), they participate in many political activities at similar or higher rates than older Americans.
In his seminal book, The Fourth Turning is Here, Neil Howe provides an overview of those individuals born between 1982-2005.2 Howe concludes that this Generation is the next "Hero" generation and will follow in the stead of the GI Generation/Greatest Generation. While his book does not distinguish the Zoomer/GenZ from the millennial generation, it does provide invaluable insight into the future of this group. While is is hard to summarize Howe's exhaustive findings, here is an excerpt:
> In their aspirations for the nation, they've staked out a political agenda that borders on the revolutionary. While all generations express rising discontent about America's current direction, Millennials [GenZ] are the most likely (on both the left and the right) to believe that the current regime is fundamentally broken and needs to be overhauled if not replaced. More than older generations, they think the solution may require granting extraordinary powers to one side and discarding precedents and procedures that impede the establishment of a new regime.
In short, this generation matters to the future of America.
## Back to my summer adventure (Poll Results)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4fa9f614-a950-444f-a59e-b79ccd1cce61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### First Question - Where do you hear about Current Events:
##### These are few of the catch-phrases that jumped out:
* I "Ride the news."
* I "follow the algorithm to see where it takes me."
* I "hear then research."
* I "follow the feed."
* I "stumble and then google."
* I "rely on brain rot." (meaning entertainment feeds)

##### What Platforms?
> ###### Instagram = 8
> ###### Snap chat = 5
> ###### TicToc = 5
> ###### Podcast = 5
> ###### YouTube = 4
> ###### Newsfeed = 2
> ###### Facebook (local) = 2
> ###### X (twitter) = 1
> ###### Reddit = 1
All participants reported that they received their information in a rolling format. From social media, talking their friends and co-workers, or simply seeing a news clip in passing on television.
#### Second Question- How do you learn more about news/current events?
Google was an almost universal answer. This only scratched the surface, however, as they all wanted to truth-test what they were hearing. As one participant stated, "If it sounds like bullshit, I'll go to safari." Others said they will talk to peers on a topic before going into deep dive mode. One participant has a system to use multiple search engines to check a topic as they clearly do not "trust" the algorithms that try to tell them what to believe. This theme continued, "I hear then research. Usually with a you-tube deep dive."
If an issue peaks their curiosity, they are very deliberate, persistent and patient in finding an answer. Peers, family, and their own personal BS detection process were paramount in finding some semblance of "true information."
#### Third Question - What influencers do you trust.
One participant only "trusts" those experts that do not appear to have an agenda, "no face, no credentials, and not combative." No one had a final authoritative figure or source that they trusted, although they surprisingly rely heavily upon person-to-person exchanges. Most were skeptical of the "depressing" on-line news that they are inundated with.
The other theme I noted was that their search for information was intertwined with their need to continue to receive entertainment value. There is not a lot of patience for pontification or long-winded diatribes. After all, this generation created the phrase, ["OK Boomer"](https://substack.com/redirect/70b0398c-b240-4a18-8e4d-263182d7e103?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to tell the world, "stop the blah blah."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e944157-d487-4c85-ada9-c71a6a1c9e8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They will listen, but not be talked down to.
### MORE BACKGROUND
Before you lambast my unscientific polling and lack of [valid](https://substack.com/redirect/6027f0d2-53f8-47ad-9f05-bae8db6eb8b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) findings, I respond that my objective was simply to get a feel for the engagement process this age group uses to obtain information about the world around them. There is plenty of recent reporting on this topic including:
* A May 2024 [report ](https://substack.com/redirect/174df4e0-60d2-449e-b326-1203b66ce2a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from the American Press Institute entitled: Election insights: Understanding public preference for news coverage for 2024. One conclusion in this report: "...people are worried about the news containing misinformation and amplifying divisions. About half of adults say they are extremely or very concerned about news organizations reporting inaccurate information (53%). Almost as many worry news outlets will report unverified information (47%) or focus too much on divisions or controversies (48%)."
* Another [report](https://substack.com/redirect/20f845ce-c782-4eb6-b708-8dc529b9c271?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the American Press Insistute entitled: Gen Z and Millennial use a variet of media to get news. As reported, "Forty percent of Gen Z and Millennials either text, share, comment, or talk about news with family and friends at least once per day while only 27% do the same with other social media accounts or news organizations' websites at least once a day."
* The Pew Research Institute recently released an inciteful and detailed [report ](https://substack.com/redirect/e2c7a760-f4e3-424d-8d9f-61c1b8ec8c56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)entitled: How Americans Get News on TikTok, X, Facebook and Instagram. Of interest for zoomers, their age group is much [more likely to see breaking news](https://substack.com/redirect/c8aa646e-e085-447b-8ebf-bdf5276ea650?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on these core social media platforms.
* Another Pew Research Institute [report ](https://substack.com/redirect/8dd1b15b-d5a0-4b96-a2ba-392913cb77a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)found that Americans most often get local political news from friends and family, local news outlets, and social media. While this report does not provide a generational break-down, the survey results are as current as possible, being just released last month.

### **Takeaways:**
To reach GenZ, **there must be be a strong presence on these platforms.** _[Social Media- the Local TV for the Next Generation](https://substack.com/redirect/b72a1f55-1574-4f68-a27c-5df4eacd4b86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? _Don't assume dismissiveness means that they are not listening.
**Recognize that memes = news.** All messaging must be quick and entertaining. A meme is definitely worth a couple hundred words. I have downloaded an app that allows me to create memes, like the one above:) While I'm pretty confident my memes may get some "OK X'r" eye-rolls, I am trying to take my own advice.
**Millenials are looking for influencers** \- One the surprising takeaway from my overview was the fact that Gen Z voters do trust their friends and family almost universally. This conclusion was echoed by Howe, "A growing share of Milliennnial teens chose a parent rather than a celebrity as their role model." Whatever generation you are in, you can have an impact. The Harris presidential campaign is trying to supplant personal influencers with social media "influencers". They have formed a new PAC called [voters of tomorrow ](https://substack.com/redirect/abde72a3-ed07-4d95-941e-f587f11d58e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and are trying to tap into the [influencer](https://substack.com/redirect/b346d885-2b66-4a1d-acea-a6473df128a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) world. Don't be discouraged or intimidated to not engage, we can be influencers.
**We must listen to this "hero" generation**, as articulated by Howe, "Of all generations pushing society through the Crisis era, [Gen Z]Millennials will thereby become the most propulsive. Let elder Boomers conceive the visionary ends. Let midlife Xers furnish the practical means. But then let young-adult [Gen Z]Millenials, working together, furnish the critical mass that moves their entire society rapidly in one direction."
**They want a cause to follow** , they just don't know what that is yet. One group is trying to tap into their feeling by trying to "[bringing back the joy](https://substack.com/redirect/ce2da637-b15f-4ac8-b785-846ce2599822?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" Yet, it is more likely that this generation is legitimately worried about their future. As reported in a [recent poll](https://substack.com/redirect/9c4136c5-2e4b-4e31-babb-76f76e53f088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Minnesota's youth, "Ninety percent of 18- to 34-year-olds in Minnesota said their generation is worse off economically compared to their parents!" If this anxiety continues they will likely trend towards mainstreet/common-sense causes.
**CONCLUSION:**
Gen Z has embodied a new twist to the old phrase "trust but verify." Their version is, _**Distrust Until Verified**_. Having grown up in the world of economic and now political algorythms and psy-ops efforts, they are well-trained skeptics.
There is little trust outside of personal connections. They are extremely skeptical of big-tech controlling their feeds, and have adapted by creating their own individualized systems of truth-testing. They do not like to be "messaged/lectured" by authority figures. Yet, they will listen to their friends and family, but only on their terms.
Their social media entertainment is intertwined with how they get their news. They can easily catch current events between gaming, scrolling insta, or just riding the brain rot.
This generation will be saddled with tremendous responsibility in the future, so we need to bring them into the conversation early to help them verify what is real versus what makes them "feel good." In the end, I am somewhat relieved that the world will not end if my GenX generation does not change the world. We just need to control the chaos until the GenZ/Millenial heros are ready to rumble.
1
There are volumes of [articles](https://substack.com/redirect/9093af0c-33f9-422e-b501-e60a883d3fbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on what constitutes a zoomer, but for purposes of this article, I am zeroing in on those in their twenties.
2
Thus, Howe is talking about those ages 19 through 42. Thus, twenty-year-olds are late Millenials under Howe's framework. For a great summary of this book, please read [here](https://substack.com/redirect/b55fe744-1378-4030-990d-4048560de8a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_The Fourth Turning is Here_ gives us a view of the future landscape of the economic, political, social, and geopolitical pressures that will be building up over the next 5-10 years."

To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. 1. Where do you hear about news/current events. 2. How do you learn more about news/current events; and 3. What influencers do you trust. BACKGROUND As I was compiling my results, a poll was released by the . One significent finding was that over seven in ten young people (18 to 34) closely follow both national and state politics. This report confirmed what I was hearing - they are paying attention. Why it matters: is a lot. While Gen Z adults , they participate in many political activities at similar or higher rates than older Americans. In his seminal book, The Fourth Turning is Here, Neil Howe provides an overview of those individuals born between 1982-2005.2 Howe concludes that this Generation is the next "Hero" generation and will follow in the stead of the GI Generation/Greatest Generation. While his book does not distinguish the Zoomer/GenZ from the millennial generation, it does provide invaluable insight into the future of this group. While is is hard to summarize Howe's exhaustive findings, here is an excerpt: In their aspirations for the nation, they've staked out a political agenda that borders on the revolutionary. While all generations express rising discontent about America's current direction, Millennials [GenZ] are the most likely (on both the left and the right) to believe that the current regime is fundamentally broken and needs to be overhauled if not replaced. More than older generations, they think the solution may require granting extraordinary powers to one side and discarding precedents and procedures that impede the establishment of a new regime. In short, this generation matters to the future of America. Back to my summer adventure (Poll Results) | | ---|---|--- First Question - Where do you hear about Current Events: These are few of the catch-phrases that jumped out: I "Ride the news." I "follow the algorithm to see where it takes me." I "hear then research." I "follow the feed." I "stumble and then google." I "rely on brain rot." (meaning entertainment feeds) What Platforms? ###### Instagram = 8 ###### Snap chat = 5 ###### TicToc = 5 ###### Podcast = 5 ###### YouTube = 4 ###### Newsfeed = 2 ###### Facebook (local) = 2 ###### X (twitter) = 1 ###### Reddit = 1 All participants reported that they received their information in a rolling format. From social media, talking their friends and co-workers, or simply seeing a news clip in passing on television. Second Question- How do you learn more about news/current events? Google was an almost universal answer. This only scratched the surface, however, as they all wanted to truth-test what they were hearing. As one participant stated, "If it sounds like bullshit, I'll go to safari." Others said they will talk to peers on a topic before going into deep dive mode. One participant has a system to use multiple search engines to check a topic as they clearly do not "trust" the algorithms that try to tell them what to believe. This theme continued, "I hear then research. Usually with a you-tube deep dive." If an issue peaks their curiosity, they are very deliberate, persistent and patient in finding an answer. Peers, family, and their own personal BS detection process were paramount in finding some semblance of "true information." Third Question - What influencers do you trust. One participant only "trusts" those experts that do not appear to have an agenda, "no face, no credentials, and not combative." No one had a final authoritative figure or source that they trusted, although they surprisingly rely heavily upon person-to-person exchanges. Most were skeptical of the "depressing" on-line news that they are inundated with. The other theme I noted was that their search for information was intertwined with their need to continue to receive entertainment value. There is not a lot of patience for pontification or long-winded diatribes. After all, this generation created the phrase, to tell the world, "stop the blah blah." | | ---|---|--- They will listen, but not be talked down to. MORE BACKGROUND Before you lambast my unscientific polling and lack of findings, I respond that my objective was simply to get a feel for the engagement process this age group uses to obtain information about the world around them. There is plenty of recent reporting on this topic including: A May 2024 the American Press Institute entitled: Election insights: Understanding public preference for news coverage for 2024. One conclusion in this report: "...people are worried about the news containing misinformation and amplifying divisions. About half of adults say they are extremely or very concerned about news organizations reporting inaccurate information (53%). Almost as many worry news outlets will report unverified information (47%) or focus too much on divisions or controversies (48%)." Another from the American Press Insistute entitled: Gen Z and Millennial use a variet of media to get news. As reported, "Forty percent of Gen Z and Millennials either text, share, comment, or talk about news with family and friends at least once per day while only 27% do the same with other social media accounts or news organizations' websites at least once a day." The Pew Research Institute recently released an inciteful and detailed : How Americans Get News on TikTok, X, Facebook and Instagram. Of interest for zoomers, their age group is much on these core social media platforms. Another Pew Research Institute that Americans most often get local political news from friends and family, local news outlets, and social media. While this report does not provide a generational break-down, the survey results are as current as possible, being just released last month. Takeaways: To reach GenZ, there must be be a strong presence on these platforms. ? Don't assume dismissiveness means that they are not listening. Recognize that memes = news. All messaging must be quick and entertaining. A meme is definitely worth a couple hundred words. I have downloaded an app that allows me to create memes, like the one above:) While I'm pretty confident my memes may get some "OK X'r" eye-rolls, I am trying to take my own advice. Millenials are looking for influencers \- One the surprising takeaway from my overview was the fact that Gen Z voters do trust their friends and family almost universally. This conclusion was echoed by Howe, "A growing share of Milliennnial teens chose a parent rather than a celebrity as their role model." Whatever generation you are in, you can have an impact. The Harris presidential campaign is trying to supplant personal influencers with social media "influencers". They have formed a new PAC called are trying to tap into the world. Don't be discouraged or intimidated to not engage, we can be influencers. We must listen to this "hero" generation, as articulated by Howe, "Of all generations pushing society through the Crisis era, [Gen Z]Millennials will thereby become the most propulsive. Let elder Boomers conceive the visionary ends. Let midlife Xers furnish the practical means. But then let young-adult [Gen Z]Millenials, working together, furnish the critical mass that moves their entire society rapidly in one direction." They want a cause to follow , they just don't know what that is yet. One group is trying to tap into their feeling by trying to "" Yet, it is more likely that this generation is legitimately worried about their future. As reported in a of Minnesota's youth, "Ninety percent of 18- to 34-year-olds in Minnesota said their generation is worse off economically compared to their parents!" If this anxiety continues they will likely trend towards mainstreet/common-sense causes. CONCLUSION: Gen Z has embodied a new twist to the old phrase "trust but verify." Their version is, Distrust Until Verified. Having grown up in the world of economic and now political algorythms and psy-ops efforts, they are well-trained skeptics. There is little trust outside of personal connections. They are extremely skeptical of big-tech controlling their feeds, and have adapted by creating their own individualized systems of truth-testing. They do not like to be "messaged/lectured" by authority figures. Yet, they will listen to their friends and family, but only on their terms. Their social media entertainment is intertwined with how they get their news. They can easily catch current events between gaming, scrolling insta, or just riding the brain rot. This generation will be saddled with tremendous responsibility in the future, so we need to bring them into the conversation early to help them verify what is real versus what makes them "feel good." In the end, I am somewhat relieved that the world will not end if my GenX generation does not change the world. We just need to control the chaos until the GenZ/Millenial heros are ready to rumble. 1 There are volumes of on what constitutes a zoomer, but for purposes of this article, I am zeroing in on those in their twenties. 2 Thus, Howe is talking about those ages 19 through 42. Thus, twenty-year-olds are late Millenials under Howe's framework. For a great summary of this book, please read , "The Fourth Turning is Here gives us a view of the future landscape of the economic, political, social, and geopolitical pressures that will be building up over the next 5-10 years." You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Benda For Commonsense 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Dan Osborn
subject: why I was fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
As president of our local union, I led the strike.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Dan Osborn's campaign in Nebraska from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90639717/491175564/1647001491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMThkYjU0Yy0xYzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXB_GUzq0Ocmxg0IFTTzF_dM9vhdsZA3qp2ZRtZwEHo=&emci=f3312782-9f57-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=c18db54c-1c58-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)_
Hey there,
In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years.
I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family.
When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after.
But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers.
**So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90639718/491175565/92586991?refcode=em20240811pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c18db54c-1c58-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMThkYjU0Yy0xYzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXB_GUzq0Ocmxg0IFTTzF_dM9vhdsZA3qp2ZRtZwEHo=)
It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class.
After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone.
It was one of the proudest moments of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90639719/491175566/92586991?refcode=em20240811pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c18db54c-1c58-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMThkYjU0Yy0xYzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXB_GUzq0Ocmxg0IFTTzF_dM9vhdsZA3qp2ZRtZwEHo=)
Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block.
It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me.
**Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her.**
Three polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am LEADING her by 2 points.
**I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat.**
**[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate right now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Republican Deb Fischer and win this Senate seat in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90639720/491175567/92586991?refcode=em20240811pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c18db54c-1c58-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMThkYjU0Yy0xYzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXB_GUzq0Ocmxg0IFTTzF_dM9vhdsZA3qp2ZRtZwEHo=)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue:_
| | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90639721/491175568/92586991?refcode=em20240811pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&recurring=true&refcode2=c18db54c-1c58-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMThkYjU0Yy0xYzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXB_GUzq0Ocmxg0IFTTzF_dM9vhdsZA3qp2ZRtZwEHo=)**

| | Dear Peter,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from last month, shows how the Times covered the story of Hezbollah's strike on a children's soccer game in Israel. The Times would have you focus on Israel's response. There's nothing about the innocent victims and the terror group that's responsible. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**

| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88c467ee23ee48f6888286d9217e60e9&_e=nxf_X4g06uJjY79v9jisocXmgXtWzic0HkXE2g49gtUI2nq1nPBybreriuxBEk66Vv-aGG9w6reaSSSjV29FQRK0EA0V-bQ2uNfIkg1GCUqOAGz2qeNty6bx-Ur2A3Egm6uDurOGpNesKATSoMXtdCcORza41wV6dmUc9tJrBkv77JXU4uJHrWa03LYohfmw1DkyDA5m_yR-D6Wcwp3WDPxdE6Zq2fZcoD5a9lr4lOfV5PLtUR3wQ3OSJ6zhiLFEpZm4Jp_xP0f5HXkv4IT5ydQRcGzDkR2xOSNcwGAbVx-vWAb2LOdDrPjDBWq-BrvbIuqnf5JV10iTDRfEAfjVkN5QXpqLQ_D5gddkk4YSFuq2Q6Pj9VSlBIGKnlepuenLRD3NHIa4hLuVM7aFBq7JYQDwYGlz4248YhgFCya3Wrj70N3uUnT6dgiJE_X7mt-6). Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record! Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It may sound like an exaggeration, but your $5 has the power to save someone’s life
#

Friends -
If you knew that your $5 could help get the next major gun safety law passed, [**wouldn’t you donate it right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug24.hBGz9O&refcode=em240811-1-30&t=1&akid=8679%2E3935704%2EiKkOGb)
If you knew that your $5 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, research, and supporting gun safety candidates—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic—[**wouldn’t you chip in $5 right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug24.hBGz9O&refcode=em240811-1-30&t=2&akid=8679%2E3935704%2EiKkOGb)
If you knew that your $5 had the power to save someone’s life, [**wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could ever spend?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug24.hBGz9O&refcode=em240811-1-30&t=3&akid=8679%2E3935704%2EiKkOGb)
We know that may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass at the federal level and in states across the country.
But there’s still far more to be done. People die from preventable gun violence each and every day in America. We must keep fighting until every single person in our nation can live freely without the threat of gun violence in their communities.
[**So please, contribute $5 today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug24.hBGz9O&refcode=em240811-1-30&t=4&akid=8679%2E3935704%2EiKkOGb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: YDA Alumni Event Planning Team
subject: Reminder: YDA Alumni Reception featuring Anderson Clayton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Democrats of America, _www
body:
| |
---
Greetings, Derek — We wanted to remind you that our Young Democrats of America Alumni Dessert Reception during the Democratic National Convention in Chicago is just a little over a week away.

The reception will be held on **Monday, August 19th** , from **2:00 to 4:00 PM** at the **Hyatt Regency** (151 East Wacker Drive, Chicago, IL 60601). We'll also be joined by a special guest, **North Carolina Democratic Party Chair Anderson Clayton**.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs-awooTlqqtZEDWnaS3MuVe580tP4ZWdJme3oOKycd6y9nVPWeTfypRtINl3c-sAFb9YoDzJJ2vRXD9lbF5X1voKaulBedS7qLXqoyAL0fZLsE8pKFJ1hECcscy0voR2k8K3Mp910p3auTl-_JeooyDR1uDA3Ib5ANoesPLkV1PVMlg-qcJxAUA-bLglFTgyXgs-7rk6Z3ECYa3z7WA1h-gKfvaiZeIyBGi4SDBnBC1SmkirVh45xbhUhJQBffWbIun2c46h7LNhVIXdG0af53gdCsl8Gku39NG9sPiZ9LdElBvAo6_HgalSXWppe1B-wCZ3uvjrxNeDhRUedU75IKUZusBJBDnGwDVDnLvNseR4RBgJWuwRd-xyKMsW1iu41UkqtVcJ0j1xsYwU0FjVDW/48t/8avbSwLYRVOdPlQJEJu3bw/h0/h001.W5-JlttfQ8B6pDXbEs4K1kwhmVJZhts0vwTs0-I31y4)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 8/11/2024
body:
Harris ‘copies’ Trump’s no tax on tips policy at rally in hospitality-heavy Nevada
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**August 11, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
Vice President Kamala Harris, during a campaign stop in Las Vegas, announced her support for [eliminating taxes on tips](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), mirroring a policy first touted by Donald Trump. Former President Trump quickly [criticized Harris](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for adopting his policy, accusing her of political opportunism via a post on Truth Social. He emphasized that the no-tax-on-tips was originally his idea, introduced during a prior campaign event in Nevada. Trump claims Harris's version lacks sincerity and is merely a tactic to gain voter support.
Meanwhile, Trump continued his campaign efforts with a [visit to Aspen, Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), where he attended a private fundraiser hosted by high-profile donors. The event, aimed at bolstering his re-election bid, saw high enthusiasm from local Republicans despite the state's Democratic leanings.
As the political tension escalates, both candidates are actively campaigning in key battleground states. The debates scheduled for September, agreed upon by Trump, are anticipated to further highlight their contrasting policies and approaches towards national issues.
Warm regards, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **STATE**
---
**[In continuing saga, judge lifts order, allowing adversaries possible vote to remove GOP chair; Dueling meetings might exist again](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A district court judge on Tuesday paved the way for a vote to remove Colorado Republican Party Chairman Dave Williams by lifting a temporary restraining order that blocked a group of Colorado Republicans from holding a meeting to consider whether to fire the party boss.
**[‘We’re not going anywhere’: Protect Kids Colorado pledges to be back in 2026 for another run at initiatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) An effort to place two initiatives on the statewide 2024 ballot came up short, but leaders and volunteers of Protect Kids Colorado say they will continue the work toward successful 2026 signature campaigns.

**[There are 2.5 million acres of ag land in Colorado owned by foreign interests, but will lawmakers pass a bill to stop it?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) State Rep. Brandi Bradley, R-Roxborough Park, introduced House Bill 23-1152 more than a year ago, aiming to ban foreign ownership of agricultural land in Colorado.
**[PODCAST: Looking at PERA, the pension plan that supports 140,000 Coloradans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMMON SENSE INSTITUTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Coloradans have several options to try to address rising property taxes in 2024. The state legislature passed SB24-233 with bipartisan support at the end of the 2024 legislative session. Voters could choose to keep SB24-233 or eschew the bill for either or both Initiatives 50 and 108.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Copy cat Kamala: Harris ‘copies’ Trump’s no tax on tips policy at rally in hospitality-heavy Nevada](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NEW YORK POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Vice President Kamala Harris rolled out a promise to stomp out taxes on tips during a campaign stop in Las Vegas Saturday — prompting former President Donald Trump to rip her for “copying” one of his signature proposals.
**[Who is Harris’ VP candidate Tim Walz? A far Left radical, Trump campaign says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Where does the selection of Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz as vice president place a possible Kamala Harris-Walz presidential administration on the political spectrum?
**[Growing government debt is bigger threat to economy than climate change, CBO says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE WASHINGTON TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The rapidly rising federal debt will do substantially more damage to the U.S. economy in coming years than climate change, the Congressional Budget Office said, putting stark figures on the size of the danger.
**[Claims against Walz for ‘stolen valor’ ignite battle between House veterans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Controversy over Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz’s military service record is at the heart of Capitol Hill’s latest political firestorm, with veterans on both sides of the aisle chiming in on the new Democratic vice presidential candidate.
**[99 illegal aliens on terrorist watchlist released into U.S., report finds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Under the Biden-Harris administration, at least 99 illegal aliens on America’s terrorist watchlist have been released into the United States, according to a congressional report.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Aspen was abuzz for Donald Trump’s visit to attend private fundraiser](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KDVR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Donald Trump made an unlikely visit to the Colorado mountains on Saturday, looking to raise money for his re-election campaign.
**[As sentencing approaches on four misdemeanors, ‘J6 Praying Grandma’ prepared for prison](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO SPRINGS GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rebecca Lavrenz doesn’t want to go to prison, but for the past four months the 72-year-old great-grandmother, retired registered nurse and small-business owner in El Paso County has been steeling herself for that possibility.
**[‘Wellington is killing its residents’: Some say water bills have increased to more than $1,000 a month](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Many residents in a small but growing town in northern Colorado are accusing the town of increasing water bill rates to levels that are unaffordable, leaving many to wonder if there is a system error while others are contemplating moving. Wellington, a town of nearly 12,000 people, is at the center of the dispute.
**[Puppy at Englewood adoption event tested positive for rabies, Colorado health officials warn](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment is contacting people who attended a puppy adoption event last month in one Colorado city. The health department is screening attendees after a puppy tested positive for rabies on Wednesday.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Gaines: How the legislature performed magic to make your TABOR refund disappear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _They take your TABOR refund, not by removing it from your hand, but by taking away the possibility there will be one in the first place._
**[Ganahl: The Politics of Pets in Colorado, Part 1](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Last week, our family added a new furry member: 7-month-old “Bruce”, a bull terrier pup rescued out of a domestic violence situation, through my dear friend Lynn Gerber’s rescue organization, Pawsitive Pathways._
**[Hardin: Understanding Colorado House Bill 24-1174, a shift in concealed carry training](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado’s landscape for concealed carry permits is set for a significant transformation with the introduction and passage of House Bill 24-1174._
**[Devotional: Embracing red, white and true authenticity beyond politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As a pastor, I often face pressure to align with a political party. People want to know if I lean toward the red or blue party. My response is simple but meaningful: “I don’t align with red or blue, only with what is true!"_
__
**[Zornio: Hickenlooper, age 74, is the Joe Biden of Colorado. But, will he step aside, too?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _On Friday morning, Colorado Sen. John Hickenlooper tweeted, “Ecstatic to cast my vote to nominate @KamalaHarris as the Democratic candidate for president 2024.”_
_**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** From 1921-1948, **artists participated in the Olympics** , too. In these games, painters, sculptors, architects, writers, and musicians all took part! They competed for medals by creating works of art, that often celebrated the sporting successes going on at the same time. While artists stopped officially competing in 1948, many still design posters and other merchandise for the Games today!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “To give anything less than your best is to sacrifice the gift.” – Steve Prefontaine

**_Peter Peter Peter_**

For months, dark money groups like the Koch network have been pouring MILLIONS into Nevada to tip the scales in the GOP's favor. And after _The Cook Political Report_ reported that Nevada is the "most perilous" battleground for Democrats, Donald Trump and JD Vance both personally traveled here to rally their MAGA base around flipping this battleground red.
Their strategy is working: Polls have shown Jacky Rosen locked NECK AND NECK with her Trump-backed opponent, which means we cannot afford to lose an inch of ground.
[**With all eyes on Nevada, the ONLY way we can fight back against the GOP's massive spending here is with the grassroots support of folks like you. subject: 86 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Elissa Slotkin and I believe in a future where every person has the opportunity not just to get by, but to get ahead.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)

Friend --
$10.
That’s the donation I am asking you to split between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin’s campaign.
I’ll explain more, but if that is all you need to hear, you can make a donation at this link below:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ebs-em-harris-aug24](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.CTGbDV&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=2&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)**

| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.bjeiDi&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=6&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.AqKIoj&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=7&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.ctZdlA&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=8&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)**
---
****
In 86 days, Michigan will decide who they want as their next U.S. Senator and their next President.
Ultimately, this election is about two different visions for our nation. One focused on the _future_. And one focused on the _past_.
**Elissa Slotkin and I believe in a future where every person has the opportunity not just to get by, but to get ahead.**
Where no child has to grow up in poverty. Where every worker has the freedom to join a union. Where every person has affordable health care, child care, and paid leave. Where every senior can retire with dignity.
**But Donald Trump and his extremist Republican allies want to take our country backward.** They intend to cut Social Security and Medicare, to give tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations and to make working families foot the bill, and end the Affordable Care Act.
_America has tried these failed policies before. We are not going back._
Generations of Americans before us led the fight for freedom. _Now, the baton is in our hands._ To protect the right to vote. To get assault weapons off of our streets. To restore reproductive freedom, reversing Donald Trump's extreme abortion bans.
The Michigan Senate race could be the deciding factor in whether Democrats maintain the majority. I look forward to working with Elissa to fight for the American people.
[**If you are ready to join us in the fight for freedom and opportunity for all, please split a donation of $10 to our campaigns. Because when we fight, we win.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.CTGbDV&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=9&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)
Thank you and take care,
Kamala
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-harris-aug24.CTGbDV&refcode=em2400811-2-900&refcode2=khp_em_20240811_b1_kdh_es_fl&t=10&akid=1762%2E135344%2EzclJiA)
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is absolutely critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
[**If you’re in a place where you can make a contribution to support my re-election campaign today, it would be a huge help. I’ll explain why:**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=9&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2) Now that we’re in the thick of campaign season, and our primary election in Massachusetts is closely approaching, we are required to report our fundraising results more often. And our next deadline is coming up this week. Since our last fundraising report, a Super PAC supporting my Republican opponent (a crypto-lawyer from Rhode Island recruited to run against me) raked in $2 million from three massive donations — from two crypto billionaires and one big crypto firm. To put that into perspective: Those donations are over half a million more than our campaign had raised in total during our last fundraising quarter. Just like that. **It’s absolutely critical that we show strength on this upcoming fundraising report. And this grassroots campaign relies on a large number of supporters pitching in a little at a time, instead of a small number of billionaires and special interests pitching in a lot at a time.** [**I’m proud of running a grassroots campaign like this — but it can only work if we all pitch in when we can. So if you’re able, will you please contribute $28 or anything you can right now to respond to this Super PACs funding with a strong surge of grassroots support and demonstrate strength on our next fundraising report?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?amount=28&t=10&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=30&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=20&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=22&express_lane=true&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---

---
On top of showing strength on our next public report, here’s what your donation would help accomplish:
* Supplying the resources we need to run a strong campaign in Massachusetts, compete against any influences from special interest groups trying to buy this election, and hold onto our Senate majority.
* Building momentum for our plans for big, bold action — like universal child care, a wealth tax, a guaranteed nationwide right to an abortion, ethics reform at the Supreme Court, and a whole lot more.
* Taking power out of the hands of special interests, greedy CEOs, and wealthy insiders and putting it where it belongs: in the hands of working people.

Look, August, September, and October are some of the most critical months of an election year — when most spending takes place. They’ve got their handful of special interest donors, but we’ve got each other. Thousands of supporters chipping in an average of $25 at a time — vs. two billionaires and one company fueling a Super PAC. I’ll take this team any day of the week. [**This is the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone. So can you please pitch in $25 or anything you can right now to respond to this Super PACs funding with a strong surge of grassroots support for my re-election campaign?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=16&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2547?t=14&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2305%2E4032634%2EhvmTx2)
---|---|---|---

1. **Pennsylvania’s Attorney General is the last line of defense against MAGA extremism and greedy corporations.** As our next AG, Eugene will ensure every woman who comes to our commonwealth can access the reproductive care they need. He’ll defend the results of our elections in court. He’ll protect the rights of hard-working Pennsylvanians against any extremist attack that comes our way.

2. **Pennsylvania’s Attorney General is the chief law enforcement officer tasked with protecting consumers from scammers and greedy corporations.** As Auditor General, Eugene brought justice to victims and confronted organizations that misused taxpayer cash — saving Pennsylvanians over $1 billion in waste, fraud, and abuse. As our next Attorney General, he’ll defend workers from wage theft, stop price gouging, and fight to protect you from the predatory companies that fueled the opioid epidemic.

3. **But election experts have labeled this race a pure toss-up.** Republicans are spending massive sums of cash to swing this tied race in their favor. One Pennsylvania billionaire has already spent over $2.5 million to run ads in support of Eugene’s opponent, and National Republicans are spending another $5 million!

**If we want to win this race and protect our fundamental rights from Donald Trump and his MAGA minions, we really need your help to fight back against this onslaught of dark money.** [_**Help Eugene keep the Attorney General’s office blue by rushing an urgent $**_**_3_** _**donation today. We need your grassroots support to take on the big MAGA money →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90641289/491180767/-1411674665?refcode=email_081124_3reasons&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE4ZmU4Yi0yMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDTIG9WxJg-lqBC_AhNELT6yFS0fIxqZX4Ncilcgw-E=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90641290/491180768/-1411674665?refcode=email_081124_3reasons&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE4ZmU4Yi0yMzU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDTIG9WxJg-lqBC_AhNELT6yFS0fIxqZX4Ncilcgw-E=)

clean_body: We know you’re busy, so we’ll make this quick: Take just a minute to read these three reasons why Eugene DePasquale needs your support in his race for Attorney General below —= 1. Pennsylvania’s Attorney General is the last line of defense against MAGA extremism and greedy corporations. As our next AG, Eugene will ensure every woman who comes to our commonwealth can access the reproductive care they need. He’ll defend the results of our elections in court. He’ll protect the rights of hard-working Pennsylvanians against any extremist attack that comes our way. 2. Pennsylvania’s Attorney General is the chief law enforcement officer tasked with protecting consumers from scammers and greedy corporations. As Auditor General, Eugene brought justice to victims and confronted organizations that misused taxpayer cash — saving Pennsylvanians over $1 billion in waste, fraud, and abuse. As our next Attorney General, he’ll defend workers from wage theft, stop price gouging, and fight to protect you from the predatory companies that fueled the opioid epidemic. 3. But election experts have labeled this race a pure toss-up. Republicans are spending massive sums of cash to swing this tied race in their favor. One Pennsylvania billionaire has already spent over $2.5 million to run ads in support of Eugene’s opponent, and National Republicans are spending another $5 million! If we want to win this race and protect our fundamental rights from Donald Trump and his MAGA minions, we really need your help to fight back against this onslaught of dark money. = | | = Thank you for everything you do. Dear friend,
I’m personally asking you to support the Nevada State Democratic Party with a donation. But before you do, I want you to know why it matters.
**_Mitch McConnell and his allies spent over $55 million to defeat me because they knew Nevada was the key to controlling the Senate. I narrowly won re-election by less than a percentage point and I couldn’t have done it without grassroots supporters like you, friend._**
The stakes could not be higher in Nevada. The far-right is going to pour even more money into Nevada to try and make this critical swing-state red.
_The Washington Post_ is already reporting that Sen. Jacky Rosen is one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election, and with control of the White House on the line, we cannot afford to sit on the sidelines right now.

body:

| | |

We need to turn this around NOW, friend.

**Our Senate race in Ohio is officially the most expensive in the country – by A LOT. Senate control is on the line, and the GOP is outspending us by $6 MILLION to defeat Sherrod Brown and flip this seat.**
