name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Did you miss this urgent message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Jill's ballot access dire in last 5 states

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_ba_resend_8_11&n=1)
---
Peter, Yesterday we sent an urgent message about Jill’s ballot access situation in 5 states and we wanted to make sure it didn't slip through the cracks. We need to raise tens of thousands of dollars in the next few weeks or millions of voters in Minnesota, Delaware, Alabama, Virginia, and Rhode Island will not have an anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate emergency candidate alternative in November. The deadline for collecting signatures in these states is coming up fast. In Minnesota and Delaware, we have until August 20th. In Alabama and Virginia, the deadline is August 23rd, and Rhode Island’s deadline is September 6th. _**We know we have been sending a lot of emails asking for donations, but it’s no exaggeration to say that if we don’t raise a significant amount of money in the next few days, Jill will lose ballot access in Minnesota, Delaware, Alabama, Virginia, and Rhode Island.**_ So many people stepped up to donate yesterday- but we still need over $50,000 to reach our goal. **[Peter, we need supporters like you to give as much as you can today. Show your support for Jill and real democracy by contributing now:](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_ba_resend_8_11&n=2)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_ba_resend_8_11&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3_ba_resend_8_11&n=3)
---
We are not going to give up or capitulate to the parties of war and Wall Street. We are in this fight for the long haul, and, with your continued support, we will take the fight directly to the empire by exposing their corrupt, genocidal policies and challenging them on ballots across the country. In solidarity and gratitude, Jill Stein 2024
---
* * *
---

---

Hi Peter,
Yesterday, the Southeast Democrats Network co-hosted a CD-18 Candidate Forum where each candidate could share their perspectives, experience, and policy positions.
Bottom line, the energy and momentum were clearly on our side. I emphasized the importance of building upon the foundation we have while forging a path forward, as well. Fox26 covered the Candidate Forum and you can check out their coverage by clicking here. [https://www.fox26houston.com/video/1499068]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dIHl6CMdK5A [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dIHl6CMdK5A]
We know we have the momentum to win this race and in the final days we cannot let our foot off the gas. Can you chip in today to make sure that Amanda Edwards is our next Congresswoman? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_cd18forum]
Thank you,
Team Edwards

body:

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Threats in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_2&amount=25]
NBC: Kari Lake suggests supporters 'strap on a Glock' to be ready for 2024 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081124_2&amount=25]
Team: Sometimes the headline is all we need to know the truth.
Failed MAGA gubernatorial candidate and current Senate hopeful Kari Lake told supporters they can " strap on a Glock " to be prepared for the intensity of the 2024 campaign and urged military and law enforcement veterans to be "ready," as her race heats up in a key battleground state.
This isn't some "out of context" misunderstanding. She literally said she and her supporters needed to " put on our helmet or your Kari Lake ball cap. We are going to put on the armor of God. And maybe strap on a Glock on the side of us just in case .”
It is terrifying that, 234 years after George Washington first took office as president, we have a major party candidate for Senate instigating fear and the potential need for political violence on behalf of herself and a candidate for president.
Because of course Trump is tied to this: “ We need to send people to Washington, D.C., that the swamp does not want there, ” Kari Lake also said in the same speech. “And I can think of a couple people they don’t want there. First on that list is Donald J. Trump; second is Kari Lake. ”
Don't forget -- Arizona was already the state where armed vigilantes were caught on camera questioning and threatening voters at drop box locations in 2020 and 2022 . This is voter intimidation in the extreme, brought to you by an extremist movement who think they deserve to win no matter how much of a minority opinion they are. A movement that has already broken the rules and spawned an insurrection that defiled our Capitol.
We have to spread the word in Arizona and across the country about candidates who call for this kind of voter intimidation and political violence. Fuel our efforts to educate and turn out voters with $25 or whatever you can right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081124_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081124_2&amount=25]

name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: I work for Tim Walz. Here’s what he’s like when the cameras are off.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Peter, I’m immensely proud to be Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90642049/491183439/-2139915620?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-08-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkMDJhZjNhLTI2NTgtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaJTHb80MGiXiDZNuFH67eRariKivjR9GxFmRYe5T6U=)
---
**America is about to be introduced to Tim Walz, vice presidential candidate.** The former teacher who made school lunches free for all Minnesota children. The veteran who helped students start a Gay-Straight Alliance in 1999 because he knew having the football coach and soldier as faculty advisor would help stop bullying. The governor who protected reproductive rights and took on the NRA.

**But I want to introduce you to Tim Walz, my friend.** The man who will get on his knees to tie your child’s shoe when she asks for help, put syrup on her pancakes and cut them into bite-sized pieces, and always greet her with an enthusiastic “How ya doing’, sister?!”

**Peter, I’m immensely proud to be Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and I’m going to fight like hell to elect him and Kamala Harris this November.[_If you’re with me on the Walz Wagon, will you split a donation of $10 or more between Fight for Progress and the DLGA to help us turn out voters this November?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/90642050/491183440/-2139915620?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-08-11_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkMDJhZjNhLTI2NTgtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaJTHb80MGiXiDZNuFH67eRariKivjR9GxFmRYe5T6U=)**

clean_body: Peter, I’m immensely proud to be Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor | = America is about to be introduced to Tim Walz, vice presidential candidate. The former teacher who made school lunches free for all Minnesota children. The veteran who helped students start a Gay-Straight Alliance in 1999 because he knew having the football coach and soldier as faculty advisor would help stop bullying. The governor who protected reproductive rights and took on the NRA. But I want to introduce you to Tim Walz, my friend. The man who will get on his knees to tie your child’s shoe when she asks for help, put syrup on her pancakes and cut them into bite-sized pieces, and always greet her with an enthusiastic “How ya doing’, sister?!” Peter, I’m immensely proud to be Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and I’m going to fight like hell to elect him and Kamala Harris this November.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = Tim Walz is exactly the type of man who can restore your faith in humanity, and I’m grateful to call him my boss, and my friend. Minnesota will miss having him to ourselves — but America needs him now. Let’s win this!! 💙 Peggy Flanagan Lt. name: LinebergerforUSCongress
subject: Update from Lineberger for US Congress – August 11th, 2024
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

*Get Engaged*. *Stay engaged*. We are down to within the last 86 days
until the election is complete.
October 7th is the last day to register and be able to vote in this
election.
October 21 marks the start of early voting. November 5th is election day!
*What we do now will make all of the difference in the quality of our lives
post-election*.

With that in mind, here is what’s coming up soon.

Tuesday, August 13th, 6 PM – 8 PM, Wise County Candidate Meet & Greet,
Decatur Fairfield Inn

Wednesday, August 14th, 7 PM, Carrollton Pride Dinner, Nico’s Cocina, 3065
N Josey Ln, Carrollton

Thursday, August 15th, Denton County Delegate Sendoff, 1809 Buzzard Rd,
Denton, TX

Saturday, August 17th, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Flower Mound, Precinct
3149
Meeting at Café inside Market Street, 3800 Long Prairie Rd
Link to RSVP and details:
https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/660686/

Sunday, August 18th, Morning, plan to check back in with our home Church
after weeks of visiting other Churches in the District

Sunday, August 18th, 6-7PM, Virtual, Answer the Call with Denton County
Democratic Party

Monday, August 19 – 22, Democratic National Convention, Chicago
(Not going personally, but very excited about it. Should be
good energy!)

Wednesday, August 21st, Flower Mound Area Democrats General Meeting

Thursday, August 22nd, NAIFA Legislative Reception, Addison, TX
This will be a multi-party reception with Insurance and
Finance professionals

Saturday, August 24th, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Flower Mound, Precinct
3139
Meeting at Walmart Neighborhood Market, 2800 Flower Mound Rd,
Flower Mound, TX 75022
Link to RSVP and details:
https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/666617/

Saturday, August 24th, LBJ Obama Dinner, DCDP, Hilton Garden Inn, Lewisville

Sunday, August 25th, Morning, Visit and worship with another Church
somewhere in our district
We get to see more aspects of our community and they get to
know us better.

Monday, August 26th, Receive and begin answering League of Women Voters
Candidate Questionnaire
for submission no later than August 30th

Saturday, August 31st, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Location TBD

In addition to these events, we will be continuing our phone banking,
postcards, and other efforts to reach out to voters. Contact us to get
involved.

YARD SIGNS: We made a special purchase of 500 yard signs due to arrive very
soon (likely Wednesday, August 14th)
August 7th was the date that signs can go up in public
places. We’ll need some help getting some in good visible places. Most of
these will be going to homes. Signs at homes (when visible) have a
positive impact on the neighborhood. It sends the message of comradery and
numbers.

Digital Advertising: We signed a contract to stream ads to targeted voters’
phones in a program to leave over one million impressions. I’ve been
working to create the videos to be used in those ads. This costs money,
but is a good force multiplier when done in concert with our more personal
but time-consuming methods. It is much less expensive than TV advertising.

Some highlights from this last week include,
Thursday, August 8th, Attended the Denton County Democratic
Party Precinct Chair meeting held at Robson Ranch. Saw some friends, made
new friends, and heard a very interesting and promising presentation about
Blue Action Network. Blue Action teaches the use of Reach software to
build and interface with a network of your close friends and family. You
help them through the voting process to ensure more Texas Dem’s vote.
Also, found homes for the last 8 of my previous shipment of signs.

Saturday, August 10th, had a very successful block Walk event in Flower
Mound, TX. We had 7 walkers and knocked about 340 doors. This was the
last block walk for one of our dedicated college students who will soon be
on his way back to school. And also the second to last for another. We
have been truly blessed to have their energy and support working our
campaign.

Sunday, August 11th, morning, shared a wonderful worship service at Holy
Covenant United Methodist Church, Carrollton, TX. The church members we
met before and after service seemed very positive and excited about our
campaign. They invited us to a potluck meal afterwards (yumm!) and are
helping with the postcards for our campaign.

Sunday, August 11th, 1:30 – 2:30 PM, met with the Rural Area Denton County
Dem’s in Sanger, TX. The group seemed to be more than 2x the normal group
size. There was training on the details of voting in Denton County
including some of the paperwork associated with voting by mail. Your best
bet is to do in person early voting. Good group. Growing energy. We even
had some important visitors from Cooke County at this meeting.

To donate, just go to the regular donation link on the campaign website,
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/.

Everything you do to support us in our efforts to get our message out,
support our campaign financially, and your own personal efforts to share
our message are making a difference. Thank you!

Giving Voters a Better Choice and Hope for a Better Future!

Ernest Lineberger

Your Democratic Nominee for US House for TX CD26.

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3834%2E552475%2EhG51oE)
Peter, PA’s Senate race is heating up:
→ Inside Elections shows the PA senate race having a _slight tilt_ for Democrats, **but far from being solid, with no guarantees.** → The Hill’s list for Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats of 2024 ranks PA as **4th most likely.** → WHYY reports “a Casey loss **could guarantee Republican control of the Senate.”** → According to the Cook Political Report Mitch McConnell listed Pennsylvania as one of his **top three targets this November.**
---
One thing we can guarantee is this race is one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the US. GOP billionaires are pouring millions into this race on top of McCormick’s self funding.

In case you missed it, Fox News has been covering violence by Venezeulan gangs across the United States. The recent unrest, including thefts and shootings, underscores the seriousness of border security.
Fox reported on a disturbing Homeland Security memo revealing that the Tren de Aragua gang has been**** given the**"green light" to target police officers in Denver**.

|
---
| [ ](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjk0MDY3MTg3MDY3MTQ1NDYsXCJyXCI6MTI5NDA2NzIyMjYwMzM4MTI0fSIsInMiOiJhNjQzMGZlZDlhYmIzOTA3In0)

| _John Fabbricatore, a former ICE field office director who is now running for a congressional seat in Colorado as a Republican, told_[ _Fox News Digital_](https://wrzeyj.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjgzNDExMCxcImxcIjoxMjk0MDY3MTg3MTE5NTc0MjcsXCJyXCI6MTI5NDA2NzIyMjYwMzM4MTI0fSIsInMiOiI4MTIwNWI0Y2I5MGU3NDJiIn0) _that the gang has got a foothold in the state and is taking over apartment buildings. He said that the gang has taken advantage of the ongoing border crisis._ _"This whole border situation over the last three and a half years has allowed countless criminals to be allowed into the United States, and we're seeing an uptick in crime, especially in illegal immigrant crime throughout the US, and sanctuary cities are just magnetizing it," he said. _

---
|
---
**Jason Crow's approach to border security is clearly insufficient** in protecting our communities. We need decisive leadership to address these pressing issues and ensure the safety of our neighborhoods. As your Republican nominee for Congress, I am committed to pushing for **stricter border controls, enhanced vetting processes, and stronger support for our law enforcement officers**. It's time to take action to secure our future and restore order.
|

John Fabbricatore

"This whole border situation over the last three and a half years has allowed countless criminals to be allowed into the United States, and we're seeing an uptick in crime, especially in illegal immigrant crime throughout the US, and sanctuary cities are just magnetizing it," he said. | Jason Crow's approach to border security is clearly insufficient in protecting our communities. We need decisive leadership to address these pressing issues and ensure the safety of our neighborhoods. As your Republican nominee for Congress, I am committed to pushing for stricter border controls, enhanced vetting processes, and stronger support for our law enforcement officers**. It's time to take action to secure our future and restore order. | | | | Sincerely, John Fabbricatore Republican Nominee - CO-6 | | John Fabbricatore for Colorado PO Box 460834Aurora, CO 80046 | | | | ---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. | | | Paid for by John Fabbricatore for Colorado. Use of John Fabbricatore's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force of the Department of Defense.

| You can help us reach more people and keep growing our grassroots team today.

How’s your inbox looking, Peter? If it looks anything like mine, I’m sure there are plenty of spam emails — sent by misleading sources, with deceptive subject lines, and packed with fear-mongering content. Email providers like Gmail are cracking down on these spam emails: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3783?c0=tbe-em-240504.ZGr-ow&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240811_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3296%2E35263%2E6k4TZ9) I think we can all agree: less spam is good! name: Team McBride
subject: Checking in with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah kicked off a roundtable series to inform her agenda in Congress!
#
Listening to voters, local leaders, and supporters about the issues that matter most is what running for office is all about.
**That’s why recently, Sarah kicked off a roundtable series to inform her agenda in Congress!**
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-mcbride-priorities-survey/?source=em20240811-1-985&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)
**Our campaign’s first roundtable discussion featured public school educators from across the state, elected officials who have advocated for Delaware’s public schools, and union leaders.** Together, we discussed early childhood interventions, preschool for all children, classroom sizes, and educator pay.
And over the next several weeks, we’ll be holding conversations to talk about solutions that will match the scope and scale of the issues important to all of us — like reproductive rights, gun reform, environmental justice and climate change, education, healthcare, and more!
**But with less than 90 days until Election Day, Sarah also wants to hear from YOU.[**So, we put together a short survey to give us a sense of what’s important to you right now as Sarah runs to fight for bold change in Congress. Can you take a brief moment to complete it?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-mcbride-priorities-survey/?source=em20240811-1-985&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-mcbride-priorities-survey/?source=em20240811-1-985&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)**
We look forward to hearing from you!
\- Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240811-1&t=1&refcode2=985_21716_WJrv6W&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=985%2E21716%2EWJrv6W)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

body:
They told us it could not be done. They were wrong.

|
---
| | | [They told us it could not be done. They were wrong.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_were_wrong_8_11_dn1&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_were_wrong_8_11_dn1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The Mainstream Media, the DC Insiders, Democrat and Republican Party Officials all agreed: **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. would not be on the ballot in 2024.**
A pipe-dream.
Unthinkable.
Not a chance.
[WE PROVED THEM ALL WRONG! ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_were_wrong_8_11_dn1&n=3)
This week we added RFK Jr. to ballots in South Dakota, Nevada, Vermont and Wisconsin.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_were_wrong_8_11_dn1&n=4)
These four new states mean the Kennedy for President campaign is on the ballot in 45 states!
Here are the milestones you giving helped achieve:
* Kennedy for President _will be on the ballot in all 50 states_ and the District of Columbia.
* The ballot access operation _raised more than $15 million_.
* The campaign has _collected more than 1 million signatures_ – setting an all-time record.
* Kennedy now has ballot access in 45 states, _totaling 503 electoral votes_ , 93% of the 538 total electoral votes nationwide.

This is an extraordinary achievement, laying the groundwork not only for victory in 2024, but paving the way for future Independent candidates and a robust third party ready and able to take on the corrupt Washington Establishment.
Unfortunately, as the saying goes, “There is no rest for the weary.”
We must continue on as we’re under 100 days away from an election that may well determine the future of our Republic – will we survive or will we succumb to hate, division, and fear?
That’s why our positive message of unity, of building up and not tearing down, is so critical.
That’s why Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is running for office: to offer Americans an alternative to the same-old, same-old hate, endless wars, and a runaway budget deficit at $34 trillion and counting.
It is unsustainable. And the leaders of both political parties have buried their heads in the sand and are denying this reality.
Yet, while it is unsustainable, it is not inevitable.
America can be saved.
It must be done together. We are asking you to please give today.
[Please consider giving the maximum contribution of $3,300.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?amount=3300&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_were_wrong_8_11_dn1&n=5)

---

---

Your gift is transforming the political landscape. The Mainstream Media and the DC Insiders will be the last ones to see this coming.
They told us it could not be done. They were wrong.
Let’s prove them wrong again, stand united, and fight back against the tyranny of endless wars, an open border, chronic sickness, and a $34 trillion deficit that is threatening our survival as a nation.
Team Kennedy

MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS so _they’re launching brutal attacks against Rep. Raskin to send his approval rating PLUMMETING!_

* * *
**[_Do you approve of Rep. Jamie Raskin?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20240811_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21857%2E4449941%2Evwnh4f)** []() | **[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_raskin?source=FFR_20240811_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21857%2E4449941%2Evwnh4f)**

***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
* * *
Listen, MAGA Republicans are willing to do *ANYTHING* to help Donald Trump claw his way back into the White House!

_Including turning a blind eye to Trump’s many crimes and wrongdoings._

**That’s why the GOP is INFURIATED that a Democratic fighter like Rep. Raskin would speak out and impede on their plans!**
**[_We can’t let them sink his approval ratings and chances at re-election when our democracy is hinging on the bravery and grit of Democrats like him. We look forward to reading your responses,

– Fight for Reform

body:

| | Hey Patriot,

The SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections, but Senate Democrats BLOCKED it from passing.

The only reason they opposed it is because they want non-citizens to vote, and influence the outcome of our elections, which is extremely likely now that the 'Border Czar’ Kamala Harris is in the running for President.

name: Bob Casey
subject: The White House and the Senate will be won, or lost, in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team, this is Bob Casey. The Democratic ticket is official, and now the work begins. This announcement was followed by a rally right here in Pennsylvania for a reason: **Like in 2016 and in 2020, the fate of the presidential race and the Senate majority will once again come down to Pennsylvania this November.** **[Will you help us meet this moment by splitting a donation of any amount between my re-election campaign and Tina Smith today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644547/491191841/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDUxYzY2Yi0yZjU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bA9tpSm2rqjYhTz4vAEq60v6B2BJgqR1o5LwyPag90M=)** Donald Trump, JD Vance, and David McCormick will stop at nothing to flip this battleground red. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: How we'll use your donation to elect Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We're reaching out to ask, humbly, if you can make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today.
---
Derek -- We're reaching out to ask, humbly, if you can make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today. But before we do, you deserve to know how we'll put that donation to work to elect Democrats this November. First, it's important to note that every dollar we have raised so far has been allocated. Like any organization, we have plans and budgets we need to reach in order to win. As money comes in, we allocate those resources. So not only do we have budget gaps to fill, but if we come up short of our goals it means there are expenditures we have to cut. That would hurt our chances of electing Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats everywhere. Back to how we spend the money. The DNC is the organization best positioned to move money where it needs to go, when it's needed most. We make powerful investments in grassroots organizing and data and technology infrastructure. We make sure candidates and state parties across the country have the resources they need to compete and win. The more we raise, the more we can do. But a big part of how much is dependent on the response to emails like this. So now that we have explained this, we're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making their first or oftentimes next donation to the DNC. Use this link: [**Can Democrats running for office everywhere count on you to contribute $7 directly to the Democratic National Committee today? | | Please don't click away, Peter.
**Before the ☀️ sets on my midnight deadline, I'm counting on your help:

_[Will you please make your first donation toward helping me save our razor-thin Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644982/491193469/-1298764030?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk347-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjE1MzU3Mi0zNTU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxev3kQvNn5EQKs8GIBsRLnB0Q5euyN2IJyDpe44L-c=)_ ** ********

Here's the thing, Peter –
* If we're going to restore abortion rights nationwide,_I need your help_.

* If we're going to take on big corporations and those at the very top, and lower costs for working families, _I need your help_.

* If we're going to end the epidemic of gun violence in our nation, _I need your help_.

* If we're going to keep our democracy alive in the face of ongoing authoritarian threats, _I need your help_.

You might be thinking: _Can my $5 really do all that?_
Believe me, Peter – **yes, it can:_[Support from grassroots Democrats like you is how we flipped the Senate in 2021. With your support before tonight at midnight, we'll be able to keep it blue. So if you're able, then please, chip in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644984/491193471/-1298764030?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk347-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjE1MzU3Mi0zNTU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxev3kQvNn5EQKs8GIBsRLnB0Q5euyN2IJyDpe44L-c=)_**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644985/491193472/-1298764030?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk347-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjE1MzU3Mi0zNTU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxev3kQvNn5EQKs8GIBsRLnB0Q5euyN2IJyDpe44L-c=)
---
⬆️ Those few examples barely scratch the surface of the priorities at the top of Senate Dems' to-do list.
**Seeing it through rests on us keeping every single seat we've got.**
But dark-money donors, like the Koch family and the NRA, are spending MILLIONS to prop up out-of-touch Republicans with out-of-date agendas that will only leave working families out to dry.
So for nearly half of my coworkers – especially those from states that went for Trump in 2020 – what we do now will make or break their chances of keeping their jobs after November.
What we do now will determine whether that to-do list gets done.
**And our ability to keep the majority rides on what grassroots supporters like you chip in now –** one $5 donation at a time.
**_[So Peter, can I please count on you to make your first gift of $5, or anything you can, toward my midnight fundraising goal to help us keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644986/491193473/-1298764030?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk347-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjE1MzU3Mi0zNTU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxev3kQvNn5EQKs8GIBsRLnB0Q5euyN2IJyDpe44L-c=)_ **
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/90644987/491193474/-1298764030?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk347-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjE1MzU3Mi0zNTU4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxev3kQvNn5EQKs8GIBsRLnB0Q5euyN2IJyDpe44L-c=)

– Patty

body:
| | | [](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=e813f6fc76e1403c9d46cfe0ea2e98d4&_e=qsUxEYtzNG4b2i-PbFKDomXCgnnhpLOqBCW73dj9Eo4teKjwBX819NkMgxIh-WkdfbMMLS2d5YPH4xLV9Wz4wvmilzaatAXCvddYRz0umwjcaxTJSQQAz9y1TqFtH-eDsmCzr967mZlUv2-ySMcnd_xZeZwmcPgubCmlLK6mnwClxHbDJ-muCunnYhP5kJXUQnnqxKLp5SndwYMXOyzxpGrL1WuPjj35VfhQSrXso-wxpCid0YyjSAbEQ02BhjSzdWRIJ4Fzfqyp6DdrEj_zDIQzNzZslbD0yrc7L100KmkECFEF1ChDO-x_S6Td7YMRWNnCIfzOhTm96ABBqXCvVKMuK7v1V_xZ6_BJxBCbRHk38QykTvzdHsfjravr9X5s_2CVkilMhxuYvk66i6aULA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, After our historic win in Virginia in 2021, Virginians are seeing what commonsense conservative leadership can deliver in our state and they want to see more of it at the national level. That’s why Virginia is in play in 2024 and will play a pivotal role in taking back the White House, taking back the Senate, and growing our majority in the House of Representatives. **And right now, retired U.S. Navy Captain Hung Cao is running in what I think is the most important Senate race in America. **
---
[**STAND WITH CAPT HUNG CAO**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=e813f6fc76e1403c9d46cfe0ea2e98d4&_e=qsUxEYtzNG4b2i-PbFKDomXCgnnhpLOqBCW73dj9Eo4teKjwBX819NkMgxIh-WkdfbMMLS2d5YPH4xLV9Wz4wvmilzaatAXCvddYRz0umwjcaxTJSQQAz9y1TqFtH-eDsmCzr967mZlUv2-ySMcnd_xZeZwmcPgubCmlLK6mnwClxHbDJ-muCunnYhP5kJXUQnnqxKLp5SndwYMXOyzxpGrL1WuPjj35VfhQSrXso-wxpCid0YyjSAbEQ02BhjSzdBOsFlOW4_y1i6Ddh22XCO_QprYPwT14EW4OqjwXmsuVYsBJ6HpLbZQvGJwtC8BatupMDslGq1tNkAgKtafWsUKAO_Jq7S7AKowWP3GjC5uzHgXcHqe7AKdlg8ckd5nWWid39Fe-FfMaqEsgDYEk4A%3D%3D)
---
We started a movement three years ago in our Commonwealth. Virginians hired me, an outsider and businessman as their Governor to go to work lowering taxes, creating jobs, putting parents back at the head seat of the table in their children’s lives, and making record investments in our students, teachers, and law enforcement. Like me, Hung Cao is an outsider. He’s a 25-year Navy veteran and an immigrant who put his life on the line for this country. Hung knows the price of freedom, Friend. His family escaped communist Vietnam just days before Saigon fell. If it wasn’t for American freedom, he may not be alive today. That’s why he dedicated his life to serving our country, and I know he’ll continue to put our American values and freedom FIRST as our next Senator. The polls are moving in our favor, and Hung has a real chance to win - _but he can’t do it alone_. **[I’m proud to endorse Captain Hung Cao for Senate, and I want YOU on our team to WIN in Virginia. If you’re ready to elect a commonsense, conservative leader and combat veteran to the Senate, would you pitch in now?](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=e813f6fc76e1403c9d46cfe0ea2e98d4&_e=qsUxEYtzNG4b2i-PbFKDomXCgnnhpLOqBCW73dj9Eo4teKjwBX819NkMgxIh-WkdfbMMLS2d5YPH4xLV9Wz4wvmilzaatAXCvddYRz0umwjcaxTJSQQAz9y1TqFtH-eDsmCzr967mZlUv2-ySMcnd_xZeZwmcPgubCmlLK6mnwClxHbDJ-muCunnYhP5kJXUQnnqxKLp5SndwYMXOyzxpGrL1WuPjj35VfhQSrXso-wxpCid0YyjSAbEQ02BhjSzm-t3occMgsIIiSTS06bdHd0fE36iU5O8IOdMV319_rAWnUnqq-CkI3Yu4f3AVrUjhfbIXI1hsWInZYJVV-G7Ow3fwO_c7-4IshlEfhCPmCrd9QoE0G2GlFpBAn6HtZ4LfsQBEseuOJUHj16FeLmjcg%3D%3D)**
---
[**PITCH IN - STAND WITH HUNG CAO**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=e813f6fc76e1403c9d46cfe0ea2e98d4&_e=qsUxEYtzNG4b2i-PbFKDomXCgnnhpLOqBCW73dj9Eo4teKjwBX819NkMgxIh-WkdfbMMLS2d5YPH4xLV9Wz4wvmilzaatAXCvddYRz0umwjcaxTJSQQAz9y1TqFtH-eDsmCzr967mZlUv2-ySMcnd_xZeZwmcPgubCmlLK6mnwClxHbDJ-muCunnYhP5kJXUQnnqxKLp5SndwYMXOyzxpGrL1WuPjj35VfhQSrXso-wxpCid0YyjSAbEQ02BhjSzl-WmAgCzx5AcbbOO7_FRbtKQxr03CjCPXiEHZXT-8FMcmiOtac6HQERcqySmG39f63Ei_cQANHrCIbHX_Dw2swEhtmwBCqvGOX_y5UcXUu4wYorYIqhoeSYuc6S0B8UBtNham1Sf472nyf6M2SEnxA%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, After our historic win in Virginia in 2021, Virginians are seeing what commonsense conservative leadership can deliver in our state and they want to see more of it at the national level. That’s why Virginia is in play in 2024 and will play a pivotal role in taking back the White House, taking back the Senate, and growing our majority in the House of Representatives. And right now, retired U.S. Navy Captain Hung Cao is running in what I think is the most important Senate race in America. We started a movement three years ago in our Commonwealth. Virginians hired me, an outsider and businessman as their Governor to go to work lowering taxes, creating jobs, putting parents back at the head seat of the table in their children’s lives, and making record investments in our students, teachers, and law enforcement. Like me, Hung Cao is an outsider. He’s a 25-year Navy veteran and an immigrant who put his life on the line for this country. Hung knows the price of freedom, Friend. His family escaped communist Vietnam just days before Saigon fell. If it wasn’t for American freedom, he may not be alive today. That’s why he dedicated his life to serving our country, and I know he’ll continue to put our American values and freedom FIRST as our next Senator. The polls are moving in our favor, and Hung has a real chance to win - but he can’t do it alone. Thank you, Governor Glenn Youngkin | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: The start of something incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
The day I became President Biden’s running mate was one of the most important days of my life. | | |
---
Peter, [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw0ytM7OxmGrbF_6_P9FLxjo6e4fHTglie7a3NaDkzEttlKfCnl8ShqZrghZtGo4sgJZ0KhNLG7ygXC3VMMYExEhn0xkLbfsWeQ-gUvG_oFYC0sgN4FndwkNj_hohfpcHmdYA_8t77B89WG0e5k7704mhmT3BNWQFMifVwv2gl6LcfMeaeRSGKsT_fU0VUvzN1VXKfNSc8tQrQMNOXY6bcQGzVcbf9iLnNcbmsKXPL2OEmpEVaWMOMHcStgsSac0YZFQAFlfCdvpZGwwBHDcj84DdtXX60iv3Fmj4dyRJOl_IAR3WzACvxwfZzOfc2CbAn70NVeeYXhDA5GlZmoxtDRfPbcni5imbDBZvaBr6rHJrF06RnK6qb4QgqTX75A3ABucfNsT03LDfxdwLflbVI2p_bv7GjdNRe3uCX_cs8UBhKLzTty4IbAzcDmbbrlhFq0/48t/jbv4ojqzTNKGXCmXot5dDA/h0/h001.kdo80VtxBuo8TkblMFbvxrfnelj2rrSGduOtoXSo8bA) See this picture? It was taken **_exactly four years ago today_** \-- when Joe called and asked me to serve as his running mate and future Vice President. It was -- and still is -- one of the most important moments of my life. Four years later, I am even more honored that as the Democratic nominee for President of the United States, I had the opportunity to choose a partner to lead the country with me. I have no doubt that Governor Walz will make an extraordinary partner who will help build a brighter future for all of us. To those who know him best, Tim is more than a Governor. To his family, he is Dad. To his fellow veterans, he is Sergeant Major Walz. To the people of Southern Minnesota, he was Congressman. To his former high school students, he was Mr. Walz. And to his former high school football players, he was Coach. I am proud to have Coach Walz join me on the campaign trail, and hopefully soon, in the White House. [**We are so grateful for the support we have received over the past week, and we cannot let up now. So please, pitch in $25****today. Together, I know we can win this election and continue to make progress for the American people -- but only with the help of this grassroots team.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw0ytM7OxmGrbF_6_P9FLxjo6e4fHTglie7a3NaDkzEttlKfCnl8ShqZrghZtGo4sgJZ0KhNLG7ygXC3VMMYExEhn0xkLbfsWeQ-gUvG_oFYC0sgN4FndwkNj_hohfpcHmdYA_8t77B89WG0e5k7704mhmT3BNWQFMifVwv2gl6LcfMeaeRSGKsT_fU0VUvzN1VXKfNSc8tQrQMNOXY6bcQGET8-JmO3DvVJA8SIHG8nnd_EwR2glZaiIoTcYakznF0Lhy31aFVttwIKgsUnQh0x3CPnFWSqfUQxG3P5XGUNg_eE4KEDssum8ChNoS0HK9lAHay7uJLHT8rbHVkzX5YLugsgBLrzf6QWyp7lP7tnhcJRcLATwcgVxLsoRleEVgJb0n2iuecF_UIZR07ksXOanwZLtsoT3J4LYldDpGrDHbyTMLWQDstEXXND9Lc3VbQ/48t/jbv4ojqzTNKGXCmXot5dDA/h1/h001.wqstnWf3j9FjUACJL5OVpqElDr3i528F48sU6A7Hl9o) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Joe’s and my partnership is something special. For the past four years, we have worked together to create an America that makes sure families across the country don’t just get by; **they get ahead.**
_We protected and strengthened the Affordable Care Act._
_We defended reproductive rights._
_We spearheaded historic climate action._
_And much, much more._
We all know there is still more work to be done to fight for our future. Tim and my partnership will be just as critical in making that future a reality.
**We both believe in the extraordinary promise of America -- a promise of freedom, opportunity and justice. Not just for some, but for**** _all_****. And we cannot make that happen without your support.**
****
[**If you are as ready as we are to fulfill that promise, please pitch in $25****or whatever you can afford today. Every little bit counts at this critical moment for our campaign.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw0ytM7OxmGrbF_6_P9FLxjo6e4fHTglie7a3NaDkzEttlKfCnl8ShqZrghZtGo4sgJZ0KhNLG7ygXC3VMMYExEhn0xkLbfsWeQ-gUvG_oFYC0sgN4FndwkNj_hohfpcHmdYA_8t77B89WG0e5k7704mhmT3BNWQFMifVwv2gl6LcfMeaeRSGKsT_fU0VUvzN1VXKfNSc8tQrQMNOXY6bcQGnGuY_ON9DuZ_MfVYfpBzCjIOCnQUNhg0kE3T0j_hHulFTHCILyToHIYXfz9eIyePzkJYUjFw1aXc8uAjSdM6PTiyEXm6Ohehvh5P5JdPxSzZmKh6kSYekue03dyW9BxCzulZHRvSWLLjHFdf655rmrkEQfCYjKFSWqEcu_s1nDktr04aVTxsp7649Gc47_vbGEHAjkd8Z_apYPIFjZw-fz6xVu74gph6qv_xYLEhHn0/48t/jbv4ojqzTNKGXCmXot5dDA/h8/h001._ntXWYl2NbpIIDuXlMa8cg5JNhZLbb_ljwRLc3mWrj4)

clean_body: The day I became President Biden’s running mate was one of the most important days of my life. | | | Peter, See this picture? It was taken exactly four years ago today \-- when Joe called and asked me to serve as his running mate and future Vice President. It was -- and still is -- one of the most important moments of my life. Four years later, I am even more honored that as the Democratic nominee for President of the United States, I had the opportunity to choose a partner to lead the country with me. I have no doubt that Governor Walz will make an extraordinary partner who will help build a brighter future for all of us. To those who know him best, Tim is more than a Governor. To his family, he is Dad. To his fellow veterans, he is Sergeant Major Walz. To the people of Southern Minnesota, he was Congressman. To his former high school students, he was Mr. Walz. And to his former high school football players, he was Coach. I am proud to have Coach Walz join me on the campaign trail, and hopefully soon, in the White House. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Joe’s and my partnership is something special. For the past four years, we have worked together to create an America that makes sure families across the country don’t just get by; they get ahead. We protected and strengthened the Affordable Care Act. We defended reproductive rights. We spearheaded historic climate action. And much, much more. We all know there is still more work to be done to fight for our future. Tim and my partnership will be just as critical in making that future a reality. We both believe in the extraordinary promise of America -- a promise of freedom, opportunity and justice. Not just for some, but for all. And we cannot make that happen without your support. ** Your support means the world. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Moment of Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, we are living through a moment of crisis in our nation's history, a moment of the Left's own design. Liberals like my opponent, Lucas Kunce, are trying to take away: Our freedom to _speak_. Our freedom to _worship_. Our freedom to raise _ __our_ _ own __children_ as we see fit. It's out of touch with America, and it's out of touch with Missouri. This week, I've been on the campaign trail, and my family has been by my side every step of the way. I'm proud to introduce my wife, my boys, and my beautiful daughter. When I look at my daughter, it's hard to fathom that Lucas Kunce wants a world that puts men in women's locker rooms, and men in women's sports. I want my daughter to have the opportunity to play sports without creepy men in her locker room. clean_body: | | | Peter, we are living through a moment of crisis in our nation's history, a moment of the Left's own design. Liberals like my opponent, Lucas Kunce, are trying to take away: Our freedom to speak. Our freedom to worship. Our freedom to raise our own children as we see fit. It's out of touch with America, and it's out of touch with Missouri. This week, I've been on the campaign trail, and my family has been by my side every step of the way. I'm proud to introduce my wife, my boys, and my beautiful daughter. When I look at my daughter, it's hard to fathom that Lucas Kunce wants a world that puts men in women's locker rooms, and men in women's sports. I want my daughter to have the opportunity to play sports without creepy men in her locker room. As I meet with Missourians and hear how the liberal policies are making it harder and harder to make ends meet, raise a family, and live the American dream, I remind them of this - we represent both the history of America and what made us a great nation, and we also represent a hopeful future for America. | | | | | | | | | God Bless,Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Breaking news out of Minnesota's 5th district:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
With just 48 hours left in our primary, we had to make sure you saw this
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1308%2E791427%2E9ZqzD5)

**With just 48 hours left in our primary, we had to make sure you saw this breaking news:**
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug24.QjfTG2&refcode=em240811-2&t=2&akid=1308%2E791427%2E9ZqzD5)
According to _The Intercept_ , members of a WhatsApp group named "Zionists for Don Samuels" have been coordinating and building coalitions with Trump donors and "alt right Christian Neo Nazis" to support Ilhan's opponent and flood outside cash into Minnesota's 5th district during the final days of this race.
Take a look:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug24.QjfTG2&refcode=em240811-2&t=3&akid=1308%2E791427%2E9ZqzD5)
You may have seen us reach out about the AIPAC-affiliated outside spending group dropping tens of thousands of dollars on attack mailers against Ilhan and raising huge sums of money in the hours after Cori Bush's defeat in Missouri.
Or about right-wing internet trolls mobilizing Republicans to vote for Don in Tuesday's primary.
**These are the people we're dealing with. So please:**
**[Can you rush a contribution — $3 or any amount — to stand with Ilhan so we can fight back? This is an important moment for our campaign, and a critical time for our movement to show we're in this fight together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug24.QjfTG2&refcode=em240811-2&t=4&akid=1308%2E791427%2E9ZqzD5)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

Thanks for anything you can chip in today.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
